_What can YOU do about this corrupt indictment?_

Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._

clean_body: | | | | Burning cash and our futures... | Peter, Let us sing a little song for you to the tune of “That’s Amore”: When inflation has grown And your kids can’t buy homes That’s Bidenomics When our credit’s kaput And your income just stays put That’s Bidenomics But, in all seriousness, have you seen the news? Earlier this week, Fitch Ratings cut the United States’ credit rating from AAA to AA+, signaling that they know what the Biden White House tries so hard to deny: “Bidenomics” simply does not work. Years of reckless spending have saddled working and middle-class Americans across the Hudson Valley with ever more debt, ever-increasing costs of living, and an ever-diminishing prospect of knowing true prosperity in theirs or their kids’ lifetime. Meanwhile, radical progressives like my opponents think that the Biden Administration hasn’t gone far enough! They continue to propose astronomical spending bills for the benefit of far-left special interests and ultra-wealthy donors, all at the expense of you and your family’s future. This is simply not sustainable. As a member of the House Financial Services Committee, Mike continues to fight for policies that reduce inflation and provide real support and opportunities for New Yorkers. But to continue this mission, we need your help, Peter. Our movement is strong but our opponents are already spending millions to silence us and spread lies. | | | | | Thank you, Team Lawler | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- =

name: Adam Frisch
subject: let me quickly explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67499393/419902697/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2YwYjI1OS05NTMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jL1vheOgCppgo-ur1tMEFF4dP_esiScnDwYgnFXMEcY=&emci=b029bec5-6231-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=acf0b259-9531-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67499394/419902698/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2YwYjI1OS05NTMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jL1vheOgCppgo-ur1tMEFF4dP_esiScnDwYgnFXMEcY=&emci=b029bec5-6231-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=acf0b259-9531-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
[**In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67499395/419902699/1610638071?refcode=em20230802pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=acf0b259-9531-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2YwYjI1OS05NTMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jL1vheOgCppgo-ur1tMEFF4dP_esiScnDwYgnFXMEcY=) **But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024.**
Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes.
The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country.
We did it all with zero support from national Democrats while also being outspent by Boebert’s campaign and her allies.
How? By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and _listening_ to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible.
This time, things are already getting even nastier. Boebert’s Super PACs are going to try to smear me on every TV across the district.
**We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of getting another 50,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert, but right now we're still 5,315 short:**
[**If you’re able to, can I count on you to make a donation to my campaign right now – no amount is too small – to help us hit our goal and finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress? I’m grateful for every dollar you can afford to chip in.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67499396/419902700/1610638071?refcode=em20230802pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=acf0b259-9531-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2YwYjI1OS05NTMxLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jL1vheOgCppgo-ur1tMEFF4dP_esiScnDwYgnFXMEcY=)

clean_body: Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes. Hello, = But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024. Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes. The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country. We did it all with zero support from national Democrats while also being outspent by Boebert’s campaign and her allies. How? By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and listening to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible. This time, things are already getting even nastier. Boebert’s Super PACs are going to try to smear me on every TV across the district. We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of getting another 50,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert, but right now we're still 5,315 short: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Early resources are critical to building and sustaining a campaign that can meet every voter and win. Thank you for everything. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

This campaign is powered by grassroots patriots like YOU, and I need your continued support to carry this fight all the way to victory on Election Day. **After all, the 2024 Senate race in Montana will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate. **

That is why the other side is MOTIVATED beyond belief. Democrats continue to shower Senator Tester with millions every month, **meaning our campaign will likely be outspent for the remainder of the summer.**

clean_body: We haven't even been in this race for two months, but we have already made a HUGE statement. | | Peter, We haven't even been in this race for two months, but thanks to the support of grassroots conservatives like you, we have already made a HUGE statement. Inside Elections just ranked Montana's U.S. Senate seat a TOSS-UP. But, Peter, we cannot take this for granted. Montana may be in the toss-up category today,but this race is far from over. This campaign is powered by grassroots patriots like YOU, and I need your continued support to carry this fight all the way to victory on Election Day. I’m not a career politician - but it’s clear as day to anyone that national Democrats will see this rating change as a signal that they need to double down and pour as much money into this race as humanly possible to keep this Senate seat in their column. After all, the 2024 Senate race in Montana will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate. That is why the other side is MOTIVATED beyond belief. Democrats continue to shower Senator Tester with millions every month, meaning our campaign will likely be outspent for the remainder of the summer. Jon Tester has over $10 MILLION in his campaign warchest. Just last quarter, he broke fundraising RECORDS in the state, raising the most money that anyone ever has during the 2nd quarter of an “off-year” election. We cannot allow the Democrats to buy this Montana Senate seat for another 6 years. Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate (Montana) P.S. Peter - We must have your help to be successful. After all, the Senate will be won or lost in Montana. | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Fellow American, this is so important.

Senate Republican leaders just texted me a file of our top grassroots supporters throughout the country, and you’re one of them.

I was told I could count on you to take one of the most important surveys in the country because of your top supporter status: The Patriot Audit Survey.

The Patriot Audit Survey will set Republican priorities and our agenda for 2023, it’s that important, Fellow American.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0253e8faa521481e8966aea2dda28bff&_e=6rlRMklVQEZZuzfLthasIHHlwprO9buY4ny8BAaKKjcibOwNoKWkPUqDNuRpgtKIEBOdTtqScN5rUQ9kXwqglo_wAvo6Q2VbERghskpl9-rnI08EZ_5F-B7m0P-Y9_LO_82KvuGM0IVjD2WI4gFvMlNEOWM-bZD7HXyrE4vGnK_q9PV-UiW4m9Rt3tKHK7C2X7q2ea5NhE5J7zs0zQQIpwj7IkCU5XDKHTkx3osRxTu0GzV_HF5ScRqnzXjgT-1AHnxBHfdb6r7MKmyVxzUBX8olciQNsiUKYRibm4MwNnkzUVH-oWiV3q3ecUORrGSDkj2QOFvrBK8IBGWp6lpWFk43wEM10YIjdm7qgYO9BYBO4R-LW8WErahU1akNSSyiuA8TyG2B6kII01QKq_ad3hTZLHbCgIFmg3q8Di4tE_mdXCyUkE7VVS23P5Cvs5rsr-E5wwcf1BzQyB-Tw-0kbQ%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?GNHGP?=
subject: AUG 3-6 GPUS MEETING, AUG 9 GNGHP MEETING
body:
Please Register for Both these important meetings!

** GPUS Annual Meeting: Aug 3-6!
GNHGP August Meeting: August 9!
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Green Party of the United States
Annual National Meeting (Zoom)
------------------------------------------------------------
August 3-6!
WORKSHOPS on Organizing, Peace, Climate, Banking, MORE.
SCREENING of 2 films: "Ithaka" (on Julian Assange) and "Healing Us" about the US Healthcare Crisis.
KENOTE SPEAKER PETER KALMUS!
CANDIDATE CAFE'S (we expect Cornel West to drop in)
COMEDY FUNDRAISER WTIH LEE CAMP
MORE!
Register NOW!! (https://www.gp.org/anm#workshop_submit)

** AUG 9 GNGHP MEETING
Weds 7PM
Please join by Zoom!
------------------------------------------------------------

** AGENDA
------------------------------------------------------------

1. Approve MINUTES (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1QeCwDL4ybnWA2GIhE2ka7_6s2PFjsYo-?usp=sharing)

2. Officer elections: openings for vice chair and vice treasurer

3. Treasurer's Report and Suggested Contribution Reminder

4. Candidate Reports:
Jordan Werme (East Hampton)
Paul Garlinghouse (New Haven)

5. Recent events
July SCC meeting
GPUS Annual National Meeting

6. Old Business
Invite people to join listserve
GNHGP Website

7 . New Business
The Debt Collective
September 17 Climate Rally
New Haven Town Committee
Candidate Support Ideas
GNGHP Summer Social - Aug 20

** YOU GOTTA
REGISTER HERE (https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZAkd-6rrzIvGtW_BdTGLuATsHjIQPMhY9GX)
------------------------------------------------------------

** Upcoming Events
------------------------------------------------------------

** SAVE THE DATE!
GNGHP SUMMER SOCIAL
BEACH PARTY
SUNDAY AUGUST 20TH!
DETAILS COMING!
------------------------------------------------------------

** We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!
------------------------------------------------------------

** The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, electoral, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!
Find our chapter Bylaws HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1RdZ-DjmwN76_XrktMoS83csmQ4zukzDZ?usp=share_link) .
Read minutes of our past meetings HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1QeCwDL4ybnWA2GIhE2ka7_6s2PFjsYo-?usp=sharing) .
Follow us on Facebook HERE (https://www.facebook.com/GreaterNewHavenGreenParty) .
Follow us on Twitter HERE (https://twitter.com/nhvGreens) .

============================================================
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=6d989f7f5e)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=6d989f7f5e)
.

Peter, this is simple - Jamie McLeod-Skinner is the wrong choice for Oregon.

_The Radical Left is ready to take our house seat in 2024...

Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \-

**Biden Sanctions NATO ally Hungary, while 7M Illegals Stream Across Border w/ Zoltan Koskovics

[](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64439&L=29981&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1Kci1BNG1zcFRfSSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bbfb395bd9084097747c5471108988cb402624717a5800c538021bd8fc0014f4)**
Zoltán Koskovics is a geopolitical analyst at the Budapest-based Center for Fundamental Rights. His area of study covers US and Russian foreign and domestic policy, great power competition, conflicts, weapons of mass destruction proliferation and arms control. Zoltan’s essays have appeared in several Hungarian newspapers, and he is a regular guest on Hungarian TV and Radio news shows.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barrack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock you or scare you -- _I say it because it’s true.__ _ _What we’re seeing today didn’t happen overnight. It’s no coincidence. It’s no stroke of luck._ It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making...** ****...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** ** ** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – the largest magazine of the radical Left.**** I marched,**** I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to**** fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them.** ** I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ – and I want you to receive your very own copy of it. **[Today, I’m asking you to stand by me, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvfipkeff8d893g8adnujpl3hkend5rf7aleco8g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1im6o72cdh2bs) And as a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of my book: _The Enemy Within._** When you think of The Enemy Within, you may think of Joe Biden, or Nancy Pelosi, or Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. **But make no mistake: the real mastermind is and always has been Barack Obama.** Because he laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008._ __He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs.__ __He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage.__ __And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we’re seeing today has been over a decade in the making – and most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain what is happening in this battle now – how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... [ripped headline images] **“A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza**** ****“The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin**** ** **“David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham** I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because we’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[So if you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi04k8smllosveu3natvcmuch81ksces0oesbf18_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1im6o72cdh2bs)** and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy _The Enemy Within._ Friend, the Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make it better — they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform [it].” **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking, and our country is hanging by a thread. clean_body: America is on the brink of destruction. | | | | America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock you or scare you -- I say it because it’s true. What we’re seeing today didn’t happen overnight. It’s no coincidence. It’s no stroke of luck. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – the largest magazine of the radical Left.** I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them. I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to receive your very own copy of it. And as a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of my book: The Enemy Within. When you think of The Enemy Within, you may think of Joe Biden, or Nancy Pelosi, or Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: the real mastermind is and always has been Barack Obama. Because he laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs. He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage. And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we’re seeing today has been over a decade in the making – and most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain what is happening in this battle now – how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... [ripped headline images] “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza** “The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote The Enemy Within because I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote The Enemy Within because we’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy The Enemy Within. Friend, the Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make it better — they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform [it].” And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. name: Vivek
subject: Trump, DeSantis, TEAM VIVEK 📈
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWTlrvFDhN

Vivek 2024

The latest Fox News poll has us in third place, ahead of
Mike Pence, Tim Scott, and Nikki Haley!

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTlrvFDhN

Fellow American - did you see
this polling from Fox News?

🚨 We're polling in third
place, ahead of Mike Pence, Tim Scott, and Nikki Haley! 🚨

Fellow American, are you feeling
the Ramaswamy TSUNAMI?

Polling numbers like this are KEY
to securing a prime spot on the debate stage.

I am on the campaign trail EVERY
DAY meeting with voters, but I could really use your help in
securing new donors before the day is over.

Chip in $1 ➔

Chip in $5 ➔

Chip in $15 ➔

Chip in $25 ➔

Chip in $50 ➔

Chip in More ➔

We cannot afford to let the
recent polling momentum we've built peter out. Please help before
midnight!

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN NOW →

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. Fortunately, there are [3 simple steps](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0hg59rvkj76ts9epved8nfe1at6je0tbus3uos8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1hm2o36cjh2bs) you can take to safeguard your savings. [Discover these 3 simple steps here.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztcomaqmfvs59983mciaogoo6poifei7e16dpas0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1hm2o36cjh2bs) Good luck and God bless! |
---

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Prepare Now! Your Freedom, Privacy and Savings are at Risk
body:
var __adobewebfontsappname__="dreamweaver"

Please read the
following message from our sponsor.

How Banks Can Seize Your Accounts

Banks don't need your permission
to legally seize your deposits. This is how you can protect your
savings. Learn More

This Tax Loophole Is Kept Secret
by the IRS

The IRS is trying to close the
tax loophole that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market
crashes and recessions. Learn More

This Asset Will Save You from
Recession...

With recession looming and
inflation at a 40-year high, this asset hedges against economic
uncertainty. Learn More

Beware the Digital Dollar:
Unveiling Its Terrifying
Realities!
The purchasing power of the US
dollar is rapidly dwindling. You have been deceived, as the
government's promises of financial stability crumble before your
own eyes.

Now, more than ever, it is
crucial for you to move out of the high-risk zone and take
immediate action to protect your wealth. The solution lies in the
timeless power of an asset that the government, banks, and Wall
Street don't want you to have.

For years, the government has
insisted that the dollar remains a reliable store of value, but
the truth is far from what they would have us believe.
The silent erosion of the
dollar's purchasing power has left hardworking Americans like you
vulnerable, as your savings and investments are silently
devaluing.

It's time to expose the deception
and take decisive steps toward securing your financial future.

The signs of the dollar's decline
are impossible to ignore. Inflation is soaring and the cost of
everyday goods and services are spiraling out of control.

The government's assurances that
this is merely a temporary phenomenon is an utter lie as the
hardworking middle class struggles to make ends meet. The erosion
of your purchasing power is no accident; it is a consequence of
policies that prioritize short-term gains over your long-term
financial security.
It doesn't stop there. Amidst all
the lies and chaos, President Biden snuck in Executive Order
14067. The Digital Dollar, poised to roll out soon, is the Fed's
sinister attempt to end privacy as you know it by tracking and
controlling your every financial move.

Imagine a world where every
aspect of your financial transactions is meticulously recorded,
scrutinized, and controlled by the government. The Digital
Dollar, as outlined in the Executive Order, is portrayed under a
sinister guise of convenience with instantaneous access to funds
via our phones that are ironically under constant full
surveillance.

This shift grants unprecedented
powers to the central authorities, jeopardizing the very essence
of your privacy. It is a grave threat that you cannot afford to
ignore.

Your personal choices will no
longer be yours to make. The consequences are profound. The
government can dictate how you spend your money, monitor your
purchases, and potentially freeze your assets at will. The very
essence of your personal freedom is at stake.
Act now with urgency to embark on
a journey toward financial liberation where you not only
Preserve, Protect, and maintain your Privacy but reclaim the
peace of mind that has been mercilessly stolen from you.

Allegiance Gold, LLC is not a
broker-dealer and does not provide investment, tax, or legal
advisory services. No statement in this communication should be
construed as a recommendation to purchase or sell any security,
or as investment, tax, or legal advice. Precious metals, like
all investments, carry risk, are not suitable for all investors,
and past performance does not guarantee future results. We do
not guarantee any investment performance. Please consult your own
investment, tax, or legal advisor prior to making any investment
decision. Third-party information quoted or presented by us in
this communication represents only the opinions of the third
party and we do not endorse any third-party source of
information. We are not affiliated with the U.S. Mint or any
government agency. ©Allegiance Gold, LLC 2023

name: Bill Spadea
subject: They're coming for your stoves
body:
Peter, Governor Murphy has done it again... and this time he's coming for your stoves.
|
---
| Peter, **Governor Murphy has done it again...** **and this time he's coming for your stoves.** The Board of Public Utilities just approved his plan for utilities to incentivize buildings to switch from natural gas to electric.
**Rather than focusing on the many critical issues that New Jersey continues to face, Murphy instead pushes for things that won't make our state a better place, like starting the process of banning stoves.**
---
|
---
The Governor's administration doesn’t seem to care that people don’t want to replace their gas stoves or undertake expensive conversions to electric furnaces and water heaters . They care way more about pushing their extreme Energy Master Plan.
---
| Small businesses are shutting down left and right, working class families continue to suffer, and our kids are being taught outrageous curriculum (just to name a few things that need fixing).
Instead of electric furnaces, our Garden State needs to prioritize Common Sense Solutions that will improve the lives of our citizens. If you agree that Murphy's priorities are out of whack, and would like to see real change in New Jersey, you belong in the Common Sense Club.
---

## Fitch Cuts U.S. Credit Rating
Fitch Ratings [cut America's credit rating](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u7CAQRp8Gd1gD-AcXFLdxt7dNaY1hsImwWeHJWnn7aFOn-ZpPOjo6H4_lgSmnc_uPBzmOZUHP6UULWGmkNotugotEmkxDTg2TgkHBpJrdQbeuZgRNMdAQ-6k3ax8p9l7bccTRN8lp0AYsGJjMqGwLA9o-AFEXu-iVFR1QSFxq-1nSyTvF_F1eVFtfjia7nfl5CfNP6Fno-b7v1p-rf59Cz2-00DPY9yih55jY7zKU-9wqBrrk1yVzOTfJVA9ZkdO5XZKLRJSxlkMiYrvzkZvqwvNOOadrGEUH24Ep_yrwn0F-AgAA___qp2FH) to AA+ from AAA, citing "a steady deterioration in the standards of governance over the last 20 years," particularly regarding government budgeting and spending.

The White House and Treasury Department both disagreed strongly with the move, calling it "arbitrary," while [blaming Republicans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uhDAQBOCnMd2itc2PKSjS0F3alMiBBTuxMbL3DuXtI1KnmeqTZjQfj_lhffDH_m4jjbyl2S7sXzSjAQ1Kz6pax41Ika5olN0gsZM4yMqNWiEOw7ItjUQy1NsOrTSDMS31rZFt5UeFSqNBjYPupamxs6ZdkajZmm2RRjRIq-eU66_kD3a0hZ_0olwvKVZhdMxnEfpNqEmo6bqu-kzBs1_SDYSaDrqKUNPdItSE5g51U-eZwKVnIYjpRQU4wWewkYDzM55gC0Sbv4kLFJefO1iGzfPiYE3XsWe7EiBKHLTpqjyu5-VD8KXrRYN7tD78LeR___oNAAD__4Fhaq0) and Jan. 6.

For their part, Republicans [blamed President Biden](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPtCAUAH8Ndhh4KGpB8TV2-7VXGoSHvguKAXa9-_eXvfr6SWYyH4_lYSnSuf23B5oa0mJdpRcuYuSKg1qg8SYgAqoGjdSTFFqKSTa70WrqdQ_KrR30qtduQPQopXMjCLvKhgwIUGIUSkxqkGMrtB17LxC70AUnR9YJ9FRTbj8TnXXHEL_TC3Pr0tFEs9d6Fab-MZgZzPd9tyF9rc9CJ5byZhjMV4pUyRUG80oeT349y46e2wMzOVu4y28Fz7bSufGIfkMeqLqd-3SfW7Yem2z8dVOMVPTAOrEdluJvQ_3zyE8AAAD__1S3ZL8) for refusing to negotiate spending cuts while pouring trillions into programs they oppose. On Wall Street, markets stayed flat while traders assessed.
## Facebook Blocked Posts at White House Request
Facebook [suppressed accurate information](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1yrSAURp8GOxx-vIoFxW3sTtqUDsJGd4JsR4gmb585mUmX8puvWWu9PuaHw4R5fXE72Bppdr7iBbMwXHOlZ9UEGwEU6Aas7EcpeilG2WxWeqcWrReph0EYP4IMZoijGMa-i8sSGrRKKC2M0GLUgzSt6J35FwRAF7vopWGdgICVzvaNMNcNYvqiC87W094ku9V6FKb_MzUxNd333Ub6zHCX58_UtENAx9QUnYeF6J2Xj-M4oRQIHHOkc3cVKfPLeY8ZCncXYfidPMPqnqoc8oUn5R1y5RETFF42upvThuPGlLD0A-vEujtMP2T1z07fAQAA___wgm3q) as well as opinions about Covid vaccines to avoid a "vaccine negative environment" at the request of the Biden administration, according to internal company documents.

Beyond informational posts, the documents showed that the White House also wanted to block jokes and memes making fun of the vaccines. The papers show Facebook resisted the pressure to some extent, but not all.

In addition to vaccine information, earlier documents show the government also pressured Facebook into [removing posts claiming that Covid was man-made.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLnO2zAQBp-G6lbgZR2FCjfqnDalQJNLa2MegkiLyNsHTv1X3wdMM5jfj-1hKFB6_TIRl-rzZmylCzc-gQKpNtm5xSNKVB0uYpgFHwSfRbcvyil0o7qNs1DPEVFrr6UctBV2tKOfO1okl4pPXPFZjWLq-WCmm-OI2mtvxcQ0R0c1n_2fTKnu6MPffOHZ2xy7sOy1HoWpO5Mrk2trrY8lfRmTKyb4FCbXhO07Rw5UyX6vNxafOb_B5ngEQgeN6g5tp4qw509BcBhNcgVqhhNjvhCOXGoBGwxFSi-w-SIHzRSIJkE0DplczQn3u8DP4N7dubijUQhUhpFp_oqGwn_r-mPDfwEAAP__b891cw) Facebook has since ended its policy of censoring those posts.
## Bad at Fitness? It's Not You, It's Your Genes
A new study shows that [genetics plays a larger role than suspected](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuhSAUgOGngU1zOEcRB4YubrdrR4N4uNKi3gi9tG_ftHPnP_mT7-0231xM8bi_up1tCefsfIlPnsE01CDNKFcbmJFJslV6VKAVjEpu1gzKmTAueliQnQfW0JPvAy3gPKteRouABAYIRhqUaUE706_A3IUueGVEB7zGcl7t-xmPsnFI3-eTr9afu0x2K-WRBb0InAROtdZ2WfxvEzgdXLPA6fOj4eOe3LE2nDN_NVpTh0i9vOz6qDGlmPUgOrjvLqa_b_lX-RMAAP__5S5SRg) in cardio-related athletic performance. Less than 31% of people had the right DNA to make the most of their training.

Researchers divided people randomly into two groups and had them do identical endurance training for eight weeks. About a third improved their running ability significantly. The others showed very little change.

The top performers had a combination of [19 key gene variants](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fu6yAUgOGngQ3rcMA2Hhju4i137WgROMRU2FiAkvbtq3Tu_kuf_o_bdnMpp_Px3x1keyyb8z09aQMjlEC1IQ82EiEpTlZOi4RJwiL5brXBJeAYZ1TRQJiAfBxHH_Td3NFrzZNFQAUGFCxqlmaAyZkxAJGOOnppmAYKqZc6fJZ09p1i_i5PqoMvB8927_1qTP1juDJcDwrJu_x1VWrtXTBcT3o1huubETCLi2orp8viQSf15Juo9CSX27D3I_Nqw_VKOac2zUzD43Ap_1L9z_GfAAAA__9xSVoV) linked to the "ACTN3" gene associated with speed, power, and reduced injury. Those without the right genes shouldn't count on a professional career in sports.

On Aug. 3, 1492, Christopher Columbus set sail from Spain on a journey to reach India. Instead, two months later, he hit land in what is now the Bahamas and officially discovered the New World. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Fitch Cuts U.S. Credit Rating Fitch Ratings to AA+ from AAA, citing "a steady deterioration in the standards of governance over the last 20 years," particularly regarding government budgeting and spending. The White House and Treasury Department both disagreed strongly with the move, calling it "arbitrary," while and Jan. 6. For their part, Republicans for refusing to negotiate spending cuts while pouring trillions into programs they oppose. On Wall Street, markets stayed flat while traders assessed. Facebook Blocked Posts at White House Request Facebook as well as opinions about Covid vaccines to avoid a "vaccine negative environment" at the request of the Biden administration, according to internal company documents. Beyond informational posts, the documents showed that the White House also wanted to block jokes and memes making fun of the vaccines. The papers show Facebook resisted the pressure to some extent, but not all. In addition to vaccine information, earlier documents show the government also pressured Facebook into Facebook has since ended its policy of censoring those posts. Bad at Fitness? It's Not You, It's Your Genes A new study shows that in cardio-related athletic performance. Less than 31% of people had the right DNA to make the most of their training. Researchers divided people randomly into two groups and had them do identical endurance training for eight weeks. About a third improved their running ability significantly. The others showed very little change. The top performers had a combination of linked to the "ACTN3" gene associated with speed, power, and reduced injury. Those without the right genes shouldn't count on a professional career in sports. name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. Fortunately, there are [3 simple steps](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94ca0074a55a431b9baadbef4f8ece02&_e=7ce_hCBwPEfhKnGhQmT-1Iu-uxKFWOyCPu-eOKFPKH8-QUSYFzdNGnpNDLBVoJ0ei91igOLHf80jx3V8Lio-gc_8ChIms1HtZw8Loawp2q9lgngO7qNyLOv2rXA9dSg9H5iYtOqxvRDQmzYxFNdoqrY9-utToj6tnMAyzK49A2avKT1amZ0Wg30W4Mt0yO0E79Li5ZytfJS_pWSbly1lfjugeV0xsJpMPhZkS0w-5AC8MrFYzaHE1fWxpvcgcqJVhcqImABk7wUWSH1z91KZjA%3D%3D) you can take to safeguard your savings. [Discover these 3 simple steps here.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94ca0074a55a431b9baadbef4f8ece02&_e=7ce_hCBwPEfhKnGhQmT-1Iu-uxKFWOyCPu-eOKFPKH8-QUSYFzdNGnpNDLBVoJ0ei91igOLHf80jx3V8Lio-gc_8ChIms1HtZw8Loawp2q9lgngO7qNyLOv2rXA9dSg9X0fqQFsOcomCntzYs_YX8FWfZD8LNF_S2vSxvMTdSRuqR_ikeBz6oEE34StKkdAnSicH1H6nrBZSWjDRZCghew27lViUE7GnDifW_hWPyhnbOeYcqYtqNnl2C6uVm5IFl1OLSknGv3tP-72JRdj62Q%3D%3D) Good luck and God bless! |

| | | | | We're making incredible strides in our race to defeat Ted Cruz, and now, Peter, **[I am personally asking for your support to help us keep up this incredible momentum.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8fa43e66-1b03-4502-9388-14f3bdf0db25/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65a8013f-839f-45d6-b697-b02feedf59be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Donate $5 now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9bd81d48-3cb9-4a51-9824-6b6ffdc98c8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Since we launched this campaign, the Cook Political Report and Roll Call both upgraded our chances of winning. FiveThirtyEight now says Texas could be Democrats' best chance to flip a red seat blue. And a new poll shows us just 5 points behind Ted Cruz, with 14% of voters undecided. This is a testament to the powerful grassroots movement we're building, Peter, and I'm so thrilled that you're a part of it. But the more national attention this race gets, the more wealthy Republicans will be lining up to fill Ted Cruz's war chest. I'm counting on your immediate support to help me keep up our momentum from now until Election Day. [Please, will you split a donation of $5, $10, or any amount that's meaningful to you between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help defeat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91d6affd-44c3-4f9c-96e7-41e36fbe6ddc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tacfbbe66-6533-46c3-a7d1-3d2bbd42f2dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

The FBI and DOJ are crawling with corruption, Hunter Biden is being protected by his father, and conservatives have a huge target on their backs. name: All On The Line
subject: The Shape of Things: Ohio’s Gerrymandered Legislature and Issue 1
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation in local communities of interest.
|
---

**The Shape of Things: Ohio’s Gerrymandered Legislature and Issue 1**
[**How We Got Here:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67500957/419924838/-525127504?refcode=20230803_AOTL_F_SoT-TX_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0ZDRhMGUwLWVjMzEtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zdf_iqQJMx6QJ7k9bKoe69rGxmXDffOuRUCgiyjH4Vs=)
Ohio's 2020-2021 legislative redistricting process was a troubling extension of decades of gerrymandering regardless of efforts to reform the process, where unaccountable politicians rig the rules to their advantage.
In September 2021, voters supported by the NRAF challenged gerrymandered legislative maps in _Bennett v. Ohio Redistricting Commission_ (ORC), highlighting the critical issue of Ohio Republicans attempting to hold on to unearned power through gerrymandering. Despite the Ohio Supreme Court striking down the gerrymandered legislative maps in January 2022, the ORC's Republican majority continued to pass more gerrymandered maps, leading to more court orders to redraw compliant maps. In their desperate attempts to maintain their grip on power and in open defiance of the Supreme Court, Ohio Republicans succeeded in having the state conduct the 2022 elections on maps that had already been invalidated.
The _Bennett v. Ohio Redistricting Commission_ case showcased how politicians elected from gerrymandered districts benefit from map manipulation, evade accountability, ignore the will of the people, and ultimately undermine democracy.
* * *
[**Ohio Issue 1:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67500958/419924839/-525127504?refcode=20230803_AOTL_F_SoT-TX_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0ZDRhMGUwLWVjMzEtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zdf_iqQJMx6QJ7k9bKoe69rGxmXDffOuRUCgiyjH4Vs=)
Ohio Issue 1 is a legislatively referred ballot question proposing an amendment to the Ohio Constitution that would increase the approval threshold of future amendments to the Ohio Constitution to 60% from a simple majority. Ohio’s gerrymandered legislature sent this ballot question to Ohio voters in the spring of 2023 for an August 8, 2023 election, despite having outlawed August special elections in December of 2022 due to low voter turnout.
This ballot question to amend the Ohio Constitution is a prime example of the alarming reality of politicians elected from gerrymandered districts using map manipulation to consolidate power and avoid accountability when it benefits them. They prioritize the interests of lobbyists and special interest groups over their constituents' needs in order to preserve their hold on power, leading to a lack of responsiveness to citizens' concerns.
* * *
[**What's Next?:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67500959/419924840/-525127504?refcode=20230803_AOTL_F_SoT-TX_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0ZDRhMGUwLWVjMzEtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zdf_iqQJMx6QJ7k9bKoe69rGxmXDffOuRUCgiyjH4Vs=)
Issue 1, if approved, will worsen the problems caused by gerrymandering by requiring a 60% majority to pass ballot issues that amend the state constitution, denying voters a critical avenue to make their voices heard in the democratic process. The August special election aims to exploit lower voter turnout and manipulate voters to push agendas without scrutiny, further insulating legislators from accountability. Furthermore, it poses a significant threat to the future ballot initiatives like the effort to enshrine abortion rights in the state constitution that will be before voters this November. This specific initiative is a direct response to gerrymandered legislature’s decisions to push anti-choice policies.

[**Why Voting "No" on Issue 1 is Crucial for Our Movement?:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67500960/419924841/-525127504?refcode=20230803_AOTL_F_SoT-TX_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0ZDRhMGUwLWVjMzEtZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Zdf_iqQJMx6QJ7k9bKoe69rGxmXDffOuRUCgiyjH4Vs=) **Upholding the Sacred Principle of "One Person, One Vote":** Issue 1 undermines the fundamental democratic principle of "one person, one vote" by shifting power from individual voters to lobbyists, special interests, and corrupt politicians. **Protecting Our Rights:** Voting "No" on Issue 1 is essential to preserve Ohioans’ rights. This amendment would restrict Ohioans' freedom and permanently alter the Ohio Constitution, diminishing their say in crucial decisions affecting their lives. **Countering Power Grabs:** Issue 1 represents a blatant power grab by those seeking to control the political landscape for personal gain. By opposing this amendment, we send a strong message that Ohioans and people nationwide will not tolerate such manipulative tactics.
---
[**Our Shape of Things series aims to raise awareness about the barriers to fair representation nationwide. Educating and mobilizing voters, we advocate for electoral reforms prioritizing fairness, transparency, and accountability. clean_body: Our Shape of Things series raises awareness about the barriers to fair representation in local communities of interest. | The Shape of Things: Ohio’s Gerrymandered Legislature and Issue 1 = Ohio's 2020-2021 legislative redistricting process was a troubling extension of decades of gerrymandering regardless of efforts to reform the process, where unaccountable politicians rig the rules to their advantage. In September 2021, voters supported by the NRAF challenged gerrymandered legislative maps in Bennett v. Ohio Redistricting Commission (ORC), highlighting the critical issue of Ohio Republicans attempting to hold on to unearned power through gerrymandering. Despite the Ohio Supreme Court striking down the gerrymandered legislative maps in January 2022, the ORC's Republican majority continued to pass more gerrymandered maps, leading to more court orders to redraw compliant maps. In their desperate attempts to maintain their grip on power and in open defiance of the Supreme Court, Ohio Republicans succeeded in having the state conduct the 2022 elections on maps that had already been invalidated. The Bennett v. Ohio Redistricting Commission case showcased how politicians elected from gerrymandered districts benefit from map manipulation, evade accountability, ignore the will of the people, and ultimately undermine democracy. = Ohio Issue 1 is a legislatively referred ballot question proposing an amendment to the Ohio Constitution that would increase the approval threshold of future amendments to the Ohio Constitution to 60% from a simple majority. Ohio’s gerrymandered legislature sent this ballot question to Ohio voters in the spring of 2023 for an August 8, 2023 election, despite having outlawed August special elections in December of 2022 due to low voter turnout. This ballot question to amend the Ohio Constitution is a prime example of the alarming reality of politicians elected from gerrymandered districts using map manipulation to consolidate power and avoid accountability when it benefits them. They prioritize the interests of lobbyists and special interest groups over their constituents' needs in order to preserve their hold on power, leading to a lack of responsiveness to citizens' concerns. = Issue 1, if approved, will worsen the problems caused by gerrymandering by requiring a 60% majority to pass ballot issues that amend the state constitution, denying voters a critical avenue to make their voices heard in the democratic process. The August special election aims to exploit lower voter turnout and manipulate voters to push agendas without scrutiny, further insulating legislators from accountability. Furthermore, it poses a significant threat to the future ballot initiatives like the effort to enshrine abortion rights in the state constitution that will be before voters this November. This specific initiative is a direct response to gerrymandered legislature’s decisions to push anti-choice policies. = Upholding the Sacred Principle of "One Person, One Vote": Issue 1 undermines the fundamental democratic principle of "one person, one vote" by shifting power from individual voters to lobbyists, special interests, and corrupt politicians. Protecting Our Rights: Voting "No" on Issue 1 is essential to preserve Ohioans’ rights. This amendment would restrict Ohioans' freedom and permanently alter the Ohio Constitution, diminishing their say in crucial decisions affecting their lives. Countering Power Grabs: Issue 1 represents a blatant power grab by those seeking to control the political landscape for personal gain. By opposing this amendment, we send a strong message that Ohioans and people nationwide will not tolerate such manipulative tactics. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = \-- All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. We aren’t going to sugarcoat it: the situation is dire. Bees are dying at alarming rates. If we don't act fast, many of the fruits, veggies, and nuts they pollinate could become RARITIES. **But there’s a chance that the EPA could approve toxic neonic pesticides for another 15 YEARS!** **These are the same pesticides that are driving vulnerable wild bees toward extinction.** We can’t let it come to this, Friend. **[Act fast to help protect bees and our planet: Donate $27 or more and help us reach our $2,500 goal before midnight!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1911442?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Neonicotinoid pesticides are key drivers of the massive pollinator declines we’re seeing. They can impact bees' ability to navigate and reproduce, and **_even kill bees on contact._** But they're also the most widely used insecticides in agriculture. And in the past three decades alone, neonics have made U.S. agriculture _**nearly 48 times more toxic to insects.**_
The EPA has a chance to ban the worst neonics once and for all. Instead, it might approve these pesticides for another 15 years. But there's still hope, Friend. Because of supporters like you, we have the chance to make real change -- change that would help protect bees, people, and the planet. Will you join us in this fight?
**Help get bee-killing pesticides out of our food system and protect our planet. Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $2,500 goal before midnight! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1911438?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1911439?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1911440?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1911441?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees play a crucial role in their ecosystems. From fields of blooming wildflowers to rows of veggies on farms, these and other insect pollinators aid in plant reproduction. Many of these plants support webs of life by offering habitat and food for other species.
We rely on bees and other pollinators for 75% of the world's food crops, including the most nutritious -- so when we lose bees, **we also risk losing some of the foods that keep us healthy!** In fact, the decline in bees and other pollinators has already harmed global fruit, vegetable, and nut production. Without access to these vital crops and a healthy diet, people could be at higher risk of **_heart disease, stroke, diabetes, and even cancer,_** according to a recent study.
There's no mystery here. Study after study has found that the massive use of pesticides, like Bayer-Monsanto's bee-toxic neonicotinoids, is a key driver in the decimation of pollinators.
But pollinator-killers like Bayer-Monsanto are sweeping their lethal impact under the rug -- and the United States EPA is giving them a free pass. They’re allowing widespread use of toxic pesticides instead of shifting away from chemicals we KNOW are killing massive numbers of bees.
**Stop the downward spiral of vulnerable pollinator populations and protect our planet. Donate $27 or more to Friends of the Earth today!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1911438?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---

---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1911440?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1911441?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are a canary in the coal mine. Their deaths signal that **the toxic way we produce our food is on a deadly track.** We must act NOW to protect our health and ensure that we are not among the last generations to share the planet with countless species of wild bees.
At Friends of the Earth, we are doing everything we can to help save pollinators, protect our health, and stop the destruction of our planet. We're working to pass policies that ban toxic pesticides that are driving the decline of bees and butterflies. At the same time, we're pushing major grocery companies like Kroger to stop selling food grown with these chemicals. With your help and membership support today, we can win.
But the bees are running out of time -- _**and they need you.**_
If we don't stand up to Big Ag now, **we could stand to lose _hundreds_ of wild bee species in North America alone.** It's up to you to help protect a future that includes vulnerable pollinators. Please, Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save wild bees from extinction and protect our planet.
**Act now to give pollinators and our planet a fighting chance. Rush your $27 donation and help us reach our $2,500 goal before the clock strikes midnight.**

Kendra Klein

Please, Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save wild bees from extinction and protect our planet. Act now to give pollinators and our planet a fighting chance. Rush your $27 donation and help us reach our $2,500 goal before the clock strikes midnight. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Kendra Klein Deputy director of science, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email – but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull’s eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it’s a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 – and a sign of what’s to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could’ve obeyed. I could’ve said, “I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family.”
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could’ve dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who’ve become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I’ve been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They’ve made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn’t come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We’ve built the greatest political movement in the history of our country – and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class – and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America’s TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | Friend, I have a lot to say in this email – but it all comes from the HEART. Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull’s eye on my back. My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government. But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene. When the Deep State invades your own home, it’s a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse. The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 – and a sign of what’s to come if I chose to defy their demands. I could’ve obeyed. I could’ve said, “I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family.” But that thought never even crossed my mind. I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could’ve dreamed of. America will always be worth saving. Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who’ve become drunk with power never was and never will be an option. So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into... ...I have since been INDICTED THREE TIMES as an innocent man. I’ve been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning. They’ve made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man. Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man. But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn’t come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God. The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny. So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign... ...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL CONTINUE TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024. We’ve built the greatest political movement in the history of our country – and I will NEVER ABANDON it. We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class – and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America’s TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY. Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you. But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It’s backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: An update on our lawsuit vs Keith Ellison
body:
A video update for you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/mama-bears-8857375?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I wanted to provide you with a quick update on our [lawsuit](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=de8d1f426b&e=9828080a05) against Keith Ellison and the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice. They are trying to dismiss the suit now; we _won't_ let them. We’ll take this as far as it will go, in order to set a new precedent for free speech rights for physicians and professionals across the country. Keith Ellison is even refusing to turn over critical data! [Please click the video thumbnail](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c6fc5656e2&e=9828080a05) below for the full scoop on what's next:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=a53590264b&e=9828080a05 "Lawsuit Update")
---
| Government regulatory agencies are not weapons to be used against political opponents. This suit will vindicate the rights of physicians and other health care professionals, cosmetologists, and anyone else who recognizes this grave threat to free speech and the First and Fourteenth Amendments to the Constitution.

The purpose of the suit will be twofold: First, to aid the courts in further drawing the line between protected speech and professional conduct subject to regulation. Second, we will hold accountable those responsible for the outrageous weaponization of government against I and countless other professionals with the courage to speak out against censors and regulators run amok.

[Don't miss this video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=9b44c46d53&e=9828080a05) and please stay engaged. If this is a cause you support, you can learn more information and help us by [clicking here](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=85e87446b1&e=9828080a05).

We will not back down.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
