name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wires is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e97a259e74e04798b6aed1ec77a87f66&_e=K_xKozDZbWZPeGJUsXNlz3eODLGW4Ngj1wwjJKmsOiIYkuygePdHK_ODZED-Md-iCbXpoWo_M6X5ZAbkEMPw6ieE2fYdak6JsLghC9bq4OMBn9XRSfeisTSidLWWuQI8v-yFSasOI_bdRImpsSebc_CNjXaz55X2dmnmk8VkbzyUPUJUj69LcRUhNCPZxVcYdW1q-_YqbCJZMcNQWlPtczUFKcZxB3pDOK8s61ZwMlOH3vaCbXdhnWoz6eP2-N5zPl94sNH8FLubUunfetuBvvDljVIkaK0A2QTS0RtO9tPadgH2YhP6mKco5QxQ36ETQOMJZdWYPRZ-osmbn_vZRXR-hNbvuKjZ28HW0d5-XFpjt_5z6btybX0a8Q2WsEHv6s5WN6K95UNNd7kmTI4Tdg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e97a259e74e04798b6aed1ec77a87f66&_e=K_xKozDZbWZPeGJUsXNlz3eODLGW4Ngj1wwjJKmsOiIYkuygePdHK_ODZED-Md-iCbXpoWo_M6X5ZAbkEMPw6ieE2fYdak6JsLghC9bq4OMBn9XRSfeisTSidLWWuQI8v-yFSasOI_bdRImpsSebc_CNjXaz55X2dmnmk8VkbzyUPUJUj69LcRUhNCPZxVcYdW1q-_YqbCJZMcNQWlPtczUFKcZxB3pDOK8s61ZwMlOH3vaCbXdhnWoz6eP2-N5zsdpZd2xu_fnglMUJwDGUAY7B10phkCToqrGJNxUp_aD7SXMd0mH_lnGWoYrH1uEj1iQ-cUGJ4pjpXJDMDx_qZG1OgHBd8l_QSsAzwHQiHf8sK5berZLwmCNfMPSE_BKUSwYvBmDnJ92Gc5KicCOJeg%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e97a259e74e04798b6aed1ec77a87f66&_e=K_xKozDZbWZPeGJUsXNlz3eODLGW4Ngj1wwjJKmsOiIYkuygePdHK_ODZED-Md-iCbXpoWo_M6X5ZAbkEMPw6ieE2fYdak6JsLghC9bq4OMBn9XRSfeisTSidLWWuQI8v-yFSasOI_bdRImpsSebc_CNjXaz55X2dmnmk8VkbzyUPUJUj69LcRUhNCPZxVcYdW1q-_YqbCJZMcNQWlPtczUFKcZxB3pDOK8s61ZwMlOH3vaCbXdhnWoz6eP2-N5z-B7G8yENb3WTg6_kdr0r1N36IEzMPMlQCPHOeb7H3gTKTisR1rotfnEqRr4zb4duq-WPZgPZMqU3y7iXUOwPTW3R-wdWRjzrCn5PPxcsMm4GUWpn9hu8vErHA9o_vPsJSlVOwCG-UCDX0L6dEGp8Lw%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=e97a259e74e04798b6aed1ec77a87f66&_t=YZCCs_DXRsj_QSTgkVXZU75G6TWA7VajqXRdRaEFQzCUqaDmDUC7WYG5sNgqlJD-GL3d2-1-OSxPWYtModSmUNIpwPmSseayG3BPcVnUI7y89TKrP_ZQEhmvE3B3JW3wtE5FH_cf9RB_V46DeD7FPFuKI3kKAsOWLCivQD_SVl8%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e97a259e74e04798b6aed1ec77a87f66&_e=pQ-qRe36T2z358buAcdoxyvPgWhU953EK9eCzLVf9RmH_J3VAJuP-er4xzo7bVw0MZVzJnOhpNq4vM_cPRlFsljlTWJnSOTkKB7lOQ_iPyp3YPcKq5DazmA1j9w9WQ4FEH7Ylzh4nWroG42xg7EP_fuuwcUVsqMUMVpUIYVMztUj4KeLn2LV0XJZmGCPBaSDgyU6hAnlCszEPFlkMPPqe1Ug7EUE9OIBx3dY4b9LDleHugrQGnGV21BjB2lrxv2o-BRhcDqpYDKR1-KuDwYN9VNwUdFkFjqhvsoGOEp-51U%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e97a259e74e04798b6aed1ec77a87f66&_e=K_xKozDZbWZPeGJUsXNlz_y9mjEPfEJ_OdiiDI93HrZgnksVvdkWcw8Hey8jWTqivYSnDoJuUo_lKHZzqlyzEtSWD-iDpVJdABbZE2UwVLfmQqAUqeVSOme1ba-43d7Zl8msNUTOAsj3LvRZYY1q9dHJu2Dte512vLlS6YpYGJgs_haIF9YTZsMv_X6kB58lkfA7YCWymRhOFLrSOivalX1VLJG6G0RdJm_2pxKMQxI%3D)_

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: ATTN: What this means for our campaign -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA - for 1,500% impact.](http://trk.secureandprosper.)**
[CONTRIBUTE $1 >>](http://trk.secureandprosper.-AeiXA)
---
---

---
---

---
---
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](http://trk.secureandprosper._38e6MkVetTA)
---
---

---
---
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](http://trk.secureandprosper._bW6BKdtOMmTkPww)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-ZadA)
---
Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States

subject: Protect Your Bank Account with THESE 3 Simple Steps
body:
United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide

| | | | | Dear Reader, Starting as soon as a few months from now, the United States government will make a sweeping change to bank accounts nationwide. It will give them unprecedented powers to control your bank account. They could closely track every transaction. They could even freeze it. Unless you protect yourself today. ### NATIONAL NIGHT OUT

Neighborhood groups throughout the Star City hosted this year's National Night Out in hopes of building relationships with police. We had a blast visiting Roanoke's neighborhoods and interacting with our community!
National Night Out is an annual community-building campaign that promotes police-community partnerships and neighborhood camaraderie to make our neighborhoods safer.

### MOST VIRGINIANS SUPPORT A DRUG AFFORDABILITY BOARD

A new survey says a majority of Virginians are concerned about affording their medications, and show strong support for legislation that targets the high cost of prescription drugs. Virginia advocates are renewing their push for a state board that could cap the price of some drugs.

### [Michael Feggans for HD-97](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B-bai2xb0Dz8yf5FBM7XQnvJUvKgzllUuRLb4lAKzjYt9_8lYMNPSzc_meNa4nruNmXoxkkWsJWa6m2mzGf1d2EHAeuEMKcITBcA2wXEABFeIoOrIbWjLOr3LoUAD_1NjWnzx4oidOZgnl-wTz44wQ==&c=4AJ_tePjLihGuOG1ytyRRwzfFFsU9YfB8Uw0YD693ZS7TxJfV4ziyw==&ch=MbVRtk7TMqiS3TRjnaw15LfAkOO6znpvNvUIvQNcBVancKD2VgUK4A==)

Michael B. Feggans is a native of Virginia Beach. He was raised for most of his early life in the West Kempsville area of Virginia Beach, VA, by his mother who worked for 30+ years as a Norfolk Public School teacher, and his father worked as a Norfolk International Airport firefighter and retired as a Captain.
After 20 years of service in the Air Force, he knew that the best place to retire from the military and start his next phase as a tech entrepreneur was back home in Virginia Beach. With the creation of the new 97th House District, Michael is stepping forward once again to provide a fresh voice and to continue serving the community he loves.
He's excited about meeting the residents of the new 97th House District, tackling the challenging issues at hand through compassionate leadership, and continuing to serve this vibrant community with steadfast commitment.

Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com or call 540-353-3645.

We had a blast visiting Roanoke's neighborhoods and interacting with our community! National Night Out is an annual community-building campaign that promotes police-community partnerships and neighborhood camaraderie to make our neighborhoods safer. | == | == | | == | == | MOST VIRGINIANS SUPPORT A DRUG AFFORDABILITY BOARD A new survey says a majority of Virginians are concerned about affording their medications, and show strong support for legislation that targets the high cost of prescription drugs. Virginia advocates are renewing their push for a state board that could cap the price of some drugs. | | | CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT | | | | == | == | == Michael B. Feggans is a native of Virginia Beach. He was raised for most of his early life in the West Kempsville area of Virginia Beach, VA, by his mother who worked for 30+ years as a Norfolk Public School teacher, and his father worked as a Norfolk International Airport firefighter and retired as a Captain. After 20 years of service in the Air Force, he knew that the best place to retire from the military and start his next phase as a tech entrepreneur was back home in Virginia Beach. With the creation of the new 97th House District, Michael is stepping forward once again to provide a fresh voice and to continue serving the community he loves. He's excited about meeting the residents of the new 97th House District, tackling the challenging issues at hand through compassionate leadership, and continuing to serve this vibrant community with steadfast commitment. | | | REGIONAL CANDIDATE EVENTS | | | | | == Canvass for Lily Franklin! name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmeufaec54b83qqulvrpn5c26oq90dgh2ip0f8f0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1jm1ob6cph2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z64ius688ltf3ialovavae6nce3f7uaq799fjaa0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1jm1ob6cph2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ge6jgg1tsf54kjr0ftpkhoh12gnpjmb28df25g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1jm1ob6cph2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp80r1ujkmbm6o70pajfodf713pbvqkohmffovgo_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1jm1ob6cph2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, did you see the most recent Montana Senate poll?

JON TESTER: 45%
GOP OPPONENT: 42%

This poll proves we have what it takes to win 2024’s most competitive
race, but all of our momentum could come crashing down if we don’t have
the resources to fend off the GOP’s attacks. If we want to win, we will
have to fight like hell to make it happen.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19014?t=1001&akid=3459%2E346206%2EQusl1w ]Will you step up today and split a contribution between Charles Booker
and my campaign to help us stay in the lead no matter what national
Republicans throw our way? It’s important we hit our fundraising goal.

Folks, we know the election seems far away, but the honest truth is that
early resources are critical to building a campaign strong enough to win.

And with Mitch McConnell planning to unleash tens of millions in dark
money so his hand-picked candidate can win, every dollar we raise counts.
Your support today means we can reach more voters, mobilize more
supporters, and fight back harder against the negative attacks that will
come.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19014?t=1002&akid=3459%2E346206%2EQusl1w ]Your support is critical, especially now. Please chip in -- split with
Charles Booker -- to help us build up as much small-dollar support as
possible so we can take on whatever McConnell and other national
Republicans throw our way.

CHIP IN →

It means so much to me to have folks like you on this team.

—Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19014?t=1003&akid=3459%2E346206%2EQusl1w ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230803-3459-footer&t=1004&refcode2=3459_346206_Qusl1w&akid=3459%2E346206%2EQusl1w

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3459%2E346206%2EQusl1w

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can’t handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation.

| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**
---
| | [I'LL CHIP IN, MARCO!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl8dqj9et7jjuqsg1tpjjof3cqd4o2d25sriu60g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1jm9o30sph2bs "I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!")
---
_**[The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1am6rfd2ni5ci6omavaisvo37grrbvbi3e8bua0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1jm9o30sph2bs "The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.")**_
_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._
We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

_I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values._ A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this.

**If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.**

**But if you think we need to get this country back on track and the American Dream restored, please donate whatever you can afford by midnight!**
---
| | [DONATE NOW >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfvhjp0rregi2p3c54ieverrj1jivpbe77qcc2r8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1jm9o30sph2bs "DONATE NOW")

| Thank you so much for hearing me out.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgnmdd9dkv3a455cs7b5aj5bkr2ihb8s6ersj64g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge0oj2c1h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znss1sil7qbsaj038pg1o1a50kt9l8vk05cs6l8g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge0oj2c1h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsl5jnfvru074ilhuo0sr8rold497p8uu6s5kl6g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge0oj2c1h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdmm8ou8tq1jelascb3rpels8h316tv5mnq9hvho_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge0oj2c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Action News
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3f50peshv149u8pf3mbsetouooig9m1ekonbbb8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge0oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmubk319tqh940978icmqc6d7t0c2e4kh2eufp9o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge0oj2c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zme64u9607mvh2l9rcceg1lg7o9qic6ifc2ijvv8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge0oj2c1h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: McCarthy’s #1 Fan
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Kyrsten Sinema
#

Peter -
Did you know there’s a Kevin McCarthy Fan Club in the Senate? We didn’t either.
Member #1 is Kyrsten Sinema. Here’s what she just said about McCarthy to Politico:
**“He's doing a great job with a very difficult hand he is facing every day.”**
_A great job._
Apparently mulling over impeachment proceedings for President Biden is doing a great job. Apparently pushing culture war bills that ban women’s access to abortion or restrict voting rights is doing a great job. And apparently doing everything he can to make sure Donald Trump wins a second term in the White House is doing a GREAT job.
We have nothing against bipartisanship or working across the aisle, but this is ridiculous.
With so much on the line in 2024 and beyond we need someone who will fight for our values and the change we need in the Senate. We need Ruben Gallego.
Otherwise it’s more of McCarthy’s #1 Fan.
So please: [**Chip in $3 and send Ruben Gallego to the Senate. If $3 isn’t right, anything. Any donation can make a huge difference. This is important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230803-1-30&t=1&akid=878%2E734936%2EFdwB1V)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joseph?=
subject: Water Quality: A Top Priority for Michigan's Future
body:
Go to alfonsoforcongress.com to learn more! | | | | |
---
|
---
# Water Quality:
# A Top Priority for
# Michigan's Future
|
---
As we journey towards a better future for Michigan's 4th District, I'm thrilled to highlight a crucial campaign issue: water quality.
Today, I share with you my commitment to ensuring clean and safe water for all residents in our beloved district.
Water is vital to our communities' health and well-being.
Access to clean, safe water is a fundamental right for every Michigander.
| [LEARN MORE](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=d783e5f474&e=16d812e81c)
---
|
---
# Protecting Our
# Lakes and Rivers
|
---
Michigan's 4th District has breathtaking lakes and rivers that are not only sources of natural beauty but also critical resources for our communities. I am dedicated to preserving the purity of our water bodies, safeguarding them from pollution and harmful practices.
By supporting responsible environmental policies, we can ensure that future generations can enjoy these waters as we do today.
I recognize the importance of investing in infrastructure projects for improved water treatment, lead protection, and access to safe drinking water.
By advocating for stronger regulations and clean alternatives, we create a safer environment for our communities.
Your involvement and input are invaluable as we address water quality issues.
Together, we can build a healthier, sustainable future.
|
---
# EVERY DOLLAR
# COUNTS!
|
---
| [GIVE TODAY](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=b65ec81cb3&e=16d812e81c)
---
Your support is essential in driving our mission to improve water quality and protect our environment.
By contributing you shape policies prioritizing community well-being and natural resource preservation.
Visit alfonsoforcongress.com and click "Give Today" to contribute securely.
Every donation, big or small, makes a difference.
Thank you for believing in our cause.
Together, we'll build a Michigan that works for everyone, reflecting the spirit of democracy.
With heartfelt gratitude,
Alfonso For Congress Team

Today, I share with you my commitment to ensuring clean and safe water for all residents in our beloved district. Water is vital to our communities' health and well-being. Access to clean, safe water is a fundamental right for every Michigander. | | Protecting Our Lakes and Rivers | Michigan's 4th District has breathtaking lakes and rivers that are not only sources of natural beauty but also critical resources for our communities. I am dedicated to preserving the purity of our water bodies, safeguarding them from pollution and harmful practices. By supporting responsible environmental policies, we can ensure that future generations can enjoy these waters as we do today. I recognize the importance of investing in infrastructure projects for improved water treatment, lead protection, and access to safe drinking water. By advocating for stronger regulations and clean alternatives, we create a safer environment for our communities. Your involvement and input are invaluable as we address water quality issues. Together, we can build a healthier, sustainable future. | EVERY DOLLAR COUNTS! | | Your support is essential in driving our mission to improve water quality and protect our environment. By contributing you shape policies prioritizing community well-being and natural resource preservation. Visit alfonsoforcongress.com and click "Give Today" to contribute securely. Every donation, big or small, makes a difference. Thank you for believing in our cause. Together, we'll build a Michigan that works for everyone, reflecting the spirit of democracy. With heartfelt gratitude, Alfonso For Congress Team | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 Alfonso for Congress. All rights reserved.

subject: Do you believe in miracles?

body:

| | Peter, If you don't believe in miracles then this message isn't for you. Fifty-two years ago today, a baby was born in Saigon. How could he have known he would leave under the direst of circumstances, come to America only to spend seven years of his childhood in Africa. Upon return to the States he spoke no English but already had a deep sense of patriotism and decided he was going to serve in the United States military. NOTHING stopped him from achieving that goal. Hung has spent a lifetime serving our nation with integrity and dedication and now, although he's in a different kind of fight, the goal is the same: to save our country from what his family escaped from. I am so proud of him! Would you help me celebrate him today? His life story, like so many, is a MIRACLE and I know how much he means to me and our children. In honor of him, [please consider giving $3](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=b5db671632fb43e5ab4ab0cd639c4f93&_e=6kxBsktNrw6Bg-NUHuPuKJ0bewQKi48SEwcbZ96svOyRb-9-tgvRZK0C76mUlENUgzFK5N70TXRFFh3yOg3fUPyp8Uvt5p01ywHSyzVWMdCJJy7Ul1FNs6mSZpb8eAAy7AZPXtGw28GUvc8uNCGjO9Xu80bIPCNTQTryKGSMX89TLeahFeswV3xxp8ZrELGRf-gil8oR2O-cU1qNcWYlJ4YB8-Rvo9Bl1KvW715nNNDboeXYX6S6OT77XeFoA6cTadlcZxtyTqqXZw-24GtR1Kgxb0q0mVcXHmEucT_m9U-bylmIQPJM6MF-4HcQ0V-wtO5eECagVmwXA4QCSJUqgUdI3zXWo4y4Hu4zVlxKH6tnTRDnp9AADSolQcjGgEo5WvgzAMgTJlL6n0V_XlQILsnV0-GzLg6gpMwB6AlNr1Iby8qcaPRLDr5J1iXMP_Dv)-the cost of his favorite drink-a bottle of Coca Cola-so he can continue to FIGHT FOR US.

name: American Defense News
subject: Fmr. Trump Advisor Shares Warning for President Biden
body:
I’m a former economic advisor to President Trump – during one of the greatest economic booms in history...

| **NOTE:** Brad Thomas is a multi-millionaire, NYU adjunct professor, and former economic advisor to President Trump. Today, he’s shown over 100,000 Americans how to take advantage of a little-known IRS "payout" loophole to support their retirement.
* * *
Dear Reader, I’m a former economic advisor to President Trump - during one of the greatest economic booms in history... [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl2qlbudj4iks6c33um896abhs5hh1441uoi3g70_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge4oj4slh2bs) And I’ve been asked to share my expertise with officials at the highest levels of our government and economic communities... Including former Congressmen, high-ranking military officers, Ivy League PhDs, even a chief executive from NASA... Today, I’m issuing a special warning to President Biden - and all Americans... I recently released a new presentation - recorded in a warehouse studio near Mar-a-Lago... To discuss something I believe every American has the right to know... I’m talking about [an IRS "payout" loophole](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeaablk6e1fh87pr30me1qe46dv5merfhmnaocj0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge4oj4slh2bs) that allows regular Americans to collect legally mandated payouts - up to $10,000 or more - connected to America’s biggest companies like Amazon... I also reveal the biggest threat facing America and investors today... And why over 1,400 institutional investors are urgently moving money into a little-known investment... If you’ve got money in the market right now, I urge you to [watch my new presentation and prepare yourself for this urgent situation.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsuabjiku6b2v3ior48mfbvjrdrigs5t80qqu3ho_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge4oj4slh2bs) All the best, [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zksia26taj5dr4s1v72bnl4955rd8ttn1vajosio_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge4oj4slh2bs) Brad Thomas
Editor, _Intelligent Income Investor_ [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zngemsonudvnbbgaectf1ng5cp98lvcmaqnuqgf0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge4oj4slh2bs) **P.S.** According to Trump’s personal tax returns, he’s collected over $9.2 million from this type of opportunity (Not real estate!). [Click here to see for yourself.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd65nn1mos5oe3oh9lvcn0fofdjr3om28ligkc00_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge4oj4slh2bs)

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Re: China on your doorstep
body:
| | | Mark my words, the only thing that will check Communist China’s belligerence is a strong and bold United States.

That’s why I’m working overtime as the Chairman of the House Armed Services Subcommittee on Readiness to ensure America’s service members are the best trained and equipped warfighters in the world.

Sadly, Biden’s hand-picked generals have other priorities.

Instead of building warrior spirits dedicated to defending our great nation and creating a culture that makes our enemies deathly afraid of war, they push woke initiatives and divide our ranks.

As a consequence of this politicized agenda, our military faces the worst recruiting crisis since the Vietnam War.

My friend, we must restore a colorblind, merit-based system to our military, abolish political and woke programs, and go all in on a Reagan-style military buildup.

You see, I’m working hard every day in the U.S. House of Representatives to strengthen America’s military and to hold the corrupt Biden regime accountable for their failed strategy of appeasement.

And I need patriotic Americans like you to stand with me.

So, I’m counting on you to join me today by completing our Communist China Threat Assessment Survey along with your most generous contribution to Team Waltz at once!

I eagerly await your response.[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=7a8c6e246ffd400d9ce1d30b3418de49&_e=g9KBMoIJYKAQS_KVhWQfcztmc1lym1q0QrlTe-C9YcOvvIx3NyMLerFNfTxwC600aakQTikbWTAtdspfKQWpZzxLRU_NrpWrVteZofIDLS1kv33B_L1c5Zu-VAcj2aKUTO5MHJOx2bHMrrwssDhHPX9DZ5VLCmjJrJR21LFKtIIzrEHlNoccUqE9CECnm59IiPnsOKorqgEuRBA8_u9OIeFtkKs4uJBXfoMDrY0VXxRIMToIwAx6g1QurxzqG-RrHFpc-LpeecEmZjPDKHfVoBWB_preCmWM_E1KjEwcCn2vzhSSYNP_QEiWGH4kQfQ_xGPJECPcL5rWpXRT5apuujHWB9XfP9E2PpM1JFgVTVcBeUHVtUgNWkyv1Z9fvvuo)

name: Trump Train News
subject: Bill Gates Preparing for New Digital Dollar?
body:
I feel it's my duty to warn you that....

| Dear Reader, As a former VP of a major investment bank, I feel it’s my duty to warn you that... Billionaires like Jeff Bezos, Bill Gates and the founder of Google Larry Page are all preparing for what I believe will be **[a mandatory US dollar recall.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp1tdsbu76hhp3hopifu1i1qga41ed053tkhi188_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge4p72c3h2bs)** I’ve personally already moved over a $1 million of my own money in preparation for this recall... Because it will be the biggest change to our financial system in 52 years. I urge you to move your cash now because they could make the official announcement as soon as September 10. **[Click here to see the details and learn the three steps you need to take to protect your savings.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5kjiphsai51kd4l6lgt1gqg3nqssc8qgt826v9g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ge4p72c3h2bs)** Regards, Teeka Tiwari
Editor, _Palm Beach Letter_

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Join us TODAY for the Yard Sign Pickup Party with Candidate Jerri Green!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
August 3, 2023
Dear friend,
Just a friendly reminder that the Yard Sign Pickup Party for Attorney Jerri Green's Memphis City Council campaign is happening TODAY, August 3rd, from 5:30 to 7:00 pm. This is your chance to meet Jerri, a dedicated advocate for the most vulnerable in our community, and hear her vision for a better Memphis. As a lifelong Memphian, Jerri has a deep understanding of our city's needs and a track record of making a positive impact.
Join us in showing your support for a candidate who truly embodies progressive values and is committed to making a difference in our community. You can find the location below. RSVP's aren't required but are appreciated. You can RSVP here [bit.ly/tvpgreenparty] .
https://bit.ly/tvpgreenparty [https://bit.ly/tvpgreenparty]
RSVP FOR OUR YARD SIGN PARTY FOR JERRI GREEN [https://bit.ly/tvpgreenparty]
Don't miss out on this chance to meet "One Tough Mother". Learn more about Attorney Jerri Green here [http://www.jerrigreen.com] .
Thank you for your ongoing support of the Tennessee Voter Project. We look forward to seeing you at the event!
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

subject: Do you 𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐯𝐞 of Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP

President Biden’s Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson has been a HERO for our democracy, standing up to the Court’s MAGA majority:

✅ SAVED voting rights and stopped GOP gerrymandering in Alabama ✅
✅ CONDEMNED far-right justices for overturning affirmative action ✅
✅ **STOOD UP for LGBTQ+ rights and reproductive freedom** ✅

We couldn’t be prouder to have Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson fighting for the American people — so we’re conducting an urgent poll to see what YOU think.

Do you approve of Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/kbj-approval/?source=VPP_20230803_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=9680%2E878179%2EAGVmWm)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9680%2E878179%2EAGVmWm). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9680%2E878179%2EAGVmWm).**

body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.-o1a8FjcSFF4g)

Today, Senator Ted Cruz endorsed Chris McDaniel for Mississippi Lieutenant Governor in the GOP primary. _“Now, more than ever, we need strong conservative leaders and dedicated fighters, which is why I am proud to endorse Chris McDaniel for Mississippi Lieutenant Governor. A conservative champion, defender of life, and staunch advocate of the Second Amendment, McDaniel represents what it means to be a true conservative leader at a time when our values are under attack. Get out and vote next Tuesday to protect the great state of Mississippi and its conservative principles.”_ _-_ Ted Cruz

Sharon has always put the people of Nashville first, and has dedicated her years in public sevice to advocating for **all** of Nashville's communities.

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLgG_OSniH8XZ1xxtjpmAMGF5RzaO_M6q19ls0VsoMKXZapi-5bpuadnj2ke3X_T60drXVzRfG2U9nBjt4HgS-FJqU7PRQLqutV_swwfceagwxrLSyrvUEh4FkhRizIJt67VmYH1Fc4md2PuoUnYWKZ5bs-d3ol9n5v_dd2dzWSz43kY2X-bbj4sF0iRX0z2rh9JxjosZR5YN_9i8oJZvsiQNJbugcdm7n5RR39HEirAL2RVZhvQEf0h2u0LYMAAx60-3gLhY8n-1gCSX_WqBz0k6bfiBzv-qL150TxLN3WcRw/3yf/0WjiDLz0RM-RRJMQenymog/h16/HShQTJTO4U59i3Bp4ZqHqYCZKxRIz5J2tP3JREiYGZA) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. Government shutdowns are devastating for the American people. Seniors worry about getting their Social Security checks, people already waiting too long for passports won’t get them, dedicated workers like air traffic controllers and parks employees get laid off, and military families wouldn’t receive their benefits. ****And let’s not forget the things Mark and his colleagues have accomplished for Americans while the government has been open:**** We passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill that’s repairing our nation’s roads, bridges and railways and bringing high-speed internet to rural communities, signed our first major gun-safety bill in decades into law, and we passed the CHIPS Act to lower cost for families, strengthen our national security, and create good-paying manufacturing jobs here in the United States. Long story short, government shutdowns hurt our hardworking civil servants and the millions of Americans that rely on federal services and keep us from making progress. This will be brief.

They indicted him, again. The arraignment is coming.

We're fighting on the frontlines to ensure President Trump remains a free man. The left and the corrupt Deep State want him to **DIE IN PRISON.** This will destroy our Democracy, our freedoms, our very way of life.

| | **BREAKING: A newly-filed Wisconsin lawsuit seeks to overturn the GOP's rigged maps and put _every seat_ up for re-election** A _game-changing_ lawsuit filed today in Wisconsin could overturn the GOP's rigged maps. **This is monumental.** With Wisconsin’s new liberal majority on the state Supreme Court – a majority that supporters like you helped solidify earlier this year – **we have a real chance to chip away at the GOP's hold on this statehouse and even flip the WI legislature for the first time in decades.** We need to move fast to ensure that Democrats have the resources in place to win in states like Wisconsin and pave the way for victories nationwide. ## Debate Watch Party Aug 23rd
---
---
|
---
For your information, we will not be having our usual SBCRA meeting for the month of August. Instead of the monthly meeting the board will be hosting a Presidential Debate Party on Aug 23rd. As you know the 2024 election cycle is upon us and it is already debate season. Let's have some fun and make a party for the first 2024 Presidential Primary Debate. This is a party, so let's have lots of fun. Wear your favorite patriotic outfits and bring your fun signs and flags. We will have refreshments and fun party games to make the night even better. We will be hosting the party at 412 Studios in Carson, Right by Ikea and the mall.
Please RSVP to
## nenarenae2@gmail.com
**The Party is at**
**412 studios**
**20620 Leapwood Ave,**
**Suite G, Carson,Ca**
**Door opens at 5:30pm**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: This is ESG. This is how I’m stopping it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
American taxpayers will not pay the price for ESG & DEI
---

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=712d1c7206ea4668afa3dfcac018805f&_e=Y4C21H8GlXlc7RjoXpw1iQ88lMdr0VflhzPV0OvreskNENwNWQAXwD3PLzRa_ZfNbLdmsSloJgTS8XFPxj-ZGMhhcjlfR1sCDCOg0R_0xqCGpgLVPDzd58MXn_7nmdSlIda81jDpceCQfchBR4rJMAGU1gP_wNuDF2OKY3wgZuux6wEkXCvOJBFl35UiUOfIzx4oR1xHcbsAAinNGY8VKsuOWoe1lv3bv0Idb-IosT3WKyhNt-U4mrUTM-qtpqvVem3RGwgRosHrBqU9ATmncxDcR8adjk8TejK3bomHKBHbc5upLU3JKF7OzrFpw2OCsv8R5JKcp8BQ4tatCJTdaWV2ABIq0-XLR6pAMfpsufKiEYHhgOUdFZoh2Zi5aunzV-nvRsSCexELJIAtEkWV2w%3D%3D)
Peter, Woke corporations have no business dictating how we live in a free country. **It is fundamentally wrong for corporations, NGOs, and asset managers to use their power to force a radical agenda on society. They are pushing racial discrimination in the name of "diversity," transgenderism in the name of "inclusion," and Marxism in the name of "equity." Americans never voted for woke corporate overlords, and we don't have to accept their edicts. ** Large corporations push ESG--environmental, social, and corporate governance--and abuse their unchecked power to push the far-Left agenda that is destined to fail at the ballot box. I am standing in their way. If corporate activists want to push political agendas, they should leave their boardrooms and _run for office._ Companies need to focus on doing what they do best: providing goods and services that people want to buy, not forcing political agendas on Americans. **_As President, I will not stand for corporations pushing a destructive left-wing agenda at the expense of American taxpayers. And I have the track record to prove it. _** Last year in Florida, we divested billions of dollars from BlackRock, a corporation that openly prioritized ESG over maximizing returns for investors: the taxpayers of my state. When asset managers are putting politics above fiduciary duty, it is a leader's job to step up and protect citizens' retirement funds. And it worked--just a few days ago, the BlackRock CEO said that as a consequence of Florida's actions last year, he is now "ashamed" of promoting ESG. This is a step forward, but we are just getting started.
---

As Governor of the third-largest state, I have stood up to corporations choosing to put political ideology and utopian fantasies ahead of the interests of everyday Americans. Now, I am prepared to take this fight to the national stage as President. **I have a message for Joe Biden: It is a complete dereliction of duty to ignore the financial suffering across our country and expect struggling families to shell out $50,000 on a new electric vehicle, or even $1,000 on an electric stove, because the climate lobby and woke mob demands it. That is the true mark of an out-of-touch puppet. ** Join me in my fight against Biden and the woke corporations trying to make Americans pay the price for the Left's radical agenda. **_[Please rush in any amount below to help my campaign achieve its mission and fight back against their attacks.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=712d1c7206ea4668afa3dfcac018805f&_e=Y4C21H8GlXlc7RjoXpw1iQ88lMdr0VflhzPV0OvreskNENwNWQAXwD3PLzRa_ZfNbLdmsSloJgTS8XFPxj-ZGMhhcjlfR1sCDCOg0R_0xqCGpgLVPDzd58MXn_7nmdSlIda81jDpceCQfchBR4rJMAGU1gP_wNuDF2OKY3wgZuux6wEkXCvOJBFl35UiUOfIzx4oR1xHcbsAAinNGY8VKsuOWoe1lv3bv0Idb-IosT3WKyhNt-U4mrUTM-qtpqvVoI2JiEDKuJUpr5YvvzP2TwfCqqTYNppIAwgj2oPri1tjjtD-NGI__rdOvBqAgSej_GlV7cEC88sk2TS-NLtwQuebcby7_ZBzdNx0IRs1Hafgh6O5AgAvx2Z3XFWX4f9nd5z5aD983ZCiTF4LQ-3b2g%3D%3D "Please rush in any amount below to help my campaign achieve its mission and fight back against their attacks.")_**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules

clean_body: American taxpayers will not pay the price for ESG & DEI | | | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, click Peter, Woke corporations have no business dictating how we live in a free country. It is fundamentally wrong for corporations, NGOs, and asset managers to use their power to force a radical agenda on society. They are pushing racial discrimination in the name of "diversity," transgenderism in the name of "inclusion," and Marxism in the name of "equity." Americans never voted for woke corporate overlords, and we don't have to accept their edicts. Large corporations push ESG--environmental, social, and corporate governance--and abuse their unchecked power to push the far-Left agenda that is destined to fail at the ballot box. I am standing in their way. If corporate activists want to push political agendas, they should leave their boardrooms and run for office. Companies need to focus on doing what they do best: providing goods and services that people want to buy, not forcing political agendas on Americans. As President, I will not stand for corporations pushing a destructive left-wing agenda at the expense of American taxpayers. And I have the track record to prove it. Last year in Florida, we divested billions of dollars from BlackRock, a corporation that openly prioritized ESG over maximizing returns for investors: the taxpayers of my state. When asset managers are putting politics above fiduciary duty, it is a leader's job to step up and protect citizens' retirement funds. And it worked--just a few days ago, the BlackRock CEO said that as a consequence of Florida's actions last year, he is now "ashamed" of promoting ESG. This is a step forward, but we are just getting started. | As Governor of the third-largest state, I have stood up to corporations choosing to put political ideology and utopian fantasies ahead of the interests of everyday Americans. Now, I am prepared to take this fight to the national stage as President. I have a message for Joe Biden: It is a complete dereliction of duty to ignore the financial suffering across our country and expect struggling families to shell out $50,000 on a new electric vehicle, or even $1,000 on an electric stove, because the climate lobby and woke mob demands it. That is the true mark of an out-of-touch puppet. Join me in my fight against Biden and the woke corporations trying to make Americans pay the price for the Left's radical agenda. "Please rush in any amount below to help my campaign achieve its mission and fight back against their attacks." | | | | | | | | | | | | I will never back down. Decline is a choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | | | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. # Let's have fun and watch the Debate
---
## Presidential Debate Watch Party
---
|
---
For your information, we will not be having our usual SBCRA meeting for the month of August. Instead of the monthly meeting the board will be hosting a Presidential Debate Party on Aug 23rd. As you know the 2024 election cycle is upon us and it is already debate season. Let's have some fun and make a party for the first 2024 Presidential Primary Debate. This is a party, so let's have lots of fun. Wear your favorite patriotic outfits and bring your fun signs and flags. We will have refreshments and fun party games to make the night even better. We will be hosting the party at 412 Studios in Carson, Right by Ikea and the mall.
Please RSVP to
## nenarenae2@gmail.com
**The Party is at**
**412 studios**
**20620 Leapwood Ave,**
**Suite G, Carson,Ca**
**Door opens at 5:30pm**
Give me Liberty or Give me death!
Derrick Gates
|

First, I wanted to personally thank those of you who helped us to meet our fundraising goal in July — notoriously one of the toughest months for fundraising. I so appreciate your support – it will go a long way in helping Democrats retake the House majority next year. **** First, I thank those of you who helped us to meet our fundraising goal in July — notoriously one of the slowest months for fundraising. I appreciate your support.

If it wasn't clear before, this latest indictment certainly made it so – the stakes of next year's elections are _staggering_. If not for the courage and conviction of a few patriots, Donald Trump and his cronies were determined to overturn the election results – throwing out the votes of more than 81 million Americans.

2024 will be here before we know it, and my team and I will do our part – running up the participation in the all-important Philadelphia suburbs.

I hope you’ll continue to stand with me in this most important work. If you’re not already, you can stay up to date with my work and our campaign by **[following me on Twitter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67513384/419972073/-398328110?refcode=08032023_md_eomty_en_1&refcode2=9b302ac4-0a32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjMwMmFjNC0wYTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z9k9sU4_hKI24Hke5rMuPmoGWxxKZi8HFSEfuIUtWDw=&emci=093d3952-9830-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=9b302ac4-0a32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=36373569)** If you missed the deadline last week and still want to give, you can do so **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67513386/419972075/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=08032023_md_eomty_en_1&refcode2=9b302ac4-0a32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjMwMmFjNC0wYTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z9k9sU4_hKI24Hke5rMuPmoGWxxKZi8HFSEfuIUtWDw=)**

name: Peggy L.
subject: Barbie and Bob 💕
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Friend,
I wanted to share an experience my husband, Bob Lorinser, and I had that left us feeling inspired and motivated to make a positive change for women.
Yesterday, I said, "Comeon, Bobby, let's go to Barbie."
He said his first choice would have been Oppenheimer but he laughed and agreed to join me and a few of my girlfriends.
Following the movie, here's the caption he posted on Instagram:
"Just a Ken enjoying an evening out with my leading lady. #Barbie may be wrapped in pink, but its message of equality is gold. America Ferrera's monologue reminded me to see the world through different color lenses. #WomensRightsAreHumanRights
Bob gets it!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
CONTRIBUTE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Bob and I were particularly moved by America Ferrera's monologue. My husband's profound empathy sets him apart from being 'just a Ken.' He recognizes that women's rights are human rights.
Identity politics isn't his thing. Mine either, for that matter. He will champion women's rights not because he's a woman , but because as a family physician he knows what it's like to be in a patient's room with a woman in the most vulnerable situation of her life, uncertain if she can deliver a viable infant.
He always says, "A patients room is too small for a woman, her doctor , and the United States government."
Bob's campaign for Congress is centered around promoting equality, empowering women, and fighting for the rights of every individual.
With your support, Bob wants to be a champion for all Barbies, Kens, and everyone in between.
, I'm reaching out to you today to invite you to join us in this important journey. Your contribution, no matter the size, will go a long way in helping us spread our message and engage with women across the district to fight for their rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Together, we can create a world where every person, regardless of their gender, race, or background, has an equal opportunity to thrive and succeed.
Please contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] if you can.
Thank you,
-Peggy
Peggy Lorinser
The Brains of this Operation
Bob Lorinser for Congress
If you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: Friend, I wanted to share an experience my husband, Bob Lorinser, and I had that left us feeling inspired and motivated to make a positive change for women. Yesterday, I said, "Comeon, Bobby, let's go to Barbie." He said his first choice would have been Oppenheimer but he laughed and agreed to join me and a few of my girlfriends. Following the movie, here's the caption he posted on Instagram: "Just a Ken enjoying an evening out with my leading lady. #Barbie may be wrapped in pink, but its message of equality is gold. America Ferrera's monologue reminded me to see the world through different color lenses. #WomensRightsAreHumanRights Bob gets it! [] CONTRIBUTE NOW [] Bob and I were particularly moved by America Ferrera's monologue. My husband's profound empathy sets him apart from being 'just a Ken.' He recognizes that women's rights are human rights. Identity politics isn't his thing. Mine either, for that matter. He will champion women's rights not because he's a woman , but because as a family physician he knows what it's like to be in a patient's room with a woman in the most vulnerable situation of her life, uncertain if she can deliver a viable infant. He always says, "A patients room is too small for a woman, her doctor , and the United States government." Bob's campaign for Congress is centered around promoting equality, empowering women, and fighting for the rights of every individual. With your support, Bob wants to be a champion for all Barbies, Kens, and everyone in between. , I'm reaching out to you today to invite you to join us in this important journey. Your contribution, no matter the size, will go a long way in helping us spread our message and engage with women across the district to fight for their rights. [] Together, we can create a world where every person, regardless of their gender, race, or background, has an equal opportunity to thrive and succeed. Please contribute [] if you can. Thank you, -Peggy Peggy Lorinser The Brains of this Operation Bob Lorinser for Congress If you've saved your payment information with Act Blue Express, your donation will process immediately. subject: Young voters won’t back down in the fight to end gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The data is clear: young voters want stronger gun laws.
#

Team -
The data is clear: young voters want stronger gun laws.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230803-1-15&refcode2=6271.3935704.DGjo_y&t=1&akid=6271%2E3935704%2EDGjo_y)_Credit: Data from the Harvard Youth Poll, as shown in The Washington Post_
According to this data from the Harvard Youth Poll, **63%** of young voters want to change our nation’s weak gun laws.
We can never underestimate the power of young people. They are the future of this nation, and they are showing us they will vote for politicians who will have the courage to pass gun safety legislation.
Young Americans deserve a future where they feel safe. We owe it to them to continue our work together to end America’s gun violence epidemic.
