body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | | PLEASE NOTE THAT DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS LAUNCHED A NEWSLETTER THAT IS AVAILABLE FOR FREE. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AT [MANSHARAMANI.SUBSTACK.COM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zh1q97xpE1-J1D45NCLqLqjQZ97-w_ugiQK00zH3CTqC84iPTxqhUYwqVCP2ZJjVRDMZgT2thYdAQa8cqWTNq5If0_0qZfXlJqRLebYG1tABJj5WAzKAq-wP5VTugxSPO5XitQ-_Bi9HDJ5u-7YwpSLrC7_Xh2pm&c=dddmSM2YJlb84oJRtils802YyiaAAlAbLhmvAwx8nyJUbLebdcp-IA==&ch=LdXI4VS28zLCUjaSmonea7dqRxRhnckIgobhzJNvsaKjEhj_MuaeMw==). SUBSCRIBERS WILL HAVE ACCESS TO EVERY INTERVIEW DR. MANSHARAMANI HAS CONDUCTED OVER THE PAST 3 YEARS, EVERY ARTICLE HE'S WRITTEN OVER THE PAST 12 YEARS, AND A BUNCH OF OTHER INTERESTING CONTENT. PLEASE SUBSCRIBE AND HELP US SPREAD THE WORD BY TELLING OTHERS WHO MAY APPRECIATE IT.
---
# Doug Burgum, Governor of North Dakota and 2024 Candidate for President
---
In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Doug Burgum, Governor of North Dakota and current US presidential candidate. He shares how growing up on a farm and working as chimney sweep instilled a set of values in him that led to his graduation from Stanford with an MBA, successful tenure building a major software company that he eventually sold to Microsoft, and his eventual election as Governor. He also describes his vision for the country and shares how the economy, energy, and our national security are connected.
Please click below to watch a video of this interview or tune in to the conversation via the links below.

You'll find my conversations with Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zh1q97xpE1-J1D45NCLqLqjQZ97-w_ugiQK00zH3CTqC84iPTxqhUSgg_Wxk0BBKiXcVjL9H-7uoztDwscYNI9GDUstKsyt5ny5R1inTheYY_LHe1-SFlQ1bARs6TazNH9hB1SW0O2BPeGr-5gj0Jw==&c=dddmSM2YJlb84oJRtils802YyiaAAlAbLhmvAwx8nyJUbLebdcp-IA==&ch=LdXI4VS28zLCUjaSmonea7dqRxRhnckIgobhzJNvsaKjEhj_MuaeMw==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. name: Team Jayapal
subject: Protecting our immigrant neighbors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
For too long, discriminatory health care and immigration policy in the U.S. has limited immigrant access to affordable, comprehensive health insurance.
#
Peter,
We need to guarantee health care to everyone as a human right — regardless of immigration status, income, or employment status. Pramila knows what it feels like to be a young immigrant without federal support. **That’s why she’s proud to introduce the Health Equity and Access under Law (HEAL) for Immigrant Families Act.**
**The HEAL Act proposes, for the first time in federal legislation, to allow states to include undocumented immigrants in Medicaid and CHIP and remove the 5-year waiting period for Medicare benefits for immigrants.**
**[If you believe that everyone regardless of their immigration status deserves access to comprehensive and quality health care, please add your name to our petition and amplify our collective message to Congress. We need the HEAL Act today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-heal-Act/?source=em20230803-2769&t=1&akid=2769%2E420207%2E79UXHz)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-heal-Act/?=em20230803-2769&t=2&akid=2769%2E420207%2E79UXHz)**
Immigrants are significantly more likely to be uninsured, leaving them at higher risk for both adverse health and financial consequences. By next year, immigrants will account for an estimated 8 percent of the population, yet they will make up a disproportionate 31 percent of the non-elderly uninsured population.
In this last year, we’ve seen the ever-constant struggle of bodily autonomy and freedom of choice come under constant attack at every level. **And it’s clear the Black, Brown, and poor communities will bear the brunt of these heartless and extreme policies unless we do everything in our power to stop these attacks.**
For too long, discriminatory health care and immigration policy in the U.S. has limited immigrant access to affordable, comprehensive health insurance.**By working to create a more equitable health care system, we can create healthier communities and a stronger, more resilient economy.** And we can pave the way for universal healthcare down the road.
**[Please add your name in support of the HEAL Act and Pramila’s efforts to fight for immigrants’ rights. We need as many voices as possible in support if we want this legislation to make a massive impact in Congress. Sign in support today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-the-heal-Act/?source=em20230803-2769&t=3&akid=2769%2E420207%2E79UXHz)**
Together,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230803-2769-footer&t=4&refcode2=2769_420207_79UXHz&akid=2769%2E420207%2E79UXHz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: You are invited to celebrate everything great about Wisconsin at our Corn Roast! | = | It’s that time of year! I want to invite you and your family to my Old-Fashioned Wisconsin Corn Roast. Come celebrate everything great about Wisconsin with some freshly roasted corn, grilled brats, drinks, and music! = = = Come out and join friends, neighbors and special guests at the La Crosse County Fairgrounds on August 30th. We look forward to seeing you there! Brad * Brad Pfaff represents Wisconsin State Senate District 32. As a proud son of the rolling hills, coulees, and valleys of northern La Crosse County where he was raised on his family's dairy farm, he's dedicated to finding commonsense solutions for our community's challenges. We can move Wisconsin forward, together. Thank you for being on our team, we really appreciate you, team! = Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about Brad's campaign to advocate for working families! However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails , or you can . | Paid for by Pfaff for State Senate Pfaff for Congress PO Box 684 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States

name: Cornel West 24
subject: Housing Justice is Within Reach - Stand with Us!
body:
Urgent Call for Affordable Housing

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=1)
---
Dear Peter - We are writing to you as concerned citizens who deeply care about our country's critical issue of affordable housing and homelessness. Dr. Cornel West, a passionate advocate for social justice and a firm believer in the power of community, fully supported the rent control legislation put forward by City Council member Kshama Sawant in Seattle this week. His [press release](https://www.cornelwest24.org/press_release_073123?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=2) on solidarity with the people of Seattle highlighted the urgency of this cause. However, the Seattle City Council, with eight out of nine members being Democrats, allowed this bill to fail on Tuesday, sending a disheartening message that they prioritize wealthy corporations over working people and the marginalized. Our nation is confronting an unprecedented housing crisis. Gentrification and soaring rents are pushing millions of hardworking Americans to the brink of financial ruin, with approximately 580,000 individuals facing homelessness and 18 million spending more than half of their income on housing. This growing crisis demands immediate action and solidarity from all of us. The failure of this legislation in Seattle should serve as a wake-up call to organize a broader national movement toward housing justice. We must come together to realize a fairer and more equitable society where affordable housing is not a distant dream but a fundamental right for all. We write to you today to request your support in this crucial endeavor. Every [contribution](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=3) counts, no matter how big or small. Please consider [donating $10](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=4) or whatever amount you can to support this cause. Your contribution will go a long way in making a positive impact and standing up for those who need it most. Join us in this critical journey towards housing justice, where everyone can find a safe and decent place to call home. We can create lasting change and build a brighter future for our communities. Sincerely, Team Cornel West [](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=5)[](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=6)[https://www.cornelwest24.org/](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=7)
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=8 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=8)
---
Cornel West for President · PO Box 796711, Dallas, TX 75379, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest24.org/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=9) Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.cornelwest24.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=housing_fundraiser&n=10). Build the Future.
---

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barrack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock you or scare you -- _I say it because it 's true._ _ _ _What we 're seeing today didn't happen overnight. It's no coincidence. It's no stroke of luck._ It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ** ** **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** ** ** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - the largest magazine of the radical Left.**** I marched,**** I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to**** fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them. ** ** I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ - and I want you to receive your very own copy of it. **[Today, I'm asking you to stand by me, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b342f60b3ca84e0ea2533f359ee03064&_e=VSRkeV7sOnc0FX8D9sr0_MEPGXsB9HuR-zh2G6fMuDLgQWrdXPok4ZM2jSWTGfcIChaUDpeJidy5qoPnOAEbdd92NVww0abPniC9IxFox4WDLBF7ejQWPyzhWo-f9WP3PNFIl_0pu_IhAJX8xC7GyNTs9cB4iRvh8muoDnChIjvcNRRrPaI_N5AsmtPgXwivnwKapYDajH-l6APcQaOSefHUbHfFpFthyfw6MsTjlt85mtEo3nP9HKWCc2Bra5t48OyVp3f9iCNCe6cj2douUrf8_Baeu8x352WjZN5tA77w9jceuHSWQxfigGFUiigQalykYmkiV0afZgVZP_D2C4OiqRgZlwF3CxEeAkm2apY_64wH58ayAnmJRGkJXPRacV533hGHA06XYhQJRnTDMg%3D%3D) And as a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of my book: _The Enemy Within._** When you think of The Enemy Within, you may think of Joe Biden, or Nancy Pelosi, or Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. **But make no mistake: the real mastermind is and always has been Barack Obama.** Because he laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. _ _ _He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs._ _ _ _He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage._ _ _ _And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we're seeing today has been over a decade in the making - and most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain what is happening in this battle now - how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... [ripped headline images] **" A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza** ** ** **" The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin** ** ** **" David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham** I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because we've reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[So if you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b342f60b3ca84e0ea2533f359ee03064&_e=VSRkeV7sOnc0FX8D9sr0_MEPGXsB9HuR-zh2G6fMuDLgQWrdXPok4ZM2jSWTGfcIChaUDpeJidy5qoPnOAEbdd92NVww0abPniC9IxFox4WDLBF7ejQWPyzhWo-f9WP3PNFIl_0pu_IhAJX8xC7GyNTs9cB4iRvh8muoDnChIjvcNRRrPaI_N5AsmtPgXwivnwKapYDajH-l6APcQaOSefHUbHfFpFthyfw6MsTjlt85mtEo3nP9HKWCc2Bra5t4oKPkrp70xnxuUE5Xd88KhNGPQBvpCiask7SW4u0g7HpGO27uc4kwA5QsM9ILxVeyYwVbXcFOv7e9bkm06vTgUntIIty16ZT7lHDnUZg-0f1Gk-NHWydjmIYQ_NXJAJngQpY7KttdMHj_nP-2TKAs7Q%3D%3D)** and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy _The Enemy Within._ Friend, the Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make it better -- they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform [it]." **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking, and our country is hanging by a thread. name: Donald J. Trump

body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | Friend, I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART. Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back. My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government. But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene. When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse. The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands. I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family." But that thought never even crossed my mind. I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving. Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option. So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into... ...I have since been INDICTED THREE TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning. They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man. Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man. But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God. The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny. So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign... ...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL CONTINUE TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024. We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it. We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY. Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you. But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Brad Finstad
subject: Proving why small businesses matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=eba5f6c14d6d4071b49397ac2b4802a5&_e=sroNxheE5uCJPtn0jhpWLBb4ixPpEd1Fe_7gFvG1-nyKp9-CbwE3YmrzJvBrEwsWEvsmnhTQluP92cHnnB1xBSTqG2tEsDGaS9ITeWQNq25bTO24V_zYT2hmKSse6EFpp9LWqoyIWw2ecOIgBq0mGIeAjdvZxB01wNVGu86YQybNbGQjdc_ZyS_wUWRXgfx20pRJw2IbL1if-Pd-9-r_hl8VsPTqSNqBq26FTHu1tmcDA7LIroeH0Be2xxtbPOuN)
---
Fellow Minnesotan, It's one thing to talk about supporting rural Minnesota's economy and small businesses. _**It's another to explain why it matters so much.**_ **More than 99% of all businesses in the U.S. are small businesses, and nearly half of American employees work for a small business.** When Republicans say **"We're fighting to protect small businesses from burdensome Democrat taxes and red tape,"** it's more than a campaign slogan... _**[it's about protecting America's economy!](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=eba5f6c14d6d4071b49397ac2b4802a5&_e=sroNxheE5uCJPtn0jhpWLBb4ixPpEd1Fe_7gFvG1-nyKp9-CbwE3YmrzJvBrEwsWEvsmnhTQluP92cHnnB1xBSTqG2tEsDGaS9ITeWQNq26YGU3l8XQQ6doeG18LRMmOqqsngKrb-1rRJqpD7eMHZvS02qu_S9qQAPiqfJjp9niKvxeDOR_JoUmUnNbqnTVJ-InJEXDLgQOnZbj6j1uhBojog1S5jRxthec3LVOe4SqVJmEOV-HU9Szvtj5LSPwW)**_ As a fourth-generation farmer, I know how challenging it can be to manage a small business. It's even more challenging when bureaucrats and politicians in D.C. are working overtime to make your job harder! **[I'm on a mission to support small businesses in Minnesota and our country.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=eba5f6c14d6d4071b49397ac2b4802a5&_e=sroNxheE5uCJPtn0jhpWLBb4ixPpEd1Fe_7gFvG1-nyKp9-CbwE3YmrzJvBrEwsWEvsmnhTQluP92cHnnB1xBSTqG2tEsDGaS9ITeWQNq245mC7HeXuwsNuIVtXZJeKZ1_B5yPSMPJ1ELhTI5lIKcj5iUNQ-8v-yd-Ax4HFVrBDBzhXYlC-6BKaiHD4qGCfv0ClMAX3Y8_cB0TA4cPiNdkaePd0C4IpGr5q316i4B1ByocU1fTwR_Pyz3DO4aagb)** **[Will you make a donation today to help me get our economy back on track and fight for small businesses?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=0a899ad0193f48d399298a3556652e7c&_m=eba5f6c14d6d4071b49397ac2b4802a5&_e=sroNxheE5uCJPtn0jhpWLBb4ixPpEd1Fe_7gFvG1-nyKp9-CbwE3YmrzJvBrEwsWEvsmnhTQluP92cHnnB1xBSTqG2tEsDGaS9ITeWQNq24oWmQXnCzfVToSGW65oCnp6p_sEUqhjkxaarxv-HTohl0oTGVe557wMPPVr_cKUejiWh7hDD5k3rDWGRpnhi6Zls7-ipRD8zH5xsv781ap8HiKWh89VEkmvM7x7Np8D61oqOFngDkBRbMwVV_AeswI)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow Minnesotan, It's one thing to talk about supporting rural Minnesota's economy and small businesses. It's another to explain why it matters so much. More than 99% of all businesses in the U.S. are small businesses, and nearly half of American employees work for a small business. When Republicans say "We're fighting to protect small businesses from burdensome Democrat taxes and red tape," it's more than a campaign slogan... As a fourth-generation farmer, I know how challenging it can be to manage a small business. It's even more challenging when bureaucrats and politicians in D.C. are working overtime to make your job harder! - Thank you for your support,Brad Finstad | | | | | | Paid for by Finstad for Congress | | | ---|---|---

subject: Ask Katie anything

body:
Katie will be answering as many questions as she can next week.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27538%2E3422442%2EeQZYws)
**[Derek, what questions do you have for Katie?](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp-email-20230803-survey/?source=EMAK03_1_SURV_20230803_V1_F&t=2&akid=27538%2E3422442%2EeQZYws)**
**[Submit a Question Here ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp-email-20230803-survey/?source=EMAK03_1_SURV_20230803_V1_F&t=3&akid=27538%2E3422442%2EeQZYws)**
Katie may be known for questioning witnesses in Congressional Hearings, but this week we’re flipping the script, and Katie will be answering as many questions as she can. Whether you have specific questions about our campaign or are wondering what Congress is up to, Katie and our team want to hear from you!
**[Submit a Question Here ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kp-email-20230803-survey/?source=EMAK03_1_SURV_20230803_V1_F&t=4&akid=27538%2E3422442%2EeQZYws)**
We’re able to do things like this because Katie doesn’t spend her time answering lobbyist questions—she answers to her constituents. She doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists, which is why your support is so critical.
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230803-1?refcode=EMAK03_1_SURV_20230803_V1_F&refcode2=27538_3422442_eQZYws&akid=27538%2E3422442%2EeQZYws)**
Thanks so much for being a part of our campaign.
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK03_1_SURV_20230803_V1_F&t=5&refcode2=27538_3422442_eQZYws&akid=27538%2E3422442%2EeQZYws)**

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: I can only do this with your continued support
body:
Team, I’m thrilled to let you know I just got off the phone with my finance team, and once again you _delivered._

We hit our end-of-month fundraising goal for July, which means our campaign is in a strong position to ramp up our outreach efforts and get my message to folks across our district. _Thank you._

It’s no secret I’m running to shake up Washington and the political status quo. For too long, our elected leaders recite empty promises, then opt for piecemeal legislation that does little or anything to deliver real change or help working people.

If we keep electing these same kinds of leaders, we will get the same results. With climate change, attacks on our bodily autonomy, anti-LGBTQ+ hate and bigotry, assaults on our democracy, and more, we cannot afford to keep allowing this cycle to repeat itself.

I know how high the stakes are, because as a renter, an immigrant, a Lesbian woman — I live them every single day. I’m not running to nibble around the edges. I’m running to fight for bold, transformational change and uplift the voices of those who’ve been marginalized and silenced.

I can only do it with your ongoing, continued support. Thank you immensely to everyone who donated or took action for our July end-of-month fundraiser – it means the world.

With gratitude,

Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom

_Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. clean_body: Team, I’m thrilled to let you know I just got off the phone with my finance team, and once again you delivered. We hit our end-of-month fundraising goal for July, which means our campaign is in a strong position to ramp up our outreach efforts and get my message to folks across our district. Thank you. It’s no secret I’m running to shake up Washington and the political status quo. For too long, our elected leaders recite empty promises, then opt for piecemeal legislation that does little or anything to deliver real change or help working people. If we keep electing these same kinds of leaders, we will get the same results. With climate change, attacks on our bodily autonomy, anti-LGBTQ+ hate and bigotry, assaults on our democracy, and more, we cannot afford to keep allowing this cycle to repeat itself. I know how high the stakes are, because as a renter, an immigrant, a Lesbian woman — I live them every single day. I’m not running to nibble around the edges. I’m running to fight for bold, transformational change and uplift the voices of those who’ve been marginalized and silenced. I can only do it with your ongoing, continued support. Thank you immensely to everyone who donated or took action for our July end-of-month fundraiser – it means the world. With gratitude, Sepi Shyne #WomanLifeFreedom Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. = = Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...

name: United We Dream via Blue Amp Action
subject: Have you heard about the big anti-immigrant bill in Florida?
body:
Send a message to Governor DeSantis
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20ef1e44-2e05-4a50-a1fb-c56a6d2fa6b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Peter, Earlier this year, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed SB 1718 into law - an awful list of policies that criminalizes and impacts immigrants in Florida and across the country. This harmful law sets a dangerous precedent, putting immigrants at risk of becoming the target of similar attacks in their home states. Here are a few things that are included in this bill:
* Providing transportation to undocumented people from outside Florida into the state is punishable by up to 15 years in prison, no matter whether they are family, friends or coworkers.
* Out-of-state driver licenses for undocumented people are no longer valid in Florida.
* Hospitals are now required to ask for a patient’s immigration status.

We all know the vital role that immigrants play in our communities, yet DeSantis and the Florida legislature are attacking every aspect of our lives through this harmful law. [Everyone should have the right to feel safe in Florida. Together, we have the collective power to create a Florida where immigrant families can live in certainty and without fear. Add your name and tell Governor DeSantis - there’s enough sunshine in Florida for all!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3747eeb5-6b8c-4879-ba4e-2c9824dc46cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96688748-d619-4b51-8191-5f89edb96c0b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| By taking away local government funding for community IDs and forcing hospitals to inquire about patients’ immigration status, DeSantis and the Florida legislature are pushing immigrants into the shadows. These policies not only impact immigrant lives but also affect all Floridians who work with, live with, and depend on immigrants. [These hateful policies have no place in Florida. Join us and add your name to send a message to Governor DeSantis - we won't stand for a dangerous anti-immigrant agenda, Florida should be a welcoming state for all residents!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5266f1b-e746-467b-8b5f-a90e32cfd34d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d74cea6-ec37-40bc-8d36-7b409f228d46/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

This harmful law sets a dangerous precedent, putting immigrants at risk of becoming the target of similar attacks in their home states. Here are a few things that are included in this bill: Providing transportation to undocumented people from outside Florida into the state is punishable by up to 15 years in prison, no matter whether they are family, friends or coworkers. Out-of-state driver licenses for undocumented people are no longer valid in Florida. Hospitals are now required to ask for a patient’s immigration status. We all know the vital role that immigrants play in our communities, yet DeSantis and the Florida legislature are attacking every aspect of our lives through this harmful law. | | | | | | By taking away local government funding for community IDs and forcing hospitals to inquire about patients’ immigration status, DeSantis and the Florida legislature are pushing immigrants into the shadows. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I’m more concerned with working for the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsa5O7FDhN

I know who I stand for and what I stand for. I'll never
compromise that.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osa5O7FDhN

Friend,

I
tend to go against the grain of public opinion. I am not the
darling of the political elite, and have never claimed or wanted
to be. I know who I stand for and what I stand for, and on these
points, I will never compromise.

In
case you haven't yet noticed, the legacy media despises this. The
radical Left is used to controlling lives and using the media to
get their way. Meanwhile, I am more concerned with protecting the
people I serve and restoring the state of this country that our
Founding Fathers envisioned.

That's why I stand up every day. I know that no matter how many
attacks are waged at me and my campaign, I am over the target,
and my work for the American people will not be stopped by the
political elites working with the legacy media to keep me from
upending the corruption across Washington.

Stand up with me

I
know that Americans are sick and tired of electing politicians
who make promises while they're campaigning and fail to deliver
on them when they get in office. I am tired of this too.

I
am fighting for hardworking Americans, because I've watched, I've
listened, and I have a clear vision of where to take our country.
The United States of America deserves to see real leadership at
the helm once again, and I believe I am the man for the job.

In
2024, there will be a new sheriff in town, and I have one message
for the DC elites, the media, the political class, and the
radical Left: buckle up.

The
attacks will only intensify from here, Friend. We near a pivotal
moment for the race: the first GOP debate. As we prepare for
this, I need your help. We need to start August out at the same
pace as we did July so we can stay ahead in this race and over
the target. Achieving this has never been more critical.

I
know that Biden's economy has made it difficult to prioritize
putting resources toward anything other than gas in the car,
groceries in the pantry, and food in front of your kids. That's
why I'm humbly requesting your help. I would never ask this of
you if it weren't this important, and I need you to know that
even the smallest donations go so far on this campaign. Your
support NEVER goes to waste. If you can chip in any amount, will
you join me?

DONATE
$10

DONATE
$20.24

DONATE
$47

DONATE
$75

DONATE
$100

DONATE
$250

DONATE ANY AMOUNT

I
need your support going into the next stage of this campaign. It
doesn't slow down from here, we are just getting started, and I
need you fighting with me.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can’t handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation.

| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kellyanne=20Conway?=
subject: REMINDER: Did you see this email from Eric? Fwd:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Wanted to make sure you saw this: | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12617151?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=b9c4f934d8&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Hello Peter,
---
| It’s Kellyanne Conway, I wanted to make sure you got this email from my friend Chairman Eric Underwood; I am really excited to meet you and other grassroots Republicans who are pushing our Republican party forward.

[Will I see you there?](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ae97abed7b&e=25844e23a8)
---
| Best,
Kellyanne Conway
---
|
---
| P.S. It’s not too late to**[ join NEGOP+ to give you access to this exclusive event.](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=87432f4e28&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| **\---------- Forwarded message ---------**
From: Chairman Eric Underwood <admin@ne.gop>
Date: Tue, Jul 11, 2023 at 11:20 AM
Subject: NEGOP-Group Kellyanne Conway would love to meet you!

Dear {Recipient/Fellow Republican},
---
| In just one month, NEGOP+ members will have the opportunity to hear from a woman who made history while working on Donald J. Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign.

**We are excited to organize this event for NEGOP+ members, as Nebraskans have a significant role to play as engaged voters in the Presidential primary election less than a year away!**

[**NEGOP+ Booster Club membership includes**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=fb7ae94af8&e=25844e23a8) a Booster Club Membership Card, a NEGOP+ Club Pin, free and discounted entry fees to NEGOP events, and a specialty Booster Club Item. This is a great time to kick-off your NEGOP+ membership with the opportunity to spend an evening with Kellyanne Conway!

**Event Details**
**Date:** August 18th
**Time:** 6:30 pm CT
**Location:** Divots Conference Center, 4200 West Norfolk Ave, Norfolk, NE 68701

**About Kellyanne Conway**
---
| |
---
Kellyanne Conway served as Campaign Manager of the come-from-behind victory of Trump-Pence 2016, making her the first woman in U.S. history to successfully helm a presidential campaign.

For nearly four years, Kellyanne served as Assistant to the President and Senior Counselor to the President at the White House, working on a range of issues affecting domestic and global policy.
---
| She is the Founder and former President of The Polling Company, Inc./WomanTrend a privately-held, woman-owned corporation she operated from 1995-2016.

She is one of the most quoted and noted pollsters on the national scene, having provided commentary on thousands of television shows on ABC, CBS, NBC, PBS, CNN, CNBC, MSNBC, HBO, Comedy Central, MTV, Fox News Channel, on the paid speaking circuit and for numerous radio shows and print stories. Throughout her multiple decades in market research, Kellyanne has provided primary research and advice for clients in all 50 states and has directed hundreds of demographic and attitudinal survey projects for statewide and congressional political races, trade associations, and Fortune 100 companies. Kellyanne is a “fully-recovered” attorney, licensed to practice law in four jurisdictions (Maryland, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and the District of Columbia). She holds a law degree, with honors, from George Washington University Law Center and completed her undergraduate studies at Trinity College and Oxford University.

Kellyanne has served on numerous boards and advisory councils. Her new business, KAConsulting, provides clients strategic advice, polling, and media training to corporate, political and nonprofit clients. Kellyanne is a Fox News Contributor. Her memoir, Here's The Deal, published in May of 2022, was a #1 New York Times bestseller. She is mom to four amazing teenagers.

**[Join NEGOP+ Today](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=b0935efa8f&e=25844e23a8)**
If you're not already a member, here's your perfect chance to become part of this impactful gathering of active Conservatives. Join the membership to ensure your place at this **Do Not Miss Event** , and stand alongside us as we strive to strengthen the Republican Party's influence in Nebraska!

---
| [BECOME A NEGOP+ MEMBER TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=6bb1b9ba8d&e=25844e23a8 "BECOME A NEGOP+ MEMBER TODAY »")
---
| We greatly appreciate your continued support and eagerly look forward to your participation as we work together to uphold our shared values.
---
| Best Regards,

Eric Underwood
Chairman
Republican Party of Nebraska
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=3ce38be586&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| | [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Nebraska Republican Party, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Nebraska Republican Party1610 N StLincoln, NE 68508-1871
[Add us to your address book](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=703ff26e54) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=72fdf24cb0&e=25844e23a8&c=703ff26e54).
---

That was our average donation in July, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign on February 21st, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. **Because of your support, we've not only qualified for this month's debate,_but the next one too!_**

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=94ce33f550cc49e1bedc952ad0f27f24&_e=jt8u7vhqC2E3GbYZGUxj2kK_fD0D1-ic4kG-fjxKWMPSSBNOjqJiCZlEaeu7-gOP8UnZmMcRJF_N8d7DTzuOIlq47lyfuanh4WBxjpd3Dt0J46-z5mbihjc0aQvUxt5vqh1HLqKU8s8w8McEc0ZCKU5z1GglkOSiHvszEqht-IPS8bdUql0uDZuUhUq3-ayQy466BJ1pQTPnpeQcaqcX5CzFyUgYKetrdvWOY36_ny505SIIcltlEIocci6VAKcIYgLCULP7Mjs8Pt9hGt8OXTArW_1hsXufRNr3qD1e3rM4idk9MOL-76aUaYZAKKr9GD1A8AwfZcldvLm3dhNZUIP8ynxUxugoTAXd2mkHxMMU81tUb4KyNTwYyYjau8czBHqE22E8jL9B5fgZia6NEQ%3D%3D)

July was a busy month. Both here in Wisconsin and out in D.C. I'm looking forward to traveling around the First Congressional District this August during the District Work Period. There’s no better place than Wisconsin in the summer. Below is a quick update from me on what I have been up to.
---
**_What's Going on in D.C._**
---
**Election Integrity**
I was proud to introduce the ACE Act this past month, which is the most conservative election integrity reform to be introduced in a generation. The ACE Act will ensure that states have the tools to implement common-sense measures that will strengthen voter confidence and participation. Some key voter integrity provisions include:
* Voter ID laws
* Greater election observer access
* Stops non-citizens from voting
* Annual voter list maintenance
* Ends unsolicited mailing of ballots to outdated lists

Learn more about the ACE Act by clicking [HERE](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=d7e31baed03d4f2d93127055bbd4ddf1&_e=7TYzf41wFcizYXrRK9WhLe5YJGK0xXHj2Fl537DWOuZMVOfnmAPTXDkASLGMGqs2ZLxPbcmns_6ehJ2UWb5J9dKBCZWPM5I1pN31tkMI4-wFknh7eHPPVxZhdBILvWdNMNhyzUM2jZVvdqtuH_GSsuJ90c58EZLJlY2BVF1l4veAWgg-KCztp08rtYyM2AElbOQwnvy7nm-qZZmaqe2oQMtwuaXXx0dinDXV-0_ryBCyqDu4hECO3m9IubcM-YZ4SxgXUklfVtufABUhLH5unNJRqmziUXJ26BBKgzvPWIndm8vf572FKgygm1iR4NJFj1wbqisv7nPMVD45Vy60Hg%3D%3D).

---
_**Around the District**_
---
**Parades**

clean_body: | July was a busy month. Both here in Wisconsin and out in D.C. I'm looking forward to traveling around the First Congressional District this August during the District Work Period. There’s no better place than Wisconsin in the summer. Below is a quick update from me on what I have been up to. What's Going on in D.C. Election Integrity I was proud to introduce the ACE Act this past month, which is the most conservative election integrity reform to be introduced in a generation. The ACE Act will ensure that states have the tools to implement common-sense measures that will strengthen voter confidence and participation. Some key voter integrity provisions include: Voter ID laws Greater election observer access Stops non-citizens from voting Annual voter list maintenance Ends unsolicited mailing of ballots to outdated lists Learn more about the ACE Act by clicking . Around the District Parades My team and I crisscrossed the district to celebrate the 4th of July. We stopped in Kenosha, Racine, Waterford, St. Francis, and Hales Corners. This past weekend I was in South Milwaukee for South Milwaukee Heritage Days. County Fairs This past weekend I had a great time at Rock County Fair and the Racine County Fair. It was great to catch up with old friends, and meet new ones! Looking For Volunteers** We can always use more volunteers! Please click if you’re interested in helping us out! I hope to see you around the district this August! On Wisconsin, Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

In this episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Doug Burgum, Governor of North Dakota and current US presidential candidate. He shares how growing up on a farm and working as chimneysweep instilled a set of values in him that led to his graduation from Stanford with an MBA, successful tenure building a major software company that he eventually sold to Microsoft, and his eventual election as Governor. He also describes his vision for the country and shares how the economy, energy, and our national security are connected.

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Just talked to my team:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Thank you, friends. My team just notified me that we met our July fundraising goal, and I want to take a moment to thank you for opening, reading, and chipping into our emails when you can. Because of grassroots supporters like you, our campaign has the resources to advocate in Washington for working families across central and southern Illinois. **Friend, I couldn’t be more grateful to stand with you in this fight, but with so many critical issues at stake, our work is just getting started.** Over the weeks and months ahead, we will not only be fighting to protect my seat but to expand access to affordable healthcare, strengthen Social Security, protect voting rights, restore reproductive freedom for all Americans, and so much more. None of this is possible without you, so once again, thank you for your support as we work toward making progress on these critical issues and building lasting change for families across our district. — Nikki | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67521530/420002833/-2053028736?refcode=AU_NJB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20230803_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzY5MzIxYy0xYjMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqgfvEywY5wFYKSlAkwZhDEdmL5h2piZHf3TeOj_ApI=)

clean_body: | Thank you, friends. My team just notified me that we met our July fundraising goal, and I want to take a moment to thank you for opening, reading, and chipping into our emails when you can. Because of grassroots supporters like you, our campaign has the resources to advocate in Washington for working families across central and southern Illinois. Friend, I couldn’t be more grateful to stand with you in this fight, but with so many critical issues at stake, our work is just getting started. Over the weeks and months ahead, we will not only be fighting to protect my seat but to expand access to affordable healthcare, strengthen Social Security, protect voting rights, restore reproductive freedom for all Americans, and so much more. None of this is possible without you, so once again, thank you for your support as we work toward making progress on these critical issues and building lasting change for families across our district. — Nikki | = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States ** | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Friend, will you personally endorse Ilhan?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
No one — not Ilhan Omar or anyone else — can take on the right-wing and the extremist Republicans alone.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=410%2E791427%2EXy-fhz)
Friends -
Thanks to the continued support of countless progressives like you — from Minnesota and across the country — Ilhan is proudly serving her third term fighting for our movement in Congress.
So far this year, thousands of people have added their name to say they're with Ilhan and the work she is doing in Congress on issues like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, an end to endless wars, workers' rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and for justice in all its forms.
But the truth is, we're going to need to continue building on this momentum if we want to turn these struggles into victories.
**That's why we're asking you to join us today:**
**[Will you add your name and personally endorse Ilhan Omar and our people-powered re-election campaign for Congress?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230803-personal-endorse/?source=em230803-1-t2&refcode2=410.791427.Xy-fhz&akid=410%2E791427%2EXy-fhz)**
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230803-personal-endorse/?source=em230803-1-t2&refcode2=410.791427.Xy-fhz&akid=410%2E791427%2EXy-fhz)**
Our team is made up of folks who step up to make phone calls, walk canvass shifts, and donate $5, $10, or even $25 to emails just like this that power our campaign to victory, and Ilhan and our entire team are so thankful for your support.
And although it may seem like a long way away, it's the groundwork we lay here early on that will mean victory in 2024.
That's why we're reaching out today — to get as many people to say they stand with Ilhan and believe in our people-powered campaign as we possibly can.
So what do you say?
**[Will you add your name to personally endorse Ilhan Omar today? We're looking for a LOT of signatures today, and are hoping yours is next on our list.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230803-personal-endorse/?source=em230803-1-t2&refcode2=410.791427.Xy-fhz&akid=410%2E791427%2EXy-fhz)**
**[ENDORSE ILHAN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em230803-personal-endorse/?source=em230803-1-t2&refcode2=410.791427.Xy-fhz&akid=410%2E791427%2EXy-fhz)**
Thanks for being a part of our campaign.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=410%2E791427%2EXy-fhz)**. The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. Team Mackenzie

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan’s first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It’s that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: “Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin.”

In Pennsylvania’s state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn’t just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

name: Zak Malamed
subject: We cannot get complacent.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
Unlike some of our opponents, I cannot self-finance my campaign. So I am going to continue to work hard to earn every dollar and every vote.
#
I wanted to reach out to say thank you.
I have always known that as a first-time candidate, our campaign’s viability would be judged in part by the amount of funds we are able to raise. And although we did well in the second quarter, I knew we would have to keep it up to win this race.
Summer is the hardest time to raise money, but you stepped up and for that I am incredibly grateful.
Unlike some of our opponents, I cannot self-finance my campaign. So I am going to continue to work hard every day between now and the election to earn every dollar donated and every vote cast. I hope I can count on your continued support as well.
**Because even though we just passed our July fundraising deadline, we are already looking toward our August goal next.**
[**If you are able to help us get a head start, pitch in $5 or anything you can today to help us keep building the movement it will take to defeat George Santos and flip NY-03.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230803?refcode=em20230803&amount=5&refcode2=356_8507__xB2YI&akid=356%2E8507%2E_xB2YI)
**[Donate $5 now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230803?amount=5&refcode=em20230803&refcode2=356_8507__xB2YI&akid=356%2E8507%2E_xB2YI)**
In partnership,
Zak Malamed

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: Protect Our Principles!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Peter I am incredibly grateful for your unwavering support, as it has been instrumental in propelling our campaign toward victory in November. Every step we take is a testament to the power of our collective efforts, and I want to stress tha
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/01000189bc493e7c-a4707fd3-6e3d-46d4-aa7a-3fe7b98fae0d-000000/CdMLYCEGb1Z9bHQQYYcfUvqBgbs=333)
---
| |
---
| Peter I am incredibly grateful for your unwavering support, as it has been instrumental in propelling our campaign toward victory in November. Every step we take is a testament to the power of our collective efforts, and I want to stress that now is not the time to slow down. Our conservative principles are facing a constant barrage of attacks, and we must stand strong together to protect the values that make Virginia great. Your contribution, no matter the amount, makes a tangible difference in our fight. Whether it's $20, $50, $100, or $500, each dollar brings us closer to a better Virginia. Our mission is clear: we must reach more voters, mobilize dedicated volunteers, and spread our message far and wide across the district. This election is of utmost importance, not just for us, but for the future of our beloved state. It's a critical moment where our voices matter the most. We have the chance to preserve the principles that have made Virginia a shining example of liberty, opportunity, and prosperity. As we navigate the challenges ahead, I assure you I won't back down or waver in our shared beliefs. Together, we will send a resounding message to the left: we stand united, and we are unwavering in our commitment to conservative values. I urge you to consider making a donation today. Your support is the driving force behind our campaign, and I'm truly humbled by your dedication to our cause. Together, let's leave no stone unturned, no door unknocked, and no opportunity untapped as we embark on this critical journey towards victory. This is our chance to show Virginia that we are the defenders of the principles that have shaped our state's success. Let's make our voices heard and stand united for the conservative values that have made Virginia a beacon of hope and progress. With heartfelt gratitude and determination,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator17th Senatorial District of VA(540) 645-8440

body:

Peter, PA’s Senate race is heating up:
→ A new ranking by Inside Elections has the PA Senate race as **one of the most competitive in the nation.** → CNN just updated their list of Top 10 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seats of 2024... **and they moved PA up on their list.** → HuffPost confirmed top Republicans are “aggressively recruiting” a mega-millionaire hedge fund executive to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat — **which could decide control of the Senate.**

subject: Mark Levin prosecutes Biden DOJ
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
body:
15 straight minutes of pure FIRE.

| [](https://links.ciscomaniforarizona.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=86c42c3199334e31a72fcdbf114a3d77&_e=LLvDQM9tR0xCFdV-tuMaq3vmlBugcEsvCVUESc0X4jpJhz0v0mFdroXl0nEOdIiZ5qfCayCR_6VIbblXeUH4zsmFDq7qW5DtiVVhG5ctDDMwXue7Ap-juq9BmbmT_KmpaRpMjmAiylagnK12dSTkuR9vDLNUTYKZ8Ke4O-mbRJ0TM2zY_2fWsdFDEQV6Lfk1A0lEP6eSBbJn2Y7QWaJG2fli5tBx_FYOs0IqnYi2lMSMibnXzfbdPRgeaUomLgc0Pr48Ib6KOkMU1HMLnizN4mPxrBATuFDiTReg4enH93hOkJrefMOMjJSCmX44S9Ys2sCFGK2LdYZ26G6AjAC3HSHyO_jt6FStp3guaWZL2m_v1cibWUeRYN7ChC5JvUgXukI7Jvwmfd8KGL3EYbZK6syv-j5iUpC_LvOKPBNXAXoig5KDNavIqcjx2-p-NbQP0WI9z7ZRdn9teTcXIBZS1Q%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
The Biden Administration’s failure to secure our border is devastating Arizona communities.
---
DHS Secretary, Alejandro Mayorkas, came to Arizona touting promises to secure our border and promoting Operation Blue Lotus, which targets fentanyl entering the United States.
---
**But just last month, illegal border crossings jumped 30%, and in June nearly $2 million worth of fentanyl was seized in southern Arizona.**
---
_Not to mention just this week the DEA Announced Arizona Has Become the Hub for Smuggling Fentanyl into the U.S._
---
**Mayorkas and the Biden administration have left border states and communities to shoulder this crisis alone while putting our citizens at risk.**
---
_It’s past time we hold this administration accountable for their failures and secure our border once and for all and I need your help._
---
[**Please add your name to my official petition to call for DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas’s resignation and DEMAND the Biden Administration SECURE OUR BORDER to protect our communities.**](https://links.ciscomaniforarizona.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=86c42c3199334e31a72fcdbf114a3d77&_e=LLvDQM9tR0xCFdV-tuMaq3vmlBugcEsvCVUESc0X4jpJhz0v0mFdroXl0nEOdIiZ5qfCayCR_6VIbblXeUH4zsmFDq7qW5DtiVVhG5ctDDMwXue7Ap-juq9BmbmT_KmpaRpMjmAiylagnK12dSTkuR9vDLNUTYKZ8Ke4O-mbRJ0TM2zY_2fWsdFDEQV6Lfk1A0lEP6eSBbJn2Y7QWaJG2fli5tBx_FYOs0IqnYi2lMSMibnXzfbdPRgeaUomLgc0Pr48Ib6KOkMU1HMLnizN4mPxrBATuFDiTReg4enH93hOkJrefMOMjJSCmX44S9YsImcnREqYCObnS05ad0H2ZDH-nMmQ6yyoileaP0YTzaST0Uo57Fe0nRBOAxMjMiG1bwaYco8ejafVIpE1HVGfgHHZ4Yqgs_ig9AEtqnGCvSRa3dZe620jOAGK1_ggP7ET5atUjvuOM7FmcosBH3PSqQ%3D%3D)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.ciscomaniforarizona.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=86c42c3199334e31a72fcdbf114a3d77&_e=LLvDQM9tR0xCFdV-tuMaq3vmlBugcEsvCVUESc0X4jpJhz0v0mFdroXl0nEOdIiZ5qfCayCR_6VIbblXeUH4zsmFDq7qW5DtiVVhG5ctDDMwXue7Ap-juq9BmbmT_KmpaRpMjmAiylagnK12dSTkuR9vDLNUTYKZ8Ke4O-mbRJ0TM2zY_2fWsdFDEQV6Lfk1A0lEP6eSBbJn2Y7QWaJG2fli5tBx_FYOs0IqnYi2lMSMibnXzfbdPRgeaUomLgc0Pr48Ib6KOkMU1HMLnizN4mPxrBATuFDiTReg4enH93hOkJrefMOMjJSCmX44S9YssZhJNNlhfz3fQvQ6UrqwSLrdT0x6DSeLmZFIx1328MIBs5YnJkaGnxwRGfsH1xyH-Fprg7kEOwWHbs35S00Uj1rVbKacUyKecjoUNnFdey5pDGT8TRZmdwoZ0s0QXWdaTD1cOtFpqiIbBvaW6i-ahg%3D%3D)
---

In July alone, Border Patrol apprehensions in the Tucson Sector hit the highest in 15 years, reaching 40,000.
---
_People are risking their lives to cross the border because they know they won’t be stopped as Mayorkas and Biden continue to make this border crisis worse._
---
_Their open-border policies have allowed cartel operations to increase, risked lives, left border communities to fend for themselves, and put Americans’ safety at risk every day._
---
I won’t stop fighting to secure our border and protect our communities and with you fighting alongside me, I know we will succeed.
---
[**So please, add your name to my official petition to call for DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas’s resignation and DEMAND the Biden Administration SECURE OUR BORDER to protect our communities.**](https://links.ciscomaniforarizona.com/u/click?_t=e146ab27d8454e4aa5fa55bf190d8558&_m=86c42c3199334e31a72fcdbf114a3d77&_e=LLvDQM9tR0xCFdV-tuMaq3vmlBugcEsvCVUESc0X4jpJhz0v0mFdroXl0nEOdIiZ5qfCayCR_6VIbblXeUH4zsmFDq7qW5DtiVVhG5ctDDMwXue7Ap-juq9BmbmT_KmpaRpMjmAiylagnK12dSTkuR9vDLNUTYKZ8Ke4O-mbRJ0TM2zY_2fWsdFDEQV6Lfk1A0lEP6eSBbJn2Y7QWaJG2fli5tBx_FYOs0IqnYi2lMSMibnXzfbdPRgeaUomLgc0Pr48Ib6KOkMU1HMLnizN4mPxrBATuFDiTReg4enH93hOkJrefMOMjJSCmX44S9Ys6gB3VbALamHzNcbqciTh3_7V_csRsOVVbmbhvMWlPUmc-Dn1JTtQSdXtmg2QLBH5m2JQQwgv1gbn2HMUyNTRQUwhC7mA5IMUJTvQO2H8FmnOnThX9n-chg56_Gju2jHzAn89FK-wU7oGw7zLljaTjg%3D%3D)
