[] Can you spare 30 seconds to take our Democratic Priorities Survey so we can craft a winning strategy, BEAT turnout records, and take back the House in 2024? >> [] BEGIN MY SURVEY >> [ [] TELL US: WHAT ISSUES MATTER MOST TO YOU HEADING INTO THE 2024 ELECTIONS? [] ⬜ Protecting Voting Rights ⬜ Passing Gun Safety Laws ⬜ Safeguarding Reproductive Rights ⬜ Investing in Infrastructure ⬜ Expanding LGBTQ+ Protections ⬜ Raising the Minimum Wage ⬜ Lowering Health Care Costs ⬜ Promoting Racial Justice and Police Reform ⬜ Investing in Education ⬜ Addressing Fair Housing ⬜ Growing the Economy and Jobs ⬜ Tackling Climate Change ⬜ Other [] BEGIN MY SURVEY >> [] Thank you! Shery Yang Director of Communications California Democratic Party DONATE » [] Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [] We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [] And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to unsubscribe: . [] [] [] [] Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. California Democratic Party 1830 9th St Sacramento, CA 95811 United States

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing.

| **Reverse 'money machines' popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=240209a8f9fa460f848fa64307df0af4&_e=70A-22u5cR_lviQDEVoQkaHacP0M8RwJyQ6s_-rokVC-b5O0VZuvtFy2RZjlbQjJY4D2vFNp3bVyA0NxJs_DZoM5Ih8wQ7q8-djgotLp6WWR0k04R7boGHnOftOGWCvnh_phCsOALSoLI8yoIYapfw1riiAwwOpNLladRB_lcQx-bFTESCVoW_2Xg93hSldoQiupTWGdMiyCkPo3JGu4NGt3hRf4ETzBYQOI571FaGxUWyMro0kZd19899BpQO36sYr-w4Qb7041FVPFzpwx183C5Kb_bjRaOi5cGwaSGmA%3D) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We've recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange'reverse ATMs.'](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=240209a8f9fa460f848fa64307df0af4&_e=70A-22u5cR_lviQDEVoQkaHacP0M8RwJyQ6s_-rokVC-b5O0VZuvtFy2RZjlbQjJY4D2vFNp3bVyA0NxJs_DZoM5Ih8wQ7q8-djgotLp6WWR0k04R7boGHnOftOGWCvnh_phCsOALSoLI8yoIYapf3A73M0hTEF2JAixn8o-wRSqrpHNy_ncK0oU3B_aVHQYzhLq_gZ6ytWkohlNEsIgKwkX7KskPWELfJ1B1A8li7MFupJesL57gDGOnY6B3dxZQtzZB4iv0Hf6eyXByxpM7rKg3NOm_RA8w0EEi7T4tyE%3D)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=240209a8f9fa460f848fa64307df0af4&_e=70A-22u5cR_lviQDEVoQkaHacP0M8RwJyQ6s_-rokVC-b5O0VZuvtFy2RZjlbQjJY4D2vFNp3bVyA0NxJs_DZoM5Ih8wQ7q8-djgotLp6WWR0k04R7boGHnOftOGWCvnh_phCsOALSoLI8yoIYapfwC5fDtcUHnxLIcUazdf_ZY2c7N-BvG5mPcgY3erwTv2Z9p54WNz600BuHDaAV4Rwkdb-9dpexIq1CQ6u0AZbNQGw7_yyWfdirI6lrZEFV3MghpS55U5QPQJOvBn8EkCoZ1u2cXl5WcD9YQKPaHOZKE%3D)**
---

Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We've recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Dan Goldman
subject: It's been a while, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
I’m excited to get started in Congress, and to begin a new email program. |
#
---
Peter, I’m honored to write to you today as Congressman for New York’s Tenth Congressional District. I know it’s been a while since you engaged with our emails, but I’m proud to say that we’re moving full steam ahead to deliver for New Yorkers and defend our democracy. From holding George Santos accountable for his scheme to defraud voters to serving as a bulwark for our democracy from MAGA Republicans who are working to obstruct justice for political gain; from introducing legislation to invest $32 billion for capital repairs at NYCHA developments across New York to increasing mental health care access to underserved communities, we are hard at work fighting for our families, our freedoms and our future. Yet none of this would be possible without grassroots supporters like you who did their part to realize our shared pragmatic and progressive vision for New York and America. I can’t thank you enough. Knowing that you have my back makes it possible for my team and I to lead these fights, take on Republican overreach and propaganda, and focus relentlessly on the work ahead of us in Washington and in NY-10. **[So Peter, if you’re with me, click below to confirm your information and receive the latest updates from me and my team. I’d be honored to have you with us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67523870/420011118/-1271475391?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_REA_PET_INAu_202308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTgyNzIxOS0yMDMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=58eBb1Kz4EfiEZFKHpEurZ8eRY-iH4JSwi_mA0wz750=&emci=09056df0-27ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=09827219-2032-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=13556823)** | [CONFIRM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67523871/420011119/-1271475391?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_REA_PET_INAu_202308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTgyNzIxOS0yMDMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=58eBb1Kz4EfiEZFKHpEurZ8eRY-iH4JSwi_mA0wz750=&emci=09056df0-27ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=09827219-2032-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=13556823)
---
As I begin my new role in Congress, I am also excited to begin a new and different email program that will include fewer emails with greater depth and substance so that you, my committed supporter, can get a better sense of what I’m actually doing in New York City and Washington so that you know what you are supporting by helping me lead these critical efforts to protect our democracy and serve the American people.
And I want to do that without contributing to the flood of political emails that are cluttering our inboxes and always tell us how “the sky is falling.”
**[So Peter, click here to confirm your information if you’re ready to join us again. We’re just getting started.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67523872/420011120/-1271475391?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_REA_PET_INAu_202308_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTgyNzIxOS0yMDMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=58eBb1Kz4EfiEZFKHpEurZ8eRY-iH4JSwi_mA0wz750=&emci=09056df0-27ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=09827219-2032-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=13556823)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Sticking it to criminals
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/sticking-it-to-criminals?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| From day one, our campaign has been about sticking it to criminals. That means we help our next sheriff and police departments to put criminals in jail and keep them there. As DA, we will do that by:
* Fire-walling our stateline and sending a clear message to criminals that DeSoto County is not their playground. Criminals can stay in Memphis or go to prison, but the days of threatening our property values and livelihoods will be over.

* Defending our defenders by fighting for them and defending the decisions they make to deter crime, so they can do their job of protecting and serving our citizens.

* Stopping dangerous drugs like fentanyl from pouring into our communities and devastating families. That is why I will issue a moratorium against illegal drugs and drug dealers in DeSoto County on day one, and work in total cooperation with various departments to stop drug use and distribution inside our county.

* Advocating for stricter DUI and prosecution standards. Mississippi’s convoluted and outdated DUI laws put families at risk. Loop holes exist for repeat offenders that enables them to avoid some of the harsher penalties for felony driving under the influence arrests. While it is up to the legislature to pass laws, I will work closely with our delegation to help re-write stricter DUI laws for adoption at our State Capitol so those on the road are safe.

* Protecting parental rights. Our children are our greatest asset. That is why, I will stand with parents to ensure they remain the primary decision-makers for their family in DeSoto County.

* Accelerating justice and better serve victims by modernizing the office to run like a business, and speed up the wheels of justice. The days of victims waiting several years for closure and justice to be served (sometimes three and half years) will end.

* Increasing transparency by increasing communication between the office and the public, so we can stay informed on matters of public interest, and see our tax dollars in action.

I appreciate the role our law enforcement officials play in keeping our communities safe, and I am committed to working with them to deal with crime and put the perpetrators behind bars. **August 8th** is almost here, and I humbly ask for your vote of confidence in my plan to punish criminals and protect our honest, hardworking citizens.
---
| [READ MATTHEW'S FULL PLAN](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=78bd0d65fe&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=3a8f323596&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=b999ef9fcc&e=3c5d31b5ad)_
---
| |
---

**Meet Matthew Barton**
---

Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up.
After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award.
In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant.
During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation.
As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi.
Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year.
Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools.
| | | | | | | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=a47b8edaef&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=de9d4cc377&e=3c5d31b5ad)

clean_body: | | | | | | From day one, our campaign has been about sticking it to criminals. That means we help our next sheriff and police departments to put criminals in jail and keep them there. As DA, we will do that by: Fire-walling our stateline and sending a clear message to criminals that DeSoto County is not their playground. Criminals can stay in Memphis or go to prison, but the days of threatening our property values and livelihoods will be over. Defending our defenders by fighting for them and defending the decisions they make to deter crime, so they can do their job of protecting and serving our citizens. Stopping dangerous drugs like fentanyl from pouring into our communities and devastating families. That is why I will issue a moratorium against illegal drugs and drug dealers in DeSoto County on day one, and work in total cooperation with various departments to stop drug use and distribution inside our county. Advocating for stricter DUI and prosecution standards. Mississippi’s convoluted and outdated DUI laws put families at risk. Loop holes exist for repeat offenders that enables them to avoid some of the harsher penalties for felony driving under the influence arrests. While it is up to the legislature to pass laws, I will work closely with our delegation to help re-write stricter DUI laws for adoption at our State Capitol so those on the road are safe. Protecting parental rights. Our children are our greatest asset. That is why, I will stand with parents to ensure they remain the primary decision-makers for their family in DeSoto County. Accelerating justice and better serve victims by modernizing the office to run like a business, and speed up the wheels of justice. The days of victims waiting several years for closure and justice to be served (sometimes three and half years) will end. Increasing transparency by increasing communication between the office and the public, so we can stay informed on matters of public interest, and see our tax dollars in action. I appreciate the role our law enforcement officials play in keeping our communities safe, and I am committed to working with them to deal with crime and put the perpetrators behind bars. August 8th is almost here, and I humbly ask for your vote of confidence in my plan to punish criminals and protect our honest, hardworking citizens. | | | | | Matthew Barton Sent from my iPhone PS: If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - | | Meet Matthew Barton Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up. After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award. In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant. During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation. As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi. Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year. Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © | Matthew Barton for District Attorney | All rights reserved. Our mailing address is:** P.O. Box 48 Hernando, Mississippi 38632 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: House Republicans have made their priorities clear
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
We are now more than halfway through the first year of the House Republican majority, and we see clearly their priorities, their policies, and their politics. And we know they are out of step with the majority of Americans—including many Republicans.
I’m proud of all I was able to do for TX-07 and our country, including reintroducing bills to restore access to abortion care and protect the right to travel out of state for that care, as well as delivering funding for important TX-07 projects that improve our infrastructure and support Black maternal health.
Recently, we’ve seen House Republicans’ priorities in action in proposed spending bills and must-pass legislation. Rather than work to address real issues, they’ve added divisive and dangerous provisions to previously bipartisan bills to deny essential funds for residency programs in children’s hospitals that provide gender-affirming care, eliminate community project funding for LGBTQI+ community centers, and ban funding for reproductive health care for members of the military and their families. Yes, while American men and women in uniform fight for our freedoms, House Republicans are voting to take theirs away.
This is politics—not leadership. But it is what we see and will continue to see if House Republicans are in charge. House Democrats are fighting their bad ideas every step of the way.
What House Democrats can do right now is limited. But what we can do to take back the House is not. We can and must do all we can every day from now to next November so we can return to responsible leadership that’s focused on getting the things done that Americans want done.
And we know what that will be. We only have to look back to see what happens with House Democrats in charge: investments in and protections for America and Americans.
Together, we’re going to keep fighting for our values, our freedoms, and our fellow Americans—and that’s why I am so grateful you’re part of #TeamLizzie and for your time, energy, and contributions to our campaign.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie_signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable

| |

| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

| | | Donald Trump is being arraigned **today** for [brand new criminal charges](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14ee1c00-7526-497e-9560-5870160d46ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), this time for his attempt to overturn the 2020 election. Special Counsel Jack Smith is asking for the trial to start quickly, but Trump and his lawyers are once again [trying to delay](https://default.salsalabs.org/T14b88177-7ec9-465e-b96b-f3e1f756a1c9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) it beyond the election. **Delay is not an option. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080323_GOPmajority&amount=20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080323_GOPmajority&amount=20]
Hola Peter,
In a moment, we’re going to tell you why this campaign is so important in protecting our rights and our democracy, but if you’re ready to join the fight, can you chip in $20 or whatever you are able to help send Marjorie Taylor Greene, Kevin McCarthy, and the rest of the GOP majority packing in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080323_GOPmajority&amount=20]
Working families across Arizona are dealing with some very real challenges. The climate crisis, the housing crisis, health care access, and so much more.
But what are Republicans doing to solve those challenges?
I think we both know the answer to that question: NOTHING.
So, what issues are Republicans in Congress prioritizing?
They’re trying to cut food assistance for babies, they’re trying to end free lunches for school children in need.
They’re bringing their culture wars into the military by attacking abortion access and medical care for transgender folks in our military. They’re banning diversity training.
And now they’re planning to impeach President Biden?!
We need to send the GOP Majority packing in 2024.
Working families deserve better than the GOP circus we see coming out of Washington, D.C.
Raquel has challenged MAGA Republicans time and time again here in Arizona, and won. We need to take our fight to Washington D.C, because Arizona’s working families deserve better. Contribute $20 to help our grassroots campaign make it to Congress >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_080323_GOPmajority&amount=20]
A ganar,
Team Terán

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=x_subheader]

name: Trump Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: Here’s why Fox News is going all-in for Trump
body:
A startling new poll shows that over 90% of Fox viewers don’t think Trump has committed serious crimes.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1328%2E120351%2EuoS_q4)
Since Trump's indictment, Fox News has gone on offense for his alleged criminal scheme to overturn the 2020 election. Following Trump’s lead, everyone from Sean Hannity to Tucker Carlson’s replacement Jesse Watters has attacked the Justice Department and echoed Trump’s claims that the indictment is a political witchhunt from the Biden administration.
It’s like 2020 all over again, Peter.
We’ll explain a bit more about what we mean in just a moment, but **here’s the gist:**
[**Fox News is undermining our democracy and spreading misinformation to drive higher ratings. Our local newsrooms are fighting back by correcting the record and reaching the online audiences that are most vulnerable to Fox’s misinformation. Please help us keep up this vital work by contributing $5 today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230803?refcode=em20230803&amount=5&refcode2=1328_120351_uoS_q4&akid=1328%2E120351%2EuoS_q4)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230803?refcode=em20230803&amount=5&refcode2=1328_120351_uoS_q4&akid=1328%2E120351%2EuoS_q4)**
Remember what happened after the 2020 election, Peter?
Trump lost, and even though Fox News personalities like Carlson and Hannity knew that election fraud claims were bogus, they pushed the lies anyway to drive ratings.
**The result was that even today, vast majorities of Republicans believe the 2020 election was stolen.** And, a new poll shows that over 90% of Fox viewers think Trump is the victim right now and that the grave charges against him aren’t serious.1
With Trump running away with the Republican Presidential nomination, Fox News is following the same destructive playbook. They’ll push Trump’s lies and help him undermine the investigation, and ratings will stay high.
**The good news is that this time around, our local news teams are ready to fight back.**
Our dedicated reporters counter bad information from Fox News in real time with fact-based journalism published in the online spaces where misinformation spreads. **We can win the fight to protect our democracy from Fox News and right-wing bad actors, but we can’t do it alone.**
[**Our work has never been more impactful at a historic moment like this. Will you chip in $5 to power our team?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230803?refcode=em20230803&amount=5&refcode2=1328_120351_uoS_q4&akid=1328%2E120351%2EuoS_q4)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230803?refcode=em20230803&amount=5&refcode2=1328_120351_uoS_q4&akid=1328%2E120351%2EuoS_q4)**
Thank you,
Courier Newsroom
1 - [The New York Times](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3766?t=2&akid=1328%2E120351%2EuoS_q4)
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1328_120351_uoS_q4&akid=1328%2E120351%2EuoS_q4)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1328%2E120351%2EuoS_q4)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: Rubio, Marco
subject: Ignore if you can’t handle this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
Please read this message to the end, but only if you’re prepared to handle the reality of our situation.

| |
---
| | | It's Marco. Please read this message to the end, but only if you're prepared to handle the reality of our situation. With only about 30% of folks opening these messages, I believe that by opening this, you're someone who can handle it. I know it's hard to tell fact from fiction these days, but I'm going to level with you and tell you the truth.

On top of only about 30% of our friends opening these messages, only about 1% will go the extra mile by donating. Conservatives like me rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to raise money for our cause, so I'm humbly asking you to read this all the way through. If you still think your $1 doesn't matter, then I want to simply thank you for hearing me out.

**Here's the truth...**

The Democrats stopped our Red Wave in 2022, and we need every little bit if we want to fund the programs needed to win in 2024 - and we need it today.

I don't have deep-pocketed billionaires I can call on to hit these goals. I rely on a couple of bucks here and there from hard-working Americans receiving these messages when they can afford it.

**If everyone reading this chipped in just a little bit, we would be able to reach our goals and keep up with the Democrats' millions raised. I know it's not much, but all I need from you today is the price of a cup of coffee, a candy bar, or a donut.**
---
| | [I'LL CHIP IN, MARCO!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z67i3oglo41sl1fqv83etmeerdbhb6rsu54jp36o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ie1oj6clh2bs "I’LL CHIP IN, MARCO!")
---
_**[The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8qug5467u137k7n5tdrgo02rh75v99de4picqvo_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ie1oj6clh2bs "The Democrats rely on megadonors who give thousands at a time, but I rely on folks like you who can give $10, $13, or even $26.25 to fuel our fight to restore the American Dream.")**_
_Democrats are hoping I give up on you.

They're hoping you give up on me.

They're hoping both of us give up on conservative values altogether._
We can't let them run this country into the ground. I'm rolling up my sleeves and continuing to fight for hard-working families like yours - making our country better, stronger, and safer.

_I hope you don't give up on me or our shared values._ A lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake if you ignore this.

**If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.**

**But if you think we need to get this country back on track and the American Dream restored, please donate whatever you can afford by midnight!**
---
| | [DONATE NOW >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3irjudprrc8noc1oh2jgchqhr7lsi8bot8npn68_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ie1oj6clh2bs "DONATE NOW")
---
| Thank you so much for hearing me out.
---

---
Marco Rubio

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr3ibeb9evs14btf41khnma654e8ebaj3docilm0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ie1oj6clh2bs)
---

You can claim a signed copy of Marco Rubio's new book, _Decades of Decadence_ , today!
| [CLAIM A SIGNED COPY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf5eforns93luovq7e6g207q1qu3tuc1lu62jt50_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ie1oj6clh2bs "CLAIM A SIGNED COPY")
---

These signed versions are only available to top conservatives, and you are one of them. We don't want you to miss out on this awesome opportunity.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqq5t5fj2du47tbf18mlgmivp7eftll1kvkhaa18_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ie1oj6clh2bs "The Democrats Agenda: Abolish the filibuster, increase taxes, open the border. Stop the radical Democrats:")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztre7nu2pgr5u9o7n9qhh4omu4b0or8c4tushvv0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ie1oj6clh2bs "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs4lim32rqvlfvhcuv0o7kci3m8fl2f08kvd67f8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c1ie1oj6clh2bs "STOP THE DEMS")

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: censure vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Folks,
Earlier this year, Kevin McCarthy took up the resolution attacking me for holding Trump accountable.
After Trump threatened a primary challenge against any Republican who refused to vote for it, MAGA Republicans officially passed their resolution to censure me. Why? Because I upheld my oath of office and held Donald Trump accountable for his many abuses of power.
They will never silence me — not now and not ever — but I need your help to fight back. With just a few days until our end-of-month deadline, every dollar counts. If you can, split an urgent $10 contribution to Seth Moulton and our campaign right now to help us respond to this unprecedented political attack and show the strength of our campaign. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
We face many pressing challenges as a country — affordable housing, access to health care, creating jobs, and so much more. Instead of addressing any of these challenges, Kevin McCarthy chose to take up this MAGA effort to distract from Donald Trump’s legal problems. They will never stop doing his bidding.
We've already known that the GOP is completely unhinged and beholden to Donald Trump.
With his call now to imprison me and primary any Republican who didn’t vote to censure me, Trump is telling the entire Republican Party that they must seek retribution against me politically and do whatever they can to prevent me from being elected to the Senate. This is not just a political stunt to rile up the MAGA base — it’s an attack on all accountability and constitutional oversight.
But make no mistake: If they thought this was going to deter me from holding Trump and his accomplices accountable or delivering real results for California and our nation, they thought wrong. I will not stop my fight to put truth and our democracy first — even if it means standing up to a twice-impeached ex-president and his lackeys.
With Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans ramping up their attacks against me, and our EOM deadline coming up, I’m going to need you by my side more than ever. Will you split a grassroots donation of $10 to help Seth Moulton and me stand up to the GOP’s attacks? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
MAGA Republicans may have voted to censure me, but I will always use my voice to hold them accountable. No matter what political retribution they throw at me next.
Let’s work together to push back against these attacks on our democracy.
Thank you,
— Adam

name: Pro Life Update
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmodrbc491vud2r9808j1gsjrqnhj638rkgaqst0_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg60o32cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztrlqnopm943q1163e72fpevankan8trlia453p0_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg60o32cdh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmvcqi434o9ddt24bs2vj1drhva92349ckjh2l60_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg60o32cdh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0ur9e0dog032ktdetnpbd68bngcdroh5uhgm158_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg60o32cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd6gtg9me7587pi87jidfp97lnls3uqdhek2q4o8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68ob3cljm4oh1k8gn48n24hhm9p34c1g60oj3c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1j4g9auv2kp0ekaoqel4v77cketii5lkh0su518_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg60o32cdh2bs)_

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Fmr. Trump Advisor Shares Warning for President Biden
body:
I'm a former economic advisor to President Trump - during one of the greatest economic booms in history...

| **NOTE:** Brad Thomas is a multi-millionaire, NYU adjunct professor, and former economic advisor to President Trump. Today, he's shown over 100,000 Americans how to take advantage of a little-known IRS "payout" loophole to support their retirement.
* * *
Dear Reader, I'm a former economic advisor to President Trump - during one of the greatest economic booms in history... [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe18fdbea5854a66b0f0c05d243152a2&_e=BhXXAvMOgbJrY7f4Nd_9A83_JeRaLD7Ycf9Bq07WJO9t7CpvgCYTMrQkubNrSNGcltNdpxu9LUVa9eFwPtrSWfeAEg0-aLva-h1nGRQW_m2AH9Unod0ty2yfMhlsZJam448IBhHkk8hVaJGweswS-QT3MByqZ1VmgqGoUPzwDBilOjHPqy2dQRTc3mLzwVZQe66uOlOaI_-9x87OmMyGLhWhK1dVW5vyhTsaXjTaQvvVkqEiu9axXTJd4ep0RKfIb5vA66eEHuHiJeEDsmmJttO0UCKDGLTdg4L9r7ce8hE%3D) And I've been asked to share my expertise with officials at the highest levels of our government and economic communities... Including former Congressmen, high-ranking military officers, Ivy League PhDs, even a chief executive from NASA... Today, I'm issuing a special warning to President Biden - and all Americans... I recently released a new presentation - recorded in a warehouse studio near Mar-a-Lago... To discuss something I believe every American has the right to know... I'm talking about [an IRS "payout" loophole](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe18fdbea5854a66b0f0c05d243152a2&_e=BhXXAvMOgbJrY7f4Nd_9A83_JeRaLD7Ycf9Bq07WJO9t7CpvgCYTMrQkubNrSNGcltNdpxu9LUVa9eFwPtrSWfeAEg0-aLva-h1nGRQW_m2AH9Unod0ty2yfMhlsZJam448IBhHkk8hVaJGweswS-f_YC3IvKnIvFGr5b6BK7nu-79zGFB7ww9ou1iLAEouwq6CbJxqz3uO0PlZyg5SavD9uDOZgq6Yp1jk_1ciSbiSDN2hFrbHLHZgL_VxI8zXwdAZfF0L0wtRHg6kOgH1aIVeD-w1Q1h9na0svQU96hKQ%3D) that allows regular Americans to collect legally mandated payouts - up to $10,000 or more - connected to America's biggest companies like Amazon... name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: $7 for 7 special elections:
body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| | **$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have _seven_ special elections on the horizon in critical states like Pennsylvania, New Hampshire, and Tennessee – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44f7c097cd014222be73af146b5c80f5&_e=p76xLaPQBXzo73Ab4XamWUzQvNlj4CjjXHM6PqW9TvLw3_yeQfHnva_-z6xGYwfhFF8Tm_-WKQZRYVf8MshHL94PDycMcVb9nnXlacyMdxok9kVuvWATsrYE_uar0wMC5X10OMDCEYd8LdhLSMpqJqSn_RlA8GfEFUlIP9_H5x5f6H8DlM-b4sF95W2VcBYRfLB1o7GGxgdfUo1UsoFrgI8OOinEnviil6kRX67GvFKES0e27lYI2uoGg3CShJX_RvSgHwbYJyyI8d_waNVdbqqcIQg17TiBLmynb2NWiVd5gh5KhtHvYvg0An7nVAnwn7xB0M5jTQrOG9AOoGP8fU0fHUYf1kLE5z40haWKhB6SOk_CzU_bnFgqL_PJOYzLdkQxxO7MlTPCMWmUCeNEm2x5WKdGjLMHkmZbNYYyesY%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44f7c097cd014222be73af146b5c80f5&_e=p76xLaPQBXzo73Ab4XamWUzQvNlj4CjjXHM6PqW9TvLw3_yeQfHnva_-z6xGYwfhFF8Tm_-WKQZRYVf8MshHL94PDycMcVb9nnXlacyMdxok9kVuvWATsrYE_uar0wMC5X10OMDCEYd8LdhLSMpqJqSn_RlA8GfEFUlIP9_H5x5f6H8DlM-b4sF95W2VcBYRfLB1o7GGxgdfUo1UsoFrgI8OOinEnviil6kRX67GvFKES0e27lYI2uoGg3CShJX_RvSgHwbYJyyI8d_waNVdblHMXmGOfuL-DDAuyf2zrvTre6_dkxfxwFiNjG4JfOQvnRE93ESBcj_NRVC-Zy3WqUPM7l9UCAwJT-EWzRZn41UUPmSjZTidywdsuxiO_uhzdaZWSlUhJRdgpkhtbZnG3UblCs5dJUwo8afeBd8uWKM%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44f7c097cd014222be73af146b5c80f5&_e=p76xLaPQBXzo73Ab4XamWUzQvNlj4CjjXHM6PqW9TvLw3_yeQfHnva_-z6xGYwfhFF8Tm_-WKQZRYVf8MshHL94PDycMcVb9nnXlacyMdxok9kVuvWATsrYE_uar0wMC5X10OMDCEYd8LdhLSMpqJqSn_RlA8GfEFUlIP9_H5x5f6H8DlM-b4sF95W2VcBYRfLB1o7GGxgdfUo1UsoFrgI8OOinEnviil6kRX67GvFKES0e27lYI2uoGg3CShJX_RvSgHwbYJyyI8d_waNVdbta_mov9gQFuModhvOcos4ssLq6DSFbW04DC-afBKcQ87GOuui1DxKym0Wp9d1h94WY2VD0yVqyctEwXf5TspkRJTfMksk9XhmezlpQaZ1rPXQuJTb1-yeEOgMdzb5lwkHxeK2ZROtFr4OOMDdhIPLw%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44f7c097cd014222be73af146b5c80f5&_e=p76xLaPQBXzo73Ab4XamWUzQvNlj4CjjXHM6PqW9TvLw3_yeQfHnva_-z6xGYwfhFF8Tm_-WKQZRYVf8MshHL94PDycMcVb9nnXlacyMdxok9kVuvWATsrYE_uar0wMC5X10OMDCEYd8LdhLSMpqJqSn_RlA8GfEFUlIP9_H5x5f6H8DlM-b4sF95W2VcBYRfLB1o7GGxgdfUo1UsoFrgI8OOinEnviil6kRX67GvFKES0e27lYI2uoGg3CShJX_RvSgHwbYJyyI8d_waNVdbsLu5GVP2OrooN70kl2VGJcsadkftg_xijbEuhhJFSjey2UpE841kSIMBk0PCroDexQcDvIxw7LK2lgQdvASfUJ7nfo9X51vmM06ynx7E_dcGqwEkRkomiW_eMAw7o8HHHiq5Zf99qitWHIlex-Bz5Q%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

clean_body: The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. | | | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its . Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans? Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Urgent Redistricting Update
subject: the latest news from Alabama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
a former judge said “I have absolutely no faith”
|
---

Here’s the latest update on redistricting in Alabama – | **First,** the U.S. Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s congressional maps, ruling that the maps violated the Voting Rights Act by illegally discriminating against Black voters.

**But then, a former judge warned that the Court’s ruling would _not_ be enough to ensure that Alabama’s new maps will fairly represent Black voters. He said, “I have absolutely no faith that the Alabama Legislature is going to do the right thing. It never has.”**

**Now,** his prediction has already come true: Instead of complying with the Court's order, Alabama Republicans instead passed a _second_ map that also violates the VRA.
---
[**_Team, now is not the time to take a victory lap. Instead, we must continue fighting for fair maps – not just in Alabama, but all across the country. This isn’t just about Alabama, team. According to experts, the recent SCOTUS ruling could lead to more states like Georgia, Louisiana, and others being required to redraw their racially-discriminatory maps before the next election. **_But if GOP lawmakers run out the clock, they could keep manipulated maps in place!_**

Last year, courts struck down the Ohio legislature’s manipulated maps. But rather than draw new, fair maps, Republicans instead resubmitted gerrymandered maps _seven more times_. Left unchecked, we can count on Republicans in states like Alabama and Louisiana to employ a similar strategy.

[**_That’s why the NDRC is not backing down – instead, we’ll keep fighting until we’ve secured fair maps in every corner of the country. clean_body: a former judge said “I have absolutely no faith” | Here’s the latest update on redistricting in Alabama – | First, the U.S. Supreme Court struck down Alabama’s congressional maps, ruling that the maps violated the Voting Rights Act by illegally discriminating against Black voters. But then, a former judge warned that the Court’s ruling would not be enough to ensure that Alabama’s new maps will fairly represent Black voters. He said, “I have absolutely no faith that the Alabama Legislature is going to do the right thing. It never has.” Now, his prediction has already come true: Instead of complying with the Court's order, Alabama Republicans instead passed a second map that also violates the VRA. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = This isn’t just about Alabama, team. According to experts, the recent SCOTUS ruling could lead to more states like Georgia, Louisiana, and others being required to redraw their racially-discriminatory maps before the next election. But if GOP lawmakers run out the clock, they could keep manipulated maps in place! Last year, courts struck down the Ohio legislature’s manipulated maps. But rather than draw new, fair maps, Republicans instead resubmitted gerrymandered maps seven more times. Left unchecked, we can count on Republicans in states like Alabama and Louisiana to employ a similar strategy. = = A.G. Holder hit the nail on the head when he said “Republicans are making it clear that they will do whatever it takes – even if it means eroding our federalist system as we know it – to circumvent the will of the people so they can lock in their own power.” = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: ATTN: What this means for our campaign -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Peter,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Peter, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA - for 1,500% impact.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._sE8wm3eQ)**
[CONTRIBUTE $1 >>](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._JCkEf0xuQ)
---

Thank you and God bless you,

Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States

body:
Adding insult to injury. . .

Adding insult to injury. . . | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b0f01fb42da3466d9954d69458f7713d&_e=01DyfsWX0-rT_MYOHr2UcPSs8fwjLgXtz0QBU4kp3i4IUUMaxhjtPzK5zThsJXtLaXBfBeEqWhOE63kL6JU-A3CceIeYB8UduX_mzYHTb_upqsfwZgrwElqkiHl8r9Yz7OMDn0D0ksnXcjcpeaWERFDs6XvT6NzRDsS8D6OIesD2BlvKtttosmhU-yk-j1Bo-P4FZbOxOw7TOGmFexifstGX-B6aiXEy0o21rHx5J4ka4DXVtcx9L6TRU9ZWR-ob1Lb-NBiSjUn7P2-yyA3dghUaKEgpnh1QzwL5HEZBnzv31Nsv53tJ2dvag8bnA9_YRqHOyucvNKTOUCqAIBPpvzbEEGPHL9i7X5lijK-4eEigt4Hxcb_QK06JrSD2Vp182NKqo76TErsnLutJycl-H_tspEolSx8ilVGZkTXk3bE%3D)
---
| | Patriot,

---
The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed...
---
...But perhaps _most fraudulent_ of all is the disgraceful name that Biden's Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... _
_
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b0f01fb42da3466d9954d69458f7713d&_e=01DyfsWX0-rT_MYOHr2UcPSs8fwjLgXtz0QBU4kp3i4IUUMaxhjtPzK5zThsJXtLaXBfBeEqWhOE63kL6JU-A3CceIeYB8UduX_mzYHTb_upqsfwZgrwElqkiHl8r9Yz7OMDn0D0ksnXcjcpeaWERFDs6XvT6NzRDsS8D6OIesD2BlvKtttosmhU-yk-j1Bo-P4FZbOxOw7TOGmFexifstGX-B6aiXEy0o21rHx5J4ka4DXVtcx9L6TRU9ZWR-ob1Lb-NBiSjUn7P2-yyA3dgkmG6eUOsWv6Su_SUnlQTPt4bqzlgx9LW8mtRtxWzoo3z5tat2R7dURZvtCHuJyNW2Bdq-X4aQUgHrccPMdzvUxr-E5gnuXWWjcF9G9xr0VXH_gzmDshEArJSmuY3dfcglng4TNNpF-NiP749wU0eQc%3D)
---
It should read _Biden v. the American People_ , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for.

---
We all know that the __REAL__ United States of America - the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running - proudly stand by my side.

---
Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: _**to put the United States of America FIRST.**_

---
After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for __America__.

---
As President, it was my honor to rescue America's economy, to secure America's borders, to renegotiate America's trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America's forgotten citizens.

---
Now, the Swamp that I'm on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: _" United States of America v. Donald J. Trump."_

---
**But I know that this is _NOT_ the _United States of America_.**

---
What we're living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic.

---
_The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice._

---
And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it.

---
With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the __**United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump**__.

---
**[If you're not doing poorly right now, please make a contribution of even just $1 to prove that the _REAL_ America knows that we will weather this storm and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b0f01fb42da3466d9954d69458f7713d&_e=01DyfsWX0-rT_MYOHr2UcPSs8fwjLgXtz0QBU4kp3i4IUUMaxhjtPzK5zThsJXtLaXBfBeEqWhOE63kL6JU-A3CceIeYB8UduX_mzYHTb_upqsfwZgrwElqkiHl8r9Yz7OMDn0D0ksnXcjcpeaWERFDs6XvT6NzRDsS8D6OIesD2BlvKtttosmhU-yk-j1Bo-P4FZbOxOw7TOGmFexifstGX-B6aiXEy0o21rHx5J4ka4DXVtcx9L6TRU9ZWR-ob1Lb-NBiSjUn7P2-yyA3dgh9aNKo205LatrqThuWQ1Ptdf96Hg3B9xvNqi1c3QJZKBixZFghngwYELyr0FyQRCUh0v-Le5gEi_wW5nka4_bz5KwwpVrNAbma85c35S1DNd_D_P_UQ8LGz9hwOu1xfar9FHVKWCRejGeKQSJZ2Amc%3D)**

clean_body: Adding insult to injury. . . Adding insult to injury. . . | | | | | Patriot, The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed... ...But perhaps most fraudulent of all is the disgraceful name that Biden's Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... It should read Biden v. the American People , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for. We all know that the REAL United States of America - the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running - proudly stand by my side. Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: to put the United States of America FIRST. After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for America. As President, it was my honor to rescue America's economy, to secure America's borders, to renegotiate America's trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America's forgotten citizens. Now, the Swamp that I'm on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: " United States of America v. Donald J. Trump." But I know that this is NOT the United States of America. What we're living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic. The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice. And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it. With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump. | Thank you, Donald J. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: This campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you – not the Washington elite. | | That was our average donation in July, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign on February 21st, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. Because of your support, we've not only qualified for this month's debate,but the next one too! This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

But with each passing week, we’re learning more and more just how much of a lying crook Joe Biden is... Hunter Biden’s business partner testified under oath before House investigators that Hunter put his father on speakerphone during business calls MORE THAN 20 TIMES in order to “sell the brand” of the Ukrainian energy company, Burisma. There’s not a person on the entire planet who would pay Hunter Biden MILLIONS of dollars for his expertise on energy... ...It’s obvious to anyone with an ounce of common sense that the ONLY reason they were paying Hunter was for access to his father – the Vice President of the United States. And when a Ukrainian prosecutor started to uncover the corrupt dealings between Burisma and the Biden Crime Family, Crooked Joe told the Ukrainian government to FIRE the prosecutor or they’d lose $1 BILLION in American aid. I assume that another fake indictment of me from Biden’s weaponized Department of “Justice” will be coming out any day now, as yet another attempt to cover up all of the bad news about bribes, payoffs, and extortion surrounding the Biden Crime Family. But with your support, we will be able to prevail against their many vicious acts of Election Interference and expose Crooked Joe for selling out OUR country to enrich himself. name: Kash Patel
subject: Radical leftists Rep. Jackson is mad at me…
body:
You wouldn't believe...

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkai7mqb353nbl0tog4pn5lte9sq42lc2jdce550_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c3h2bs)

Friend,

You wouldn't believe what leftist Rep. Jackson Lee said about the Kash Foundation.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb8olb6s0ho3kvaljh2lol5ie87mhkt1cmce3p6g_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c3h2bs)
She is trying to accuse us of providing "cash gifts" to members of the FBI when nothing could be further from the truth!

I did exactly what I set out to do when I founded the Kash Foundation. We provided legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they brought forth credible information on corruption.

While it's shocking that a member of Congress would go so far out of her way to try and vilify us, I couldn't be happier.

**_We are pissing off the right people_.**

The members of the Deep State are getting scared. Their days are over. As the Kash Foundation encourages more and more whistleblowers are coming forward, we will expose all their corruption.

[That's why I need your help. My goal is to raise $50,000 before the end of the week to protect whistleblowers from Deep State retaliation.

Please consider chipping in any amount you can afford to help the Kash Foundation defend whistleblowers by clicking below.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq6bg03327qruk8ag3m0r3d08bprmi4642pag3mg_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c3h2bs)

Can you imagine giving up your career, financial livelihood, privacy, and peace of mind to do what you feel is right and expose the FBI's corruption to the rest of your fellow American citizens?

**And Rep. Jackson Lee has the nerve to accuse _the whistleblowers_ of corruption!**

These people are heroes! We owe a debt to the brave whistleblowers who come forward to share their information about corruption within our government.

Whistleblowers put themselves and their families at risk to expose the Government Gangsters within the Department of Justice and throughout our government.

**But, if you and I can provide them with the legal and financial support they need to stand up against the Deep State, then more whistleblowers will be encouraged to come forward. **

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zshqop8vbuj3iagptip9ffhu5qdkjlouip18t0fg_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c3h2bs)

I started the Kash Foundation because I know what whistleblowers need and what to expect when they come forward.

I blew the whistle on the FBI and DOJ too. During the Russiagate investigation, I uncovered that the FB and DOJI illegally sabotaged a presidential race. The Deep State spied on me while I was conducting this investigation because I exposed their unlawful conduct.

I also know how to fight back.

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Kyrsten Sinema & Donald Trump
body:
How Sinema bolstered Trump’s radical agenda | | | Peter – If you haven’t heard yet, former twice-impeached President Donald Trump was *finally* indicted for his role in the January 6th attack on the Capitol and for trying to steal the election. Seems like as good a time as any to remind you of all the times Kyrsten Sinema sided with and empowered Donald Trump during his four years in office:
* Sinema voted in favor of Trump Tax Scam 2.0 which created big tax cuts for the wealthy;
* Sinema voted to confirm 95 Trump-appointed judges, including some with extreme records against abortion rights and LGBT equality;
* Sinema voted TWICE to fund Trump’s border wall.

Then, after Trump was out of office, Sinema had the chance to undo some of his damage. Instead, she **BLOCKED** **voting rights legislation even as MAGA Trump allies were pushing anti-democracy bills in Arizona and states across the country, and she REFUSED to codify abortion rights even after Trump’s installed Supreme Court overturned Roe v. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: “Without a threat of a primary and a weakening of JD, we go back to corporate interests”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This headline just came out from HuffPost:

Over the last few years, with minimal resources compared to the Democratic
establishment, we have punched far above our weight and made an impact by
recruiting and electing an entire bloc of working-class leaders to
Congress. But we’re at a crossroads for our movement.

In the article, a progressive senior House aide said:

“Without a threat of a primary and a weakening of Justice Democrats, we
go back to corporate interests and a lack of accountability from the
progressive movement,”

We cannot go back. Despite an unprecedented slowdown in our fundraising
over the last year and needing to lay off some of our incredible members
of staff as a result, we are not giving up or letting the corporate
establishment win.

We are doubling down on candidate recruitment, reviewing every viable
district on the map. We are building coalitions to ensure that our
incumbents can defend themselves against the multimillion-dollar threat of
AIPAC and right-wing donors. We are not stopping this crucial work — even
for a moment.

But we need your help to overcome this difficult time,
Peter.

Thank you so much for being a part of our movement to
challenge the entire political establishment and elect more progressive
changemakers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136264?refcode=em20230803-30199&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=30199%2E1203867%2EYnJuQG ]→ Will you support us by making your first contribution of
$3 right now to fund our critical work?

Thank you so much for your support, firstname. Together we will continue
to fight for the soul of the Democratic Party.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1003&akid=30199%2E1203867%2EYnJuQG ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1004&akid=30199%2E1203867%2EYnJuQG ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230803-30199-footer&t=1005&refcode2=30199_1203867_YnJuQG&akid=30199%2E1203867%2EYnJuQG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=30199%2E1203867%2EYnJuQG

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Kash Patel
subject: Radical leftists Rep. Jackson is mad at me…
body:
You wouldn't believe...

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z78eejvahm78f1433fhcce6gra57n7s9mnb86c08_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)

Friend,

You wouldn't believe what leftist Rep. Jackson Lee said about the Kash Foundation.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7v6qkd75cnnugccpkrs03vv2eqcgm6b1f4jhqto_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)
She is trying to accuse us of providing "cash gifts" to members of the FBI when nothing could be further from the truth!

I did exactly what I set out to do when I founded the Kash Foundation. We provided legal and financial support to whistleblowers after they brought forth credible information on corruption.

While it's shocking that a member of Congress would go so far out of her way to try and vilify us, I couldn't be happier.

**_We are pissing off the right people_.**

The members of the Deep State are getting scared. Their days are over. As the Kash Foundation encourages more and more whistleblowers are coming forward, we will expose all their corruption.

[That's why I need your help. My goal is to raise $50,000 before the end of the week to protect whistleblowers from Deep State retaliation.

Please consider chipping in any amount you can afford to help the Kash Foundation defend whistleblowers by clicking below.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvh9lt3h40c8qqcmoqi4cq25vk88g50s5mipokso_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)

[Donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zij1loans9nlm5e6uc5dt2a8813bv8ak2rfd8e8o_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)

Can you imagine giving up your career, financial livelihood, privacy, and peace of mind to do what you feel is right and expose the FBI's corruption to the rest of your fellow American citizens?

**And Rep. Jackson Lee has the nerve to accuse _the whistleblowers_ of corruption!**

These people are heroes! We owe a debt to the brave whistleblowers who come forward to share their information about corruption within our government.

Whistleblowers put themselves and their families at risk to expose the Government Gangsters within the Department of Justice and throughout our government.

**But, if you and I can provide them with the legal and financial support they need to stand up against the Deep State, then more whistleblowers will be encouraged to come forward. **

**You can make a huge impact in the fight to expose government corruption. Please donate $10, $35, or even $100 today by clicking below. **
