[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhc5v8n94qjkmsqessu97hn6mrfjs76q6b41i8g8_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zat7qg0u1rg00aoffbkaqoui81e27afbe8mieoao_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjpmjbt0d1sb90hurvmq70lam9r4p6mf3r2v3a48_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb03b5a02mnedqal6a0h5j2uil1ouuj53pvfpl3g_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9a0b0n1cotbqit8e51bn80laq2gj6ghuqrh1avg_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2t0ujsaf96p1jbprs0n8ngg3t245u9pmot2s2f0_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)

I started the Kash Foundation because I know what whistleblowers need and what to expect when they come forward.

I blew the whistle on the FBI and DOJ too. During the Russiagate investigation, I uncovered that the FB and DOJI illegally sabotaged a presidential race. The Deep State spied on me while I was conducting this investigation because I exposed their unlawful conduct.

I also know how to fight back.

**I 've successfully exposed the FBI even though they tried to stop me at every turn. **And the Kash Foundation continues that fight by empowering and encouraging whistleblowers to do the right thing and show the American people what is happening in the halls of power.

Now, I have just one last question for you.

Will you join the fight and help me protect whistleblowers from the Deep State?
[Join the Fight >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf7nje5vjd6l1oich2ehc84j4k652jp6v12prr1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74chg68o74c9h2bs)

Kash Patel

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: Anything can happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
We need to be ready for anything between now and the Primary | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dmmMd9My4zutW6ihRq_G9qksWvU2NOXd7svr1ObbU5qB81PybLsvMVa8Xu1tkZucnZy2QvXokitPtHSiu-IpQ-91SSGGoB-82xvhRVlv6ju9dinx8Hke064G4QhfTBDqx/3yf/X1F3p0KxTn6FHLhU8hQWbA/h0/-gnH5dklS8Z3_c5jHBiqEQRM0Rr2Yq-mJmIAkOaeFlo)
---
Peter, I am personally reaching out because we are 7 months away from the primary election. And even though that may seem far away, the reality is that anything can happen between now and then. Between our opponent's attacks, the Republican opposition raising dark money to fight us, and the high financial demands as we edge closer to the election, we need to make sure we have a good sense of how much we have coming in for the next 7 months. That is why we’re launching a different type of goal this summer — to bring in donors who will pitch in $7 every month. **[Will you help us reach this goal by becoming a monthly recurring donor of $7 until Election Day? Or you can chip in whatever you can afford to make a one-time donation right now! Every little bit helps.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_NfM3vNLLsRb5p-3C6R9Wk3B0Ljcg8JHIrfC5Wv8Zo8wdPjcrZDn-Q9cdnjISoC_IxMChdHHZ8_TriPRu_8LYluBnLdrTEb6CueHtpf29sRu-VvY1R1WaZwjvc4M-N-D-GPC7ewrQQScr0w3a9A3BmMsjScfDgz9Des0tlexrlUj2-Du63gvH7p0v56KtyBrdYPm9H40RbRs20Kcj1Oe4ZpImnWrwW8aby3RMlBLAP0EiyIPyQ273Hf5eei5clqMgtoVvvvgKW1aCJIURRwxZPsCU35oF7w4IXOJ2yH7p_uc/3yf/X1F3p0KxTn6FHLhU8hQWbA/h1/ImVKNDtWpyh_Gt9nqRIDlbkXyiiDfxR0lFkR6Howa0s)** **[Donate $7](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_NfM3vNLLsRb5p-3C6R9Wk3B0Ljcg8JHIrfC5Wv8Zo8zxaOy_D_QXzSTRxJjrRqgiYTA47zmD3ZyPhAVYr0pkRId2DEvEXD38kIgdfxwRJL4v5nDUEImolo9XEP96FvLwEB13aanu6ePrI25rkIuMKitnQ0d1UPgpwlsiRIRIC3hhKpgkPGBAstFFHTqzHdVPFDxa6iyw5y9ArmdzOHoOzbQ1EGJ10rtZ9TrDoJmxMMyq-mIP1Hci0rMur5IdawZ39ploYxp2T4-wIbfGa6oSKtrkZqodpBzzFt1lXtsr3Cs/3yf/X1F3p0KxTn6FHLhU8hQWbA/h2/BgqmbMg29j5MDgg9wqr19Bkpj2tuQdWuNNItxMGM1ns)** Recurring monthly donations are often small, but they’re very important in giving us a good idea of what our budget will look like. We don’t rely on big corporations, Super PACs, or special interests to write us big checks—we rely on grassroots dollars from folks like you. A monthly recurring contribution is the single best way to keep this campaign going financially. It allows us to worry less about fundraising and more about what’s really important, which is the incredible movement that we're building for South Texas. We know that we can take back the House, provide high-quality, affordable health care and education, and make the American Dream achievable for all again. **[But first, I need you, Peter, to make a commitment to this movement to push us forward through the next 7 months. clean_body: We need to be ready for anything between now and the Primary | | | Peter, I am personally reaching out because we are 7 months away from the primary election. And even though that may seem far away, the reality is that anything can happen between now and then. Between our opponent's attacks, the Republican opposition raising dark money to fight us, and the high financial demands as we edge closer to the election, we need to make sure we have a good sense of how much we have coming in for the next 7 months. That is why we’re launching a different type of goal this summer — to bring in donors who will pitch in $7 every month. Recurring monthly donations are often small, but they’re very important in giving us a good idea of what our budget will look like. We don’t rely on big corporations, Super PACs, or special interests to write us big checks—we rely on grassroots dollars from folks like you. A monthly recurring contribution is the single best way to keep this campaign going financially. It allows us to worry less about fundraising and more about what’s really important, which is the incredible movement that we're building for South Texas. We know that we can take back the House, provide high-quality, affordable health care and education, and make the American Dream achievable for all again. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Michelle Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: So the Supreme Court doesn’t want to agree to some formal ethics standards? I’m shocked…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I’m fighting to pass my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act as part of my plan to root corruption out of Washington. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67551283/420059055/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15U_SUP_E_20230803_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2E3ZTExYS00ZTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OgMiBJ9I7t_1Twpue-l5GsCvx2gVtbP3wKt5kvIaK_g=&emci=c3641014-4e32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=3ca7e11a-4e32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=9027908)
---
Tired of seeing countless headlines about Supreme Court scandals? So is Chief Justice John Roberts, apparently. According to a recent CNN story, he tried to get all nine Supreme Court justices to agree to some formal ethics standards. But, no dice. Maybe he couldn’t persuade Justice Samuel Alito, who’s recently been dismissing the need for reform in op-ed pieces. (Yes, that’s the same Justice Alito who got a free ride on a private jet and took a luxury fishing trip to Alaska with a GOP megadonor who later had cases before the Supreme Court. No, he doesn’t appear to have any shame.) Or maybe Justice Clarence Thomas was the hold-out. After all, he’s made headlines for accepting undisclosed luxury travel gifts from a _different_ GOP megadonor — we’re talking private jets, superyachts, and exclusive resorts. No matter whose fingerprints are on the Chief Justice’s failure, **it looks like we can’t count on the Supreme Court to clean up their own act. But I’ve got a bill to do it for them — the Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act. ** Pure and simple, their little honor system just isn’t cutting it. This plan would impose an enforceable code of conduct on the Supreme Court, tighten restrictions on gifts and privately funded travel, strengthen ethical standards up and down our judiciary, and ban federal judges — including Supreme Court justices — from owning individual stock. **I haven’t the slightest clue why Justice Alito or Justice Thomas would disagree, but I feel like members of the nation’s highest court should be held to the highest standard of ethics. I’m fighting to pass my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act and fighting to root corruption out of Washington — with the most sweeping set of reforms since Watergate.** [**And I’m running for re-election to get this done. But I can’t get there alone. Can you pitch in $20 or any amount to support our campaign and help build our movement for bold reform?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67551284/420059056/442890331?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15U_SUP_E_20230803_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2E3ZTExYS00ZTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OgMiBJ9I7t_1Twpue-l5GsCvx2gVtbP3wKt5kvIaK_g=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

Fellow American, With Donald Trump's third indictment, we're again reminded of that terrible day on January 6th, 2021, when the glass of the Capitol was shattered, and its doors were stormed by political extremists encouraged by President Trump. That day, our democracy nearly broke, and a tragic moment was cemented in our nation's history. The trajectory of our country nearly altered course forever. _**It was because of leaders like Governor Larry Hogan that we stayed together.**_ Within 24 hours, Governor Hogan stood in the same spot where George Washington began the tradition of a peaceful transition of power, and he condemned the assault on the Capitol and unified our country once more.
---
_**"The Mob may have shattered glass... but they did not shatter our democracy... our institutions have held firm in the face of this attempted insurrection."**_ _**– Gov. Larry Hogan, Jan. 7, 2021**_
---
Governor Hogan spoke for many Americans when he said, "Enough is enough. Enough of the lies. Enough of the hate. Enough of the total dysfunction." _**An America United**_ is committed to healing old wounds rather than inflaming them. While every American has the right to be innocent until proven guilty, Donald Trump abandoned his oath to the Constitution on January 6th, making him unfit for office. **[Join our team and help us ensure that Democracy and the people always prevail by supporting common sense leaders who fight against toxic, partisan politics.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=606fa5b5c0d448b1b4f46c25c3880ad5&_e=2qLxWMU-ZAnDPfS4t3CVK_hwLszoRBYPEQIrZPwPVWI5QnhAt8Sga7PwS-yAOKFVsrQXv7dqhWKxsbKjUajLSr8gABF6PTViPsrreVk3W3_qhMKqRQD5tCPq6TCgBQlbppeRChD1stjzhhr0nTy_y0F1cz_xwN4YrWALCAUrdaunmD7is6mupRn5ZxNrfGCebTjIJ2lrQxEMVp8BEACVgJNAj_kHW5DhmQR4uuDiuga0J3V5xLUPRyRixemkavsh9pvtmdjKigFCjqPsDrPTHA%3D%3D)**

body:
Adding insult to injury. . .

Adding insult to injury. . . | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=5f007c3f381e471cb944563a88187151&_e=W5wapB5i8_y-_6x8zxy8T3W4-7_xhlvNDSptIf8QFSrQp2KXkp4ruChroZsCk4aKk_3hssdJYPIjFzlOarUWMPbVuOdYxdX3EbkXMd_PQBpcKR457loTjrwYF8NGK1SUr7TgV6gBCP1AZPtbfEYj9mP7awoEOLpc-YjJkVUsSarh7zzsnR7X8BnVMW2jpH37p-nBfa0Bqbsq2CKVC4CMg5evLvy3MJ9XP7khUeRhmGST5q7YvWXmXxDn-ja2jPF_IzXiiwlxSM7nz6VFHSLqgZpiaF7GJnANpPIIx1Xz-I8f9tr_Z10X2de5kbBggNaI9bxAauhPm_Qbsla7mjPU6yifAC88UbVA2INIR8xGCir0zkS-ikX1Gb55sqFaOE-cPjQL-NiAuYFXmVN5oq4f5Q%3D%3D)

| | Friend,

---
The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed...
---
...But perhaps _most fraudulent_ of all is the disgraceful name that Biden's Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... _
_
---
[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=5f007c3f381e471cb944563a88187151&_e=W5wapB5i8_y-_6x8zxy8T3W4-7_xhlvNDSptIf8QFSrQp2KXkp4ruChroZsCk4aKk_3hssdJYPIjFzlOarUWMPbVuOdYxdX3EbkXMd_PQBpcKR457loTjrwYF8NGK1SUr7TgV6gBCP1AZPtbfEYj9mP7awoEOLpc-YjJkVUsSarh7zzsnR7X8BnVMW2jpH37p-nBfa0Bqbsq2CKVC4CMg5evLvy3MJ9XP7khUeRhmGST5q7YvWXmXxDn-ja2jPF_d8wcYhV_dPvDvfxrSa4yOTusUTwbhfnFwTyiE5l2n8hBFt_fhDFQQA7QjkJSgUkRfi0R8Ifjnqq9f-A-KHKWKEPAWAWV0SBwdJScLRzeWtKd8eAfh2WWS_R7ZGjQCFqgkjt1-tM9_R8423OkV2Qw0A%3D%3D)
---
It should read _Biden v. the American People_ , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for.

---
We all know that the __REAL__ United States of America - the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running - proudly stand by my side.

---
Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: _**to put the United States of America FIRST.**_

---
After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for __America__.

---
As President, it was my honor to rescue America's economy, to secure America's borders, to renegotiate America's trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America's forgotten citizens.

---
Now, the Swamp that I'm on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: _" United States of America v. Donald J. Trump."_

---
**But I know that this is _NOT_ the _United States of America_.**

---
What we're living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic.

---
_The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice._

---
And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it.

---
With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the __**United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump**__.

---
**[If you're not doing poorly right now, please make a contribution of even just $1 to prove that the _REAL_ America knows that we will weather this storm and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=5f007c3f381e471cb944563a88187151&_e=W5wapB5i8_y-_6x8zxy8T3W4-7_xhlvNDSptIf8QFSrQp2KXkp4ruChroZsCk4aKk_3hssdJYPIjFzlOarUWMPbVuOdYxdX3EbkXMd_PQBpcKR457loTjrwYF8NGK1SUr7TgV6gBCP1AZPtbfEYj9mP7awoEOLpc-YjJkVUsSarh7zzsnR7X8BnVMW2jpH37p-nBfa0Bqbsq2CKVC4CMg5evLvy3MJ9XP7khUeRhmGST5q7YvWXmXxDn-ja2jPF_eUo229Qt6YRb4gP_6GxLR66jjUyQXJj0HkKBoxBdOxRw5x0UK8GA7A1IfX5WfsxXS9IIXL7kuIDa9mnwa1COPBHUWBK0kpBwCOG0pH_9LM84hRk7GKgz1j7Bk7u7b8jCJgdW54Kt9nkFRyKDWcldeg%3D%3D)**

body:
Adding insult to injury. . .

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce4a5030a1eb4eea8cffc4a0435100c6&_e=wWzrZ4FqqgWhbWFUBbFjFAGyvJNUKImGiGog7HwwKly21bIcu_jEIH01L-yTm8fqpQ3tSof5RNpnd7Y6nKZPTfKcpzb_veAJJTD-_86plhmfbNX8cb7ntJnk_1PPHGtFlTZBndVDQ_iaM2wJFRFW4vu6zZ5STRdch8jfk7MjzT_T6PwQWavSiiOjRE3xfSn5QjtmzkT0yTuEG6J2vRb5xq4yiC0PJ_77mdD4GpFPVu_x6VycaXENAOB20YRfnriqaAo3Y0nOCIZ0AYkyUVAVrTrXgrVRNwOA8yOL4qK6AtjwutRSNpLyGyBEpaJBOxbEO5KKvdyRtVSCby6SSxskgscjPUTtsC-o6skViF1jTwAPn3l-wZ05XwotnYwO9fDkvD4eSaZxm31ZD5P76KvRlQ%3D%3D)

| | Patriot,

---
The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed...
---
...But perhaps _most fraudulent_ of all is the disgraceful name that Biden's Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... _
_
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce4a5030a1eb4eea8cffc4a0435100c6&_e=wWzrZ4FqqgWhbWFUBbFjFAGyvJNUKImGiGog7HwwKly21bIcu_jEIH01L-yTm8fqpQ3tSof5RNpnd7Y6nKZPTfKcpzb_veAJJTD-_86plhmfbNX8cb7ntJnk_1PPHGtFlTZBndVDQ_iaM2wJFRFW4vu6zZ5STRdch8jfk7MjzT_T6PwQWavSiiOjRE3xfSn5QjtmzkT0yTuEG6J2vRb5xq4yiC0PJ_77mdD4GpFPVu_x6VycaXENAOB20YRfnriq6LxUSNMgfj61reU7F5DKGPF_UIS7STmbwto67KT37m7inrEJA5chTTzcd5YPU0TmhxLFII08KUTWBtqXWBqdO0DaoSAHe4BvKiawdKtSh-sHDMb5jRc9HyO5ZPSN9lDj-HEUvQFqBqoldgyoTMuU1w%3D%3D)
---
It should read _Biden v. the American People_ , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for.

---
We all know that the __REAL__ United States of America - the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running - proudly stand by my side.

---
Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: _**to put the United States of America FIRST.**_

---
After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for __America__.

---
As President, it was my honor to rescue America's economy, to secure America's borders, to renegotiate America's trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America's forgotten citizens.

---
Now, the Swamp that I'm on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: _" United States of America v. Donald J. Trump."_

---
**But I know that this is _NOT_ the _United States of America_.**

---
What we're living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic.

---
_The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice._

---
And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it.

---
With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the __**United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump**__.

---

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: a heartfelt thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230803_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230803_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Peter, it’s **finally** Election Day!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230803_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230803_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Our work isn't over yet – Team Heidi is still knocking on doors, making phone calls, and greeting Nashvillians at the polls.
These are our final few hours before the polls close tonight, Peter, can my team and I count on your support? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230803_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
LAST CHANCE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230803_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
It’s been a long campaign to put Music City first, Peter, and my favorite part of it all has been getting to know folks like you on the campaign trail.
Nashvillians who were kind. Nashvillians who were concerned. Nashvillians who want a better future for their families. It’s you who remind me why I’m running, and it’s you I keep in mind when casting my vote.
As a mom, state senator, former mayor, and a music business executive, I've been able to find success by being a unifier. And that's exactly what this campaign for Nashville Mayor has been all about: bringing people together.
My heart is in Music City, and I care about making Nashville a better place for the families and hard-working individuals who call our city home.
But that can't happen if we don't get out the vote, Peter.
My team and I are doing as much as we can, but turnout is still low and we need the proper funds to finish out today. Peter, will you pitch in any amount to help us finish strong and get voters to the polls today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230803_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
FINISH STRONG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230803_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
Thank you so much for your support. It means the world to me.
With immense gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230803_em_fr_b1_HC_acq [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230803_em_fr_b1_HC_acq]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.

name: Chairman Kyle Hupfer and the Indiana Republican Party
subject: One Year Later
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/72b4a5fd4418d2d8/4f2da72ddf1e1035c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Friend, One year ago today, we lost Congresswoman Jackie Walorski, her district director and St. Joseph County Republican Party chairman, Zach Potts, her communications director, Emma Thomson, and Edith Schmucker in a tragic car accident in northern Indiana. The magnitude of these losses is still felt to this day, but we find comfort in knowing that their lives will not be forgotten.
---
---
For we will always remember Jackie and her unmatched passion for her constituents, her fierce advocacy for our veterans and those in need, and her desire to leave the world a better place; Zach and his dedication to the St. Joseph County Republican Party, the Indiana Republican Party, and the Second Congressional District; and Emma and her unparalleled work ethic in our nation's capital and her distinguished career of public service. We ask that you continue to pray for all of the families that have been affected by this tragedy and do all you can to ensure their memories live on. May God bless Jackie, Zach, Emma, and Edith. — Chairman Kyle Hupfer and the Indiana Republican Party **PS:** You can [make a donation](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/72b4a5fd4418d2d8/b5d75fddbc2a29ecc3d6b838967d376c/40313) to the Jackie Walorski Memorial Scholarship and Jackie Walorski Memorial Ministry Scholarship at the Community Foundation of Elkhart County by clicking [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/72b4a5fd4418d2d8/a2b3467ea3d6bf25c3d6b838967d376c/40313).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chuck=20Rocha?=
subject: Solidarity Summer Update: Celebrating Solidarity Strategies’ Public Affairs!
body:
Solidarity Summer Update: Celebrating Solidarity Strategies’ Public Affairs! | | | |
---
| | |
# Solidarity Summer Update: Celebrating Solidarity Strategies’ Public Affairs!
---
| Friends,

Happy summer! It brings me immense pleasure to announce that Solidarity Strategies’ Public Affairs Division is celebrating its 8-month anniversary.

We opened our Public Affairs department to provide culturally competent organizational development, strategy development, and strategic planning that empower and advance our clients’ missions.

Keeping true to our value of diversity and commitment to operating an award-winning political consulting firm owned and operated by Latinos, Lizeth Ortega Luna, a proud Mexican immigrant and first-generation Nevadan serves as the director of Public Affairs.

Since our launch, we have been honored to work with new and existing partners that align with our values and support our communities. In six months our team has supported our partners and gained remarkable achievements, and I am thrilled to share some of these accomplishments with you.
| **Climate Power En Acción**
---
Solidarity Strategies helped launch Climate Power En Acción during Latino Conservation Week 2023 by organizing a celebration on July 18th, 2023 to commemorate Climate Power’s new project focused on reaching and mobilizing Latinos on climate and the impact of a green economy. **In addition to climate leaders Rep. Nanette Barragán, Rep. Joaquin Castro, Rep. Jimmy Gomez, and Rep. Gabe Vasquez** , numerous climate partners, including GreenLatinos, Moms Clean Air Force-EcoMadres, the National Wildlife Federation, and many more joined us for a remarkable night. We were also honored to have Lalo Alcaraz autograph cartoons created exclusively for Climate Power.

**1st Annual Brown and Bougie Brunch**
---
Solidarity Strategies identified a lack of Latino events during the White House Correspondents Dinner weekend and committed to changing the status quo. There had not been a Latino journalist celebration in the WHCA's 109-year history until now. We honored Latino journalists for their tireless work to uphold democracy, inform the country, and share our communities' stories when no one else will--even when they have to risk their lives to do so. **Secretary Miguel Cardona, Administrator Isabella Guzman, Congresswoman Delia Ramirez, and Congressman Joaquin Castro** joined 150 other guests to celebrate and honor our journalists. Solidarity Strategies awarded Alicia Menendez and Fin Gómez the Champion for Diversity Award for their extraordinary commitment and excellence in representing and including Latinos in journalism.
**National Association of Hispanic Publications**
---
In the spring of 2023, NAHP partnered with Solidarity Strategies to organize the annual two-day Legislative Symposium. Solidarity Strategies coordinated meetings between NAHP and Members of the Cabinet, the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, Latino non-profit organization leaders, and Latino corporate leaders.

**National Parks Conservation Association**
---
Solidarity Strategies is partnering with the National Parks Conservation Association to create welcoming and safe experiences for all park visitors, with a particular focus on those who speak Spanish and other languages. We are collaborating with local and national stakeholders in the Delaware Water Gap Region to foster relationships and increase awareness of our country’s natural treasures among our diverse Latino communities.

**GAIN POWER ** On June 13, we had the pleasure of collaborating with GAIN POWER to organize the 'Powerful IDEA Awards' and the 'Latino Networking and Resume Drop' virtual event, part of our ongoing efforts to assist with Latino outreach. Hundreds of Latinos, eager to start their careers in politics, took advantage of the opportunity to network with Latino-led organizations. This collaboration is especially significant as the 2024 election cycle continues to ramp up.
These examples represent just a fraction of the impactful work we have undertaken at Solidarity Strategies. Each project has reinforced our commitment to delivering exceptional public affairs solutions and making a tangible difference in the communities we serve. To learn more about our services and explore how Solidarity Strategies can support your organization's public affairs needs, I invite you to contact our team at info@solidaritystrategies.com. If you or your organization have an upcoming project that requires expert guidance and support, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. Thank you for your continued support and collaboration. We look forward to many more successful months ahead.

Chuck Rocha,

| | | | | | | | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=726985622d&e=b8f90417f9)
---
| | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=72c7b94703&e=b8f90417f9)
---
| | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=c54476bbcf&e=b8f90417f9)
---
| | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=effbce3f0c&e=b8f90417f9)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Solidarity Strategies, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Solidarity StrategiesP.O. Box 15260Washington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a&e=b8f90417f9&c=1da93865ea) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=badd48715a&e=b8f90417f9&c=1da93865ea).

| Hey Peter,

July is the hardest fundraising month of the year, and your support blew me away!

Your grassroots contributions keep this campaign strong, and I’m lucky to have you with me on this journey. It’s amazing to know that you have my back as I fight for all of us.

I've been building things on the ground for more than seven years as commissioner of public lands, _working to understand our communities' needs and how to deliver._ Now, I'm running for governor to continue the work of making Washington the blueprint for a leading pro-worker, pro-family, pro-choice, pro-environment state.

In the months since I launched my campaign for governor, you’ve shown up in extraordinary numbers. And I’m confident that with your continued support, we can keep the Evergreen State evergreen.

Thank you again!

Hilary

[_**P.S. Our hard work is just getting started. While July is the hardest fundraising month of the year, August will be just as difficult. Can I count on you to give me and my team a head start by chipping in $5 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67530031/420029928/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230803-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzc2M2EyZjEtMmYzMi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oN-h93USBUpQlzkXtss45tMPoTewTrVXjePD1uPEQ_c=)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Housing is a human right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

The United States currently has a shortage [https://nlihc.org/gap] of 7.3 million affordable rental homes. In 2022, the median rent nationwide exceeded [https://www.moodys.com/web/en/us/about/insights/data-stories/us-rental-housing-affordability.html] the average income for the first time. For households with extremely low incomes, this can translate [https://housingmatters.urban.org/research-summary/addressing-americas-affordable-housing-crisis] to more than 50 percent of wages being spent on rent.

It’s not right that in the wealthiest country in the world, a country founded on the promise of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, people are going without safe and affordable housing.

Sign the petition: Tell Congress to address the affordable housing crisis. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-congress-we-need-affordable-housing-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fforward-blue-affordable-housing-petition-swap]

Sign the Petition [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-congress-we-need-affordable-housing-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fforward-blue-affordable-housing-petition-swap]

Basic housing isn’t a luxury. Housing isn’t a commodity. It is a human and economic right. For us to provide people with opportunities to pursue the American Dream, we must ensure access to quality, affordable housing.

Sign if you agree: Congress must act to guarantee affordable housing for all. [https://actionnetwork.org/forms/tell-congress-we-need-affordable-housing-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-ro-khanna&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fforward-blue-affordable-housing-petition-swap]

In solidarity,
Ro

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67532051/420033053/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ2MTYwZDQtMzEzMi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fZwVlajT3inczXrVD3V8FV8NRIZrCxAcKCLF5H4ozyM=)
Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to **thank you** for helping us meet our July fundraising goal. Thanks to you and your incredible support, we have the resources to begin really growing our campaign team.

That’s a huge deal for our race. AZ-01 is one of the handful of districts that can very well determine the House majority, and that starts by unseating corrupt extremists like David Schweikert.

Unlike my opponent, we don’t take any community for granted. Every dollar raised helps us reach all types of Arizonians, from working families to small business owners and young people. I can’t wait to see what we build this campaign into.

Thank you, friend, from the bottom of my heart. I know we can win this race, and I'm grateful to be doing it with you on our team.

Thanks,

Marlene

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried
%recipient.md5_hash%
|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f7ae708ab5c4a498cb4d8fc9e8d5025&_e=LNb_MFaX0tOTUJip0q-R4rlPvPxI7Xj2BIBvDGIJej_vdxD9RvxNdEsBzjwApWVTSXuvRsv-bBWrJ0NZRzYDgRvU1g-1Al-_WfbvSItRHoBXF2hf7D0mwbopvnUDOx0UEZdYPP4cbImINLEo9gFJD5BZXdCjI6CRDsOfGCE7NturZ1nVyAeM6i2t2aMX26RcshqWNaWRPv57sYGneVuy8AELMoPOpwKT7-QFq42inidC6ZfZYxn-MWWOXjz_z9oAZCye9JyZs5pJGcxclReGNSpy-UKzZwoNIBFMiJUHRE7vnec9tBGzDxXED0FOSm3taNnrLx0E3Jc_7u2Nxjt8TpcVIpTDhtnn3yrvVA7V1bbSpyafPQb_R-aohlb7fGqMAyYp0Hg7cinrHDP-MkXQtXsEjd6SUJ6ZbsUs3G4luP0%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f7ae708ab5c4a498cb4d8fc9e8d5025&_e=LNb_MFaX0tOTUJip0q-R4rlPvPxI7Xj2BIBvDGIJej_vdxD9RvxNdEsBzjwApWVTSXuvRsv-bBWrJ0NZRzYDgRvU1g-1Al-_WfbvSItRHoBXF2hf7D0mwbopvnUDOx0UEZdYPP4cbImINLEo9gFJD5BZXdCjI6CRDsOfGCE7NturZ1nVyAeM6i2t2aMX26RcshqWNaWRPv57sYGneVuy8AELMoPOpwKT7-QFq42inidC6ZfZYxn-MWWOXjz_z9oAZCye9JyZs5pJGcxclReGNSP-z4DkfgDnssaTpTzHhb09J0nEc55OGMk1zo1BAfUNac9zODhK4-JldlcCufBWfR2QASwfSwVNMQ8xpTkA6OvY0o8NmZfEVpdKrO79Kwy44BwFNKjMWcxfcpyKdHRtA8Do2efL896eXeh2oeZ0evc%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f7ae708ab5c4a498cb4d8fc9e8d5025&_e=LNb_MFaX0tOTUJip0q-R4rlPvPxI7Xj2BIBvDGIJej_vdxD9RvxNdEsBzjwApWVTSXuvRsv-bBWrJ0NZRzYDgRvU1g-1Al-_WfbvSItRHoBXF2hf7D0mwbopvnUDOx0UEZdYPP4cbImINLEo9gFJD5BZXdCjI6CRDsOfGCE7NturZ1nVyAeM6i2t2aMX26RcshqWNaWRPv57sYGneVuy8AELMoPOpwKT7-QFq42inidC6ZfZYxn-MWWOXjz_z9oAZCye9JyZs5pJGcxclReGNTOxf97Zdk-8kQNGTs9pIeAYQz242bPtYIHvReH3s5px-qKWobggCcU1soyu5YmPOPRFUX1UprzeToeaemcrN7qkfUUp9qRl38AaLccmGYD5-XH1RPq3OwXe08He33a4ravSqzQ8uOlPN3gQjHsOuy4%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7f7ae708ab5c4a498cb4d8fc9e8d5025&_e=LNb_MFaX0tOTUJip0q-R4rlPvPxI7Xj2BIBvDGIJej_vdxD9RvxNdEsBzjwApWVTSXuvRsv-bBWrJ0NZRzYDgRvU1g-1Al-_WfbvSItRHoBXF2hf7D0mwbopvnUDOx0UEZdYPP4cbImINLEo9gFJD5BZXdCjI6CRDsOfGCE7NturZ1nVyAeM6i2t2aMX26RcshqWNaWRPv57sYGneVuy8AELMoPOpwKT7-QFq42inidC6ZfZYxn-MWWOXjz_z9oAZCye9JyZs5pJGcxclReGNZ4SceCu68UDh6bKEeSt45xBgq7Kyva0rBpamwdSYWu5k-eaEoVsd6uh0_9OtNMYtDyyg4mrW7kdIEEcOrSoyFbeDzg-MuwBDFdMdJMYZciZPiQE-yzcYaig0zicPlWv8A31o8TNKXfjio7n5mEKIug%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: **IR Investigative Exclusive** Another Mayor Using Taxpayer Resources to Run Political Campaign
body:
Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot infamously used official email accounts for her campaign. It turns out another mayor appears to have done the same.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/38dadfae39f4/ir-investigative-exclusive-another-mayor-using-taxpayer-resources-to-run-political-campaign?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IR INVESTIGATIVE EXCLUSIVE

Mayor Keith Pekau Was Running Federal Congressional Campaign, Raising Money from Village Contractors, From Taxpayer-Funded Village Hall, FOIA Request Reveals (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, center, and Village Trustees at an Orland Park Village Board Meeting (Source: Illinois Review)
A recent Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request, and provided to Illinois Review, revealed that Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau and village trustees were using their official taxpayer-funded government email addresses to communicate with members of Pekau’s congressional campaign team to discuss political activities, and to review a list of current contractors doing business with the village, so they could gather donations for a golf outing fundraiser (https://stayhappening.com/e/3rd-annual-golf-outing-E2ISUQMWN67?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) at Crystal Tree Golf & Country Club last September.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Keith For Mayor / Facebook)
In a correspondence dated July 25, 2022, Tom Dubelbeis (https://patch.com/illinois/orlandpark/former-village-trustee-named-interim-orland-park-village-manager?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – a former village trustee and former interim village manager, is communicating with the mayor, his campaign team and village trustees Cindy Nelson Katsenes, Michael Milani, Bill Healy, Sean Kampas and Brian Riordan on their official government email accounts about a “Keith golf outing planning meeting.” In the email, Dubelbeis writes,

“Team,
Please plan on attending a planning meeting for Keith’s golf outing. Thursday July 28th, 4 pm @ my house. The rules for congressional fund raising and golf outings are more restrictive than we’re used to. So, get your creative juices going so we can develop a plan to raise $120K for Keith. RSVP.
Thanks,
Tom”

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Village of Orland Park FOIA Request)
Minutes later, Trustee Michael Milani replies from his official government email account,

“As of now, I will be able to make it.”

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Village of Orland Park FOIA Request)
In September, the emails continued, but Trustee Brian Riordan, an attorney – is no longer on the email distribution list – most likely removing himself from the conversation – well aware that you cannot mix official government business with political campaign activities.

But in a follow up email dated September 10, 2022, Dubelbeis writes,

“Team,
I’ve contacted 23 of the names on the list and need help with the rest. Again, gray and green have either been contacted or paid.
The names with X’s still need to be contacted. Please review the list and let me know who you can contact.
Regards,
Tom”

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Village of Orland Park FOIA Request)
Attached to the email was a list of businesses that Pekau and his fellow trustees were trying to solicit for federal campaign donations – with many of those companies doing business with the village.

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
A list of potential donors for Pekau's congressional campaign, many of which conduct business with the Village of Orland Park. (Source: Village of Orland Park FOIA Request)
In January, Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot’s campaign faced potential legal trouble when emails revealed campaign staffers were contacting Chicago Public School (https://www.cbsnews.com/chicago/news/lightfoot-campaign-cps-teachers-student-volunteers-investigation/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) teachers and asking them to identify students who could volunteer on the mayor’s re-election campaign.

The
American Civil Liberties Union (https://news.wttw.com/2023/01/12/lightfoot-campaign-emails-cps-teachers-may-violate-federal-law-aclu-illinois?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of Illinois immediately raised an alarm – citing a US Supreme Court case, saying the Lightfoot campaign “is inappropriately coercive and raises First Amendment concerns. The Supreme Court has made clear that government officials cannot use their office or power to coerce participation or to punish for lack of participation in political campaigns...”

In other words, Mayor Pekau and village trustees – who oversee village contractors – cannot use their office to persuade people to donate to political campaigns – and in this case, the mayor’s congressional campaign.

The list – provided by Dubelbeis, includes several city contractors, including Edwards Realty Group, Fox’s Pizza, G.E. Mathis Company, Jeanes Construction, Joe Rizza Enterprises, Mazda of Orland Park, and Ziegler Auto Group, among others.

In March of 2022, Pekau and the village board voted in favor of signing a six-figure consulting agreement with one of the mayor’s biggest donors to develop village-owned property along one of Orland Park’s busiest corridors –
Edwards Realty (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/mayor-keith-pekau-playing-favorites-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot-to-develop-orland-park-land-deal-worth-253m.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

In November of 2022, the village board voted to reimburse Edwards Realty up to $1 million in potential costs as it related to the development project, and could assist in the purchase of the village-owned land.

Ramzi Hassan is the president of Edwards Realty and the current president of the Orland Park Chamber of Commerce.

On December 27, 2022, Hassan made a $5,000 personal contribution to Chicago Mayor
Lori Lightfoot (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-goes-on-the-attack-accuses-rep-casten-of-being-divisive-hypocritical-and-self-serving-just-weeks-after-praising-democrat-rep-marie-newman.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in support of her failed re-election efforts.
Edwards Realty and Orland Chamber of Commerce president Ramzi Hassan and former Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot.

Eric Vates, the president of Orland Park Mazda – and a close friend and ally of Pekau, is routinely seen at local community events wearing official Orland Park Police gear and a badge – giving the impression that he is a member of law enforcement.

Orland Park Trustee Sean Kampas, an IT consultant and close friend and ally of Pekau is also seen during community events wearing an official Orland Park Police Emergency Services polo with an official police badge attached to his belt – giving the impression that he is a member of law enforcement.

In Illinois, it is unlawful to impersonate a police officer, and a
Class 4 Felony (https://www.fenbertlaw.com/blog/2020/04/impersonating-a-police-officer-is-a-class-4-felony-in-illinois/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D#:~:text=If%20a%20person%20is%20caught,up%20to%20%2425%2C000%20in%20fines.) , punishable by up to three years in jail and $25,000 in fines.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/mayor-keith-pekau-was-running-federal-congressional-campaign-raising-money-from-city-contractors-from-taxpayer-funded-village-hall-foia-requests-reveal.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Eric Vates, left, of Orland Park Mazda, Sean Kampas, center, an IT consultant and Village Trustee, and Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau pose for a photo during a community event last Summer. Vates and Kampas are wearing official Orland Park Police uniforms and a badge, even though they are not law enforcement.

In March, Pekau and Kampas were caught harassing (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/witnesses-keith-pekau-harasses-intimidates-female-orland-fire-dist-candidates-follows-them-in-his-car-while-they-knocked-on-doors.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) female Orland Fire Protection District candidates Angela Greenfield and Tina Zekich and their volunteers as they campaigned and knocked on doors in a local neighborhood just a week before the April elections.

Pekau and Kampas spent the morning following the group in Pekau’s Dodge Durango as they walked a nearby neighborhood to knock on doors and drop off literature.

Although Pekau and Kampas never got out of the car, numerous witnesses said the pair continued to follow the group as they knocked on doors – staring at them through the car windows in a sad attempt at intimidating the group of volunteers who were campaigning on behalf of candidates that they opposed.

Healy is a village trustee and served as the
treasurer (https://www.fec.gov/data/committee/C00794479/?tab=about-committee&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of Pekau’s congressional campaign. Healy is also a treasurer for other trustee candidate committees.
https://www.fec.gov/data/committee/C00794479/?tab=about-committee&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Federal Election Commission website)
Nelson-Katsenes is a village trustee, Orland Township committeewoman and serves as the treasurer (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/CommitteeDetail.aspx?ID=ljiyK%2bxzQsSrMIWisZaY%2fg%3d%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for Pekau’s mayoral campaign.

https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/CommitteeDetail.aspx?ID=ljiyK%2bxzQsSrMIWisZaY%2fg%3d%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Source: Illinois State Board of Elections website)
And in an email to constituents from the “Keith for Mayor (https://mailchi.mp/46ed6c8e4a45/mayoral-update-8-13-22?fbclid=IwAR1uc5JuqHVcZbLo7bg8TeXCU9egKZFS9jlu1WI4OX6hfxZyz6tk1HlMlfg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ” account in August of 2022, Pekau provides a recap from the last village trustee board meeting and then pivots to promote his congressional campaign and his upcoming golf fundraiser on September 26th.

The new revelations shed light on the inner workings of Pekau’s congressional campaign, and will undoubtedly catch the attention of state and federal election officials.

https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf85e7a65-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_03_05_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-0bf85e7a65-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Andy Kim
subject: Halfway through the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
We're over halfway through 2023, and what a year it's been!

When I walk into my office, one of the things I see immediately is this whiteboard, tracking our service to constituents:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-08-03-halfway&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=09fa2796-3432-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-08-03-halfway&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=09fa2796-3432-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba]

Here's what that means: So far this year, more than 2,600 constituents contacted our office because they were having trouble getting a federal agency to pay them money they were owed. Whether it was an income tax refund, a Social Security payment, military benefit, pension, or countless other mix-ups, my team pursued every claim, resulting in more than $9.7 million returned to the folks it belonged to.

Our government isn't perfect. But that just means we must keep pushing hard to tackle every challenge head-on. We're working around the clock to make sure no families get left behind.

Having good people in government is the key to making government work for the people.

My team's focus on integrity, service, and hard work exemplify what good government looks like. I can't wait to see what we can accomplish for New Jersey together throughout the rest of the year.

More soon,

Andy

Express Donate:
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
$5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2023-08-03-halfway&refcode2=09fa2796-3432-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&amounts=10,30,50,100,200] $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2023-08-03-halfway&refcode2=09fa2796-3432-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&amounts=10,30,50,100,200] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2023-08-03-halfway&refcode2=09fa2796-3432-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&amounts=10,30,50,100,200] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2023-08-03-halfway&refcode2=09fa2796-3432-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&amounts=10,30,50,100,200]

Andy Kim for Congress

Click here to update your email address or other information. [https://action.andykim.com/a/update-info?accessCode=cadab5a7-77fb-d146-d106-b2339536ac65&sspStartingTab=ContactInfo]

If you no longer want to hear from Andy, click here to get off all our lists instantly [https://action.andykim.com/a/unsubscribe?unsubscribedata=%2BcxMdkFZlO4iNMX5mWRNiW5rRgl3IJVM65nPVf8gqaDYrdIUOg3NXuezsQfXc9846JZ1srKE4hye%2FmGw94GwtCTHzriSmvmXYOuwJ2XKVw7WIFtnG%2FpicaHjlsxEQHM7D21N3wC7xr%2BN9%2BFXvs6XKBzNzyGc7REtdlZ4Ah2XcyKAMlqqqfpd7oMxQBI0fjDVCPuNJq%2BbJNu1SmY8jwfDSfEhOoAGmyJuN0oFtu3TJU0ed1ryM1G3RDE3FyM9nCfTp856ag3%2BTP1XWwzJArMhg8W5an5dFrQ5f1wX19x0cIclE20qO2nb%2B2yPqCS1InUk66FbgoLBGUHsUgLIlpOzKnNj5HElU2cQz3MVe6fBY3u6%2F81knAahg9xpfuicxqNUvjZoVsopndz7TzsVjqUXRsNUODis7NFMMEwkfRPFvb%2BRfYkgljVoNbqYnOefSsYZ] .

name: Team DPVA
subject: TBTL funded!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
We’re thrilled to announce that because of all of your support, we’ve fully funded our Take Back The Legislature digital program. This is exactly what Virginia Democrats coming together looks like, and this is how we’re going to win back the legislature this November!

|
---
Derek, We’re thrilled to announce that because of all of your support, we’ve fully funded our Take Back The Legislature digital program. | **Former President Donald Trump was just indicted on FOUR CRIMINAL COUNTS for attempting to overturn the free and fair 2020 presidential election.** If Trump wanted to create history... well I guess he got what he wanted 🤡. At this point, he has been impeached TWICE and indicted THREE times. Looks like the third time’s the charm!

**FWIW: A former president and political frontrunner's campaign schedule probably shouldn't include this many trips to the courthouse.**

Let’s get this straight — there is no way in hell that we can let Trump back in the White House. The fact that extremist Republicans are even backing him at this point is _simply embarrassing_ 🥱. **[Young voters kicked him out of office in 2020, and we can do it again. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Why I’m running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=1266%2E61531%2EYWnVdE)
Friend —
My name is Elissa Slotkin, and I am running for the United States Senate in Michigan.
I’m going to lay out more on why I’m running, but if you’re ready to join our campaign to win this open seat in Michigan and protect the Senate majority to our campaign right away you can use this link: https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5521?t=5&akid;=1266%2E61531%2EYWnVdE
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5521?t=6&t=20&akid=1266%2E61531%2EYWnVdE)
---
Service is how I’ve spent my life: I spent my career protecting our homeland. After 9/11, I was recruited into the CIA and served three tours in Iraq alongside the U.S. military. I went on to serve under Presidents of both parties in the White House, and then at the Pentagon.
But what motivated me to first run for elected office was my mom. She was diagnosed with stage IV ovarian cancer in 2009 – and she didn’t have health insurance. She had let it lapse after the insurance companies had gouged her for years because she happened to have a pre-existing condition. She passed away in 2011, but that experience – of desperately trying to get her care and then in the same moment we were filling out bankruptcy paperwork, forever changed me.
These experiences have shaped my time, my priorities, my approach to my four years in the U.S. House, and continue to serve as my motivation to run for Senate.
My experience in public service impacts how I’ve run my campaigns. Before my first run in 2018, I made a decision to not accept any donations from corporate PACs, because I never wanted my constituents to question why I vote the way I do.
My campaign for the U.S. Senate will also refuse money from corporate PACs. Not a dime.
Some people might see it as a disadvantage, especially since Senate campaigns are notoriously expensive. But I know that we can win when we’re powered by real people, contributing what they can, when they can.
To be upfront: Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources. When you’re running to win a seat in a swing state like Michigan, you can’t take anything for granted. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll be moved to support this campaign today.
**I would be honored if you would join me and Peter today by splitting a contribution of $10 today. Every dollar really does add up.**
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically and be split between Peter Welch and Elissa Slotkin:_

body:
Adding insult to injury. . .

Adding insult to injury. . . | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=11626505b537451e8965475e1361adae&_e=-vZzaAnbKs7-SZljQ7nnIfrrWN6yRzJK5A4TwZEdcZ0fuJxlj_15OsGmsE4bmUbyLkYNYYbc2ivRj2UN7HctBRcjDSv_jHxeDwmOo9hxwhd7FBaowwc9cKPBNIIUACu3mX5nj0yqfCEeqm_0O7dOiMXq7uZmYJiuMd6mwYThYF6PKNtDdi4InfNaUmr-UBToDFi04SXcneJJDfWLytJlpvF_auTogU-9dHbveq2-nP8juhUA0KKSQU_jwdxUz050HQX8LqNPN8mhZLJsYTyX4mtUqShXBAw1mqASMs9_k-FI0z6uHql8kp1-7mr7G7jhHY2at7UlbSH8ec2NzEZFRMwZygXdhp728WSEp5mT1FOYmuxF2Fx_awEmIWiNHpsXmBmfh8nT4kCtaU6QuklKhn_UGUi-ATIEa_gQtBvEWqE%3D)
---
| | Patriot,

---
The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed...
---
...But perhaps _most fraudulent_ of all is the disgraceful name that Biden's Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... _
_
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=11626505b537451e8965475e1361adae&_e=-vZzaAnbKs7-SZljQ7nnIfrrWN6yRzJK5A4TwZEdcZ0fuJxlj_15OsGmsE4bmUbyLkYNYYbc2ivRj2UN7HctBRcjDSv_jHxeDwmOo9hxwhd7FBaowwc9cKPBNIIUACu3mX5nj0yqfCEeqm_0O7dOiMXq7uZmYJiuMd6mwYThYF6PKNtDdi4InfNaUmr-UBToDFi04SXcneJJDfWLytJlpvF_auTogU-9dHbveq2-nP8juhUA0KKSQU_jwdxUz050HQX8LqNPN8mhZLJsYTyX4izLWZBXFB3qns8wGIBXidv5FSxOsnrOcMUzAyshSCGdPPxdqBzJDGGY1CtYvAWGtbrY6N9rWXGnvjwRTDDnC5ot0okHJ95E0PtbnwwXqpAceE0OUEaZFuthTPPkoFbI5mmBnj73o0pFXC1A4j_7AJ4%3D)
---
It should read _Biden v. the American People_ , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for.

---
We all know that the __REAL__ United States of America - the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running - proudly stand by my side.

---
Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: _**to put the United States of America FIRST.**_

---
After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for __America__.

---
As President, it was my honor to rescue America's economy, to secure America's borders, to renegotiate America's trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America's forgotten citizens.

---
Now, the Swamp that I'm on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: _" United States of America v. Donald J. Trump."_

---
**But I know that this is _NOT_ the _United States of America_.**

---
What we're living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic.

---
_The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice._

---
And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it.

---
With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the __**United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump**__.

clean_body: Adding insult to injury. . . Adding insult to injury. . . | | | | | Patriot, The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed... ...But perhaps most fraudulent of all is the disgraceful name that Biden's Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... It should read Biden v. the American People , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for. We all know that the REAL United States of America - the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running - proudly stand by my side. Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: to put the United States of America FIRST. After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for America. As President, it was my honor to rescue America's economy, to secure America's borders, to renegotiate America's trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America's forgotten citizens. Now, the Swamp that I'm on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: " United States of America v. Donald J. Trump." But I know that this is NOT the United States of America. What we're living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic. The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice. And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it. With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump. | - Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. body:
Sarah McBride could be the first openly transgender member of Congress. We couldn't be prouder to endorse her. |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67542717/420044860/-1667455293?sourceid=1051616&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2I2ODcyMS0zYTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WMuanPzydXp4dzdP6ZBBZ94r6MPZbQZKH7LNJ08A1t0=&emci=7cb68721-3a32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=8cb68721-3a32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934) Peter, **Sarah McBride (DE-AL)** could be the first openly transgender member of Congress. And today, **we couldn't be prouder to endorse her**.

Sarah's career in public service has been defined by a fierce commitment to fighting for the rights of women, children, families, the LGBTQ+ community, and marginalized groups in her home state of Delaware and across the country. She's also a fierce pro-choice champion: if elected to Congress, she'll stand up to Republican extremism and work to pass federal legislation protecting access to abortion care. **[Want to help elect trailblazers like Sarah across the country this cycle? Donate now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67542730/420044868/-1667455293?sourceid=1051616&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2I2ODcyMS0zYTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WMuanPzydXp4dzdP6ZBBZ94r6MPZbQZKH7LNJ08A1t0=&emci=7cb68721-3a32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=8cb68721-3a32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934):** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67542731/420044869/-1667455293?sourceid=1051616&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2I2ODcyMS0zYTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WMuanPzydXp4dzdP6ZBBZ94r6MPZbQZKH7LNJ08A1t0=&emci=7cb68721-3a32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=8cb68721-3a32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=5177934) Sarah McBride is the current state senator for Delaware's 1st Senate District, where she has been serving since 2020 _with the full support of EMILYs List_. She made history as the first openly transgender state senator in the country — and we're thrilled to help her make history once again in 2024.

We're living in a time when trans and reproductive rights have been disproportionately subject to hateful legislation. clean_body: Sarah McBride could be the first openly transgender member of Congress. We couldn't be prouder to endorse her. | | | Peter, Sarah McBride (DE-AL) could be the first openly transgender member of Congress. And today, we couldn't be prouder to endorse her. Sarah's career in public service has been defined by a fierce commitment to fighting for the rights of women, children, families, the LGBTQ+ community, and marginalized groups in her home state of Delaware and across the country. She's also a fierce pro-choice champion: if elected to Congress, she'll stand up to Republican extremism and work to pass federal legislation protecting access to abortion care. : Sarah McBride is the current state senator for Delaware's 1st Senate District, where she has been serving since 2020 with the full support of EMILYs List. She made history as the first openly transgender state senator in the country — and we're thrilled to help her make history once again in 2024. We're living in a time when trans and reproductive rights have been disproportionately subject to hateful legislation. It has never been more critical that we band together to affirm what Sarah understands firsthand: that everyone has the right to bodily autonomy, and everyone has the right to determine the course of their futures, their families, and their lives. **With Republicans' razor-thin House majority in play this cycle, every seat counts. clean_body: The largest organization working to elect pro-choice Democratic women has just endorsed Sarah’s campaign for Congress! | = We have some exciting news, everyone! EMILYs List, the largest organization working to elect pro-choice Democratic women, has just endorsed Sarah’s campaign for Congress! = EMILYs List joins more than two dozen Delaware elected officials ; UFCW Local 27 , the largest private-sector union in the state; and several LGBTQ+ organizations in backing Sarah’s campaign! This endorsement means so much because the work to protect reproductive rights, economic opportunity, racial justice, and LGBTQ+ rights are so intrinsically linked. And at a time when our rights have been under attack by the far right, Sarah has been a champion for us. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = LFG! \- Team McBride | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. name: Team Cori
subject: RE: Sign to guarantee housing as a human right:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori Bush understands how urgently we need housing justice for all. | |
---
Peter, As Co-Chair of the Congressional Caucus on Homelessness, Cori Bush just reintroduced the Unhoused Bill of Rights, which provides a blueprint for the federal government to permanently end the unhoused crisis by 2027. This legislation calls on the Department of Health and Human Services to declare the unhoused crisis a public health emergency, and calls for rigorous federal investments into homeless assistance programs, affordable housing initiatives, and wraparound services that keep people permanently housed. **With rising rental costs rapidly outpacing wages, more and more families are forced to live on the streets, where they are criminalized and dehumanized. Cori understands this urgency firsthand because she has been unhoused, living in a car with her two children.** **[Please sign on today to become a grassroots co-sponsor of Rep. Cori Bush’s Unhoused Bill of Rights, which affirms the dignity of unhoused people and lays out how we can secure housing as a human right.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl-vRswUTt0wSRsVUTolC16FlPmuDzJQydwN7_mJQ7OdzvzM1wplDXG6QWlZ6H5U1O6wVKQmBmjtgRFxTMA8AwToI4zWCHHze1R4ZcfVbRDlfqHA4xwBIHkH5Vm0L_qzuN4LjpoNmn5RBxLxh739NL0g-JMBFpiyz04uRZbelYI3BIBs4V76r8bLAOTRzKSyJEMtGAbrGACLBHl4vHCznnBEqtndxGZuezjnpmteME6R8Gy6Rgh2TOBnsV5gWjXu2YirPs0v9hRypNJlYpBMDEA7M4_hcN5cOHU1QMHXIwwmDyyooBtysYvQBTELknEim-jwg6ZN1r2y2hIkuFfDwW1TL1WzF2JWW_SNLAgWpEFaA/3yf/FEYwcFPbSOmZHiXZ6tVUPQ/h0/hauiBPVvX75aAENkhvU67yaszdgPOSX-q3f1WNBuUt0)** **[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl-vRswUTt0wSRsVUTolC16FlPmuDzJQydwN7_mJQ7OdzvzM1wplDXG6QWlZ6H5U1O6wVKQmBmjtgRFxTMA8AwTIsqXItnhO1VNTsbuxDrC4hWGJplQw_rFsfYHIWivb_tDJON-34zRHg-nA13w8j0FQCxrqcZlRCjDbY3t4RJLhtYlGSBU9V1AZjQMxPmPjpaap0DAYDaY73kcDz5gx55s-Up91KVWkOpqqU36WpqMsCxChmRGQu34u08YK_2fk2t9ow3L2zI5zU4pNbS9I0ASyV1HLxnwhAr_aFX5eWgErOVGqbYtLYmEC19gZ-qreQXvPFvG_WjGBPkxeMYr6kDW4iNDAkgSJ1-WMmFL0MOCog/3yf/FEYwcFPbSOmZHiXZ6tVUPQ/h1/TRNW6C4BGdZ7K20xoOmoR2N_s4_U7sk89o0_c3XxM9A) ** **Two years ago today, Cori led her fellow members of Congress in a 5-day demonstration to extend the federal eviction moratorium as it was set to expire.** Sleeping on the steps of the U.S. Capitol, she negotiated with the White House and Congress, and succeeded in delaying evictions and keeping 11 million people in their homes. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I put this op-ed in Fox News because I want Tommy Tuberville and Josh Hawley to see it.

body:
#
Peter,
As a Marine officer doing arms control negotiations, I saw how dangerous a single empty leadership position could be. But right now, Tommy Tuberville is blocking more than 200 military confirmations — and just took five weeks off for Senate recess.
**So today, I put this op-ed in Fox News because I want Tommy Tuberville, Josh Hawley, and every other Senate Republican to see it.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35393?t=1&akid=3501%2E614464%2EtzWFX6)
Senator Tuberville has let his own personal politics blind him to the pressing needs of American Armed Service members, military families, and our national security. The dangerous game he’s playing has a real impact on the day-to-day lives of working people across the country — and how our nation is perceived at critical negotiations and meetings around the globe.
**Please take a few minutes to learn more by reading my full op-ed:**
**[READ + SHARE THE FULL OP-ED →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35393?t=2&akid=3501%2E614464%2EtzWFX6)**
**Then, please consider chipping in $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today.** I’m running for U.S. Senate to take back power from politicians like Tommy Tuberville and Josh Hawley so we can finally put everyday Americans in charge of our country, like the people I deployed with and the folks in our community who took care of my family growing up.

Thanks to the generosity of hard-working folks like you, we were able to surpass our July end-of-month fundraising goal!

Every single grassroots donation – [**whether $5, $15, $50, or beyond**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67548122/420047659/-1509228828?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.03_b1_as_all-nd&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjdkZDM3NS0zZTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwo0ubSCd6DFJ3JB773aMyMZP7sXYHzPHs8ce4qchD4=) – made a massive impact in helping us hit our ambitious goal and secure the resources we need to defend OR-06 and take back the House Majority.

**You are fueling our fight for a better future, and I’m eternally grateful to have you by my side.**

Onward,
Andrea

subject: I sued the WEF

body:
The Great Uprising will defeat the Great Reset - just like we did in 1776.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=fff973fd725f44b3901aeaa9b811cd3c&_t=AZM_DANdd8t2_351KqNS_ojCOOBKVApcaQ9vmv9Odl2NFEypCxg0tu29fZBTkx8C2M2VtKCEItD2zJeXfi1ITe_mDXi0mc13suWFddw9t14%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=fff973fd725f44b3901aeaa9b811cd3c&_t=AZM_DANdd8t2_351KqNS_ojCOOBKVApcaQ9vmv9Odl2NFEypCxg0tu29fZBTkx8C2M2VtKCEItD2zJeXfi1ITe_mDXi0mc13suWFddw9t14%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=fff973fd725f44b3901aeaa9b811cd3c&_e=WzoTJ10COKTo05mFtXo-owxMaTr-zR5sp1i2B8ux2nAdUbQ_5eCdJyWInXvhGaPpXFYmgq4RWXkzl98zQGt-YOeyYt6DcLanW84lqahwqnfykzrgnbyTNg12FA7FC2VxS6FWFpFUYR7lrtRlhza3zDgliR--hxvihllbjls3nxjY6As8CvWrdftYD9JpTbTqmYTLxZyFC-O9jfcKni3-JnfE9REOCtMSkafQlzjmrsAlN1eMDzOhVk7s7kVdMZFnqu71_Y-1nVMm8eiYMFOl7A4gjla413YReTO1RnZX7sOFvKq7BNGVgfXw6HJRsxTuFIrhVsSS95McnwNmTNHkMhz2CWzFMk3J2F0ZzihDvb1wrumIb5y3kHXaNSglLyUJAkvy-yTzAHN_oaBFzA3Pqg%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

I've been the leading opponent in America of the World Economic Forum's agenda, through two books and my most recent company Strive which finally put BlackRock & the ESG movement on their back foot.

Two years ago, WEF tried to throw false bait by naming me a "Young Global Leader" when I explicitly rejected their ridiculous award. They repeatedly failed to remove my name despite escalating demands.

**So I sued them._And they just apologized to me._**

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=fff973fd725f44b3901aeaa9b811cd3c&_e=WzoTJ10COKTo05mFtXo-owxMaTr-zR5sp1i2B8ux2nAdUbQ_5eCdJyWInXvhGaPpXFYmgq4RWXkzl98zQGt-YOeyYt6DcLanW84lqahwqnfykzrgnbyTNg12FA7FC2VxS6FWFpFUYR7lrtRlhza3zDgliR--hxvihllbjls3nxjY6As8CvWrdftYD9JpTbTqmYTLxZyFC-O9jfcKni3-JnfE9REOCtMSkafQlzjmrsAlN1eMDzOhVk7s7kVdMZFnoPk2DryX4v7iChdQEkHXPVYAhj6GqD33hN82724v8q04kZ8GN8uwr9yShLw0yuTSoDZZ92FQDX-7mkDClR7Hot9UN43EgdM2hoaLOAiSzEOwqCABFjkgExKjxxhhUyHd1fnqlYFDBHdx7sslk6xZYg%3D%3D)
They met all of my demands in the lawsuit: public apology & disavowal and a commitment to never name someone again without their explicit permission.

**The Great Uprising will defeat the Great Reset - just like we did in 1776.**
