**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: Game of Inches
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hearing sports stories from LaVell, I've managed to see many parallels between football and politics. | | | | |
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
My father-in-law, legendary BYU football coach LaVell Edwards, always loved to tell stories about games. From those stories, I’ve managed to see many parallels between football and politics.
One important similarity? Both are a game of inches.
Some of LaVell’s best stories were about wins that came down to a single yard–or less. Each of those stories required each player to give their all–from muscling in for a touchdown or stopping an opponent just short of the goal line.
In this race for Congress, we are in a game of inches. With less than two weeks before ballots drop, our campaign is doing everything we can to ensure a victory. And I’d love to have you be a part of this team, Team Becky!
| [VOLUNTEER](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=9b3d3b1cbb&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
**Will you volunteer today to help make calls, knock doors, and meet voters throughout this district?**
Gratefully,
Becky

|
---

name: Will Hurd
subject: I wish my opponents did this instead.
body:
| | | I can't take it, my friend. My opponents are targeting my friends in the LGBTQ community – _**and it's not okay**_ Look, my uncles, Lester and Steve were gay. They were the first to welcome my Dad, who is black, into my Mom's family. They gave me my first computer and have been exemplary role models in my life. It's 2023, and the attacks are outdated and homophobic. _**Honestly, I wish my opponents would focus on defeating Putin and his enemies rather than attacking the LGBTQ community.**_ The Republican position used to be that we believe the government should get out of our personal lives. What happened? We have real problems we need to tackle and this ain't it. [_**That's why I'm focusing on the real kitchen table issues that matter to you. Please donate $1 today and help me reach 40,000 donors to qualify for the debate so I can take this message directly to the American people.**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=34d89e461aaa44c78b8907f4a4a14a11&_m=3bcb3524347247e5bc1d10417b816d13&_e=5Y04DllNptHO6-qB_PcYiF1EprL5duUZ3gdvsE1CCRS48HZO1lMDA8sbnDzETzdedoSu_fpEDqMJk5Oahlkw10_HxxkeK_KhHcU_Aj_dIuqP0cJwZ0LesMpsYQ0UbuMSBFuO0bq0V5KV5Wng_e6kdIC88VSF_y0fMNcm2ZaWG_OZrWoka_PBKIUMjy1ZISgB-N_Vg21O8tK7iD9IujgIFiU9wnehjneMG8iQ5ygEWdB_O4RrsRfk3Tra0osxePXZ-P7SAgFltD5mzGeh1LBKQGkF1VDYp5C6r6BYWY-TwNt_ohXR44_NnqIX0qinlCCkSzmECCUapav5GKnINeadm0u4CeW3fWGxqGtxXKHFrTLL3wBBQBdtqvKepMvXx-nG)

name: Will Hurd
subject: Boos, Fairs, Metals
body:
Three things that need more attention.
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _Welcome to The Brief! Common sense takes on current events, national security, and technology and the latest campaign info. It’s designed to make you smarter in less than 5 minutes! If you were forwarded this message, you can get_[ _The Brief here_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK3HofPTZ52skVcIVF1ctGXlSxY/iDOse4yC5qm5) _._
---
| Dear Friends,
Once again, the news is consumed by Donald’s Trump baggage. Those that answered our survey on his latest indictment were pretty clear on your opinions (thanks to everyone who filled it out btw):
---
| [ ](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK3HofPU1Pl5AtyOQPHgieMkCfc/kI56yiTwx-09)
---
| [ ](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK3HofPUTkTHbIKULZXkY2BiwNg/mHGQ6pxDeFFm)
---
| I was recently in Iowa and expressed my honest opinion about why I thought Trump was running, and got an expected response from the folks I was talking to. Nobody has been talking about the Department of Defense having to issue mining contracts, but we should care because it’s one more example of how the New Cold War with China continues to escalate. Last week was Iowa, this week is New Hampshire to focus on one of my favorite topics. Here are 3 perspectives that haven’t gotten proper attention since we last talked.
---
| | [](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK3HofPUw5BU1ggaGjnoNQ0hg5k/0JEn96BeQt76)
---
---
| | | | |
### 1\. BOOS IN IOWA
---

| | | | |
---
| Photo: Speaking at the Iowa Lincoln Day Dinner, July 28
**Big Picture:** Last week most of the Republican candidates for President were in Iowa speaking at a Lincoln Day dinner hosted by the Iowa Republican Party.
* I was the only one that was brutally honest. Because of my honesty, [I got some boos.](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK3HofPVOPtgS52gBu3sCnpgPno/835x31ea415v)

**Why It Matters:** Despite what nationwide polls say about Donald Trump’s position within the GOP, more Americans dislike him than like him.
* I knew being honest and saying what most people believe – that Donald Trump is running for President in order to stay out of prison– was going to elicit boos.

I did it anyway because I was there to talk to the modern Republicans who believe personal responsibility matters, character matters, and service above self matters. FYI – I’m going to keep doing it.
**Bottom Line:** When people ask me why I am running for president my answer is simple- we need common sense in these complicated times. Part of leadership is standing up for what is true and right, even if it might be unpopular.
---

| | | | |
### 2\. RARE METALS AND INDEPENDENCE FROM CHINA
---

|
---
| Photo: Image of Gallium
**Big Picture:** The Pentagon has begun issuing gallium and germanium recovery contracts as a result of Chinese restrictions on the [export of certain metals](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK3HofPVqkbssTOm74Jw2Bef9Vs/CRMBU_3uDrbi).
* China accounts for some 94 percent of the world's gallium and 83 percent of germanium and currently provides around half of U.S. supplies.

**Why It Matters:** Gallium is found in semiconductors, LEDs, and solar panels. Germanium is used in fiber optics and infrared optics. Both elements are essential in advanced military hardware like radars and satellite systems.
* Limited access or geopolitical tensions can disrupt supply, potentially affecting U.S. military readiness and the broader economy.

**Bottom Line:** Dependency on these elements presents a strategic vulnerability that extends beyond the military to include the technology industry, renewable energy, and innovation. The U.S. must navigate these risks to maintain technological leadership and national security.
---

|
### 3\. FIRST FRIDAY IN CONCORD, NEW HAMPSHIRE
---
|
---
| **Big Picture:** I am excited to be back in New Hampshire later this week for a variety of campaign stops.
**A Fun Itinerary:** Every trip to the Granite State has been better than the last. This time I am looking forward to visiting [Brown’s Lobster Pound](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK3HofPWJ5K5Irks2EZzrZTdtDw/GQp_RrTZ002N) and downtown [Concord’s First Friday street festival](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK3HofPWlQ2HjG6xxOq3gxIccw0/gIDMmhxgbcoX).
**Bottom Line:** Meeting everyday Americans is my favorite part of running for President. When I talk to people I am reminded why I am doing this- because we are better together and more unites us than divides us. Campaign events like this are not only a great way to meet voters but they are tons of fun. If you live in Southern New Hampshire please stop by, I would love to catch up. [Click here ](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK3HofPXDkkU9eT3sZ67WL7bMe4/JK9o9Mf8rVAB)to help us talk to more people and qualify for the debate stage. Even donating $1 helps!

---

| Thanks for subscribing and reading all the way to the end - I really appreciate you.
If you have 30 seconds, I need your help to double the number of our subscribers to The Brief. Please forward this to two friends that you think would enjoy or benefit from it.
Thank you! God bless America and don’t forget to [donate today!](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SMK3HofPXg5Sga2p9njMBLiwa6M8/71zyKGq1dLWk) Will Hurd
---

| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---

_If you need to remove yourself from our email list_[ _Unsubscribe_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/un/sh/1t6AnZalV01oEF4hw0Vm4ZTOhCQaIu/1ima36dl6ZnW) _._
_Was this message forwarded to you?_[_**Sign up**_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6AnZZCzCBDjyxZMn1f4Z2x892WtY/eNaVrcObO8zI) _now to get The Brief in your email._
---

---|---
| [ ](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6AnZZCzFxCmzZWVFvjnCfHr8c0ma/1L_5oG4MdJb9) |
---|---
| [ ](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6AnZZCzHqCJUsV4UNm9WTSDdOkj6/xityFNuNTLcR)
---
| | | | | Will Hurd - United States

name: Team Fetterman
subject: The threat to democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
One thing is plain: The threat to our democracy hasn’t gone anywhere.
#
We’ve got to stay vigilant, Derek.
Today, Donald Trump was arraigned for conspiracy and fraud allegations during the incredibly dangerous period after the 2020 election that culminated in the January 6th attack on our nation’s Capitol. We now know the scope of the allegations in this indictment includes trying to overturn our 2020 election results here in Pennsylvania.
While he’s innocent until proven guilty, and we have to let the process play out, one thing is plain: **The threat to our democracy hasn’t gone anywhere.** All of us have to continue to stand up for our fundamental rights and the rule of law.
**[John is in the Senate to fight for democracy + hold insurrectionists accountable. If you’re with us in that mission, will you chip in to power that work today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230803-1?refcode=em20230803-1-8490&refcode2=8490_434096_8cxTsg&akid=8490%2E434096%2E8cxTsg)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230803-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230803-8490&refcode2=8490_434096_8cxTsg&akid=8490%2E434096%2E8cxTsg)**
This is about more than one guy, Derek.
Right after the 2020 election, attempts were being made to submit fraudulent results from Pennsylvania. On January 5, 2021 -- one day before the attack on the Capitol -- the PA GOP ejected John from the Senate chamber so they could unlawfully stop a state senator from being sworn in. And then on January 6, dozens of GOP members of the House and Senate objected to certifying the 2020 election, at the urging of the former president.
John’s in the Senate now and he takes the threats against our democracy seriously. No matter your political beliefs, as Americans everybody should be horrified about the plot to overturn the election. We have to come together to prevent threats like January 6th from happening again.
**[John’s ready to take on anyone who comes for our democracy. Help us power that work with a contribution of any amount today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230803-1?refcode=em20230803-1-8490&refcode2=8490_434096_8cxTsg&akid=8490%2E434096%2E8cxTsg)**
Thanks for your support! 🙏
💛 Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230803-8490-footer&t=1&refcode2=8490_434096_8cxTsg&akid=8490%2E434096%2E8cxTsg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8490%2E434096%2E8cxTsg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8490%2E434096%2E8cxTsg)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Ohio Democrats
subject: Ohio Republicans are trying to change the rules to benefit their anti-abortion agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Five days left in this battle for reproductive rights
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67549086/420051155/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTcxMDg2Ni00MTMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LCm0Wdc7CddsWJVJiikjNMl-XqwHWwJPWRbj64ULCkc=) | Hi team —

Anti-choice Republicans in Ohio know they can't win at the ballot box, so they're trying to change the rules. With Election Day less than a week away, Ohioans need your help to fight back.

On Tuesday, Ohio voters will head to the polls to vote on "Issue 1," a sham initiative from anti-choice Republicans that is intended to block a constitutional amendment guaranteeing reproduction freedom in the Buckeye State.

Issue 1 would raise the minimum threshold to pass citizen-led constitutional amendments to 60%.

clean_body: Five days left in this battle for reproductive rights = | Hi team — Anti-choice Republicans in Ohio know they can't win at the ballot box, so they're trying to change the rules. With Election Day less than a week away, Ohioans need your help to fight back. On Tuesday, Ohio voters will head to the polls to vote on "Issue 1," a sham initiative from anti-choice Republicans that is intended to block a constitutional amendment guaranteeing reproduction freedom in the Buckeye State. Issue 1 would raise the minimum threshold to pass citizen-led constitutional amendments to 60%. Donald J. Trump July 31st, 2023
Today, Ron DeSanctimonious recited his DeSanctinomics plan before tens of people.
If it sounded awfully familiar, it’s because virtually everything he said was plagiarized from President Trump’s playbook for an America First economic agenda that built the World’s strongest economy twice.
Even Ron’s so-called “Declaration of Economic Independence” was lifted word-for-word from one of President Trump’s speeches from June 2016.
[](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j71u4zAQhJ9m1dnYXf6JBYuzdSrOhzQJkLSyubKYSLYg0jH89oGCIO18gw8z3TSPqX8EcDtgHlLMwAzqDzAf9O7tyR5eD83m3_-_y6axRt9XyntgLo9Zfqs_lq1MXRrX1DVVDIZ7wkoCWU_oHTpXDcGwpxjVyURiIyhWevLc09FSrb3WVQqMrLBGxUSEvFXiDMUjWeeVmM6Dxij549rH66Ub43tZbtO8PV2nagxDKXP-3tQCt-WeSpFlZcDtyyDPRT7lsh_kdjkDt7l05ZaBW7K1RY21qo1BJrZYg2ozqIaxWkKc72kcU7YONJ7Xj6vyKwAA__8m3Vqi)
While DeSantis continues to cosplay as President Trump, his economic record is crystal clear: Ron called for a new 23% national sales tax hike, opposed President Trump’s tough-on-China tariffs, and has led Florida to massive price hikes.

_**Ron DeSantis Supported Obama’s Globalist Trans Pacific Partnership, But Opposed President Trump’s America First Tariffs on China**_
In 2015, [DeSantis voted to fast-track Obama’s globalist trade deal](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j81OwzAQhJ_GuTXyrv-Sgw-UkgNFXOFqYjsxdeoodhv17ZER4rSrmdGnGbOsMfiHJupIEOdgM0Ek7Ikgnvnx812eP86nw-vby3Y4ScH36uIzQSyP1f1H_yitW0yIVVWnxmqBHmjjNMgeaK-oUs2sPUeQnHkpOuGw86Kj3lunDPCRW5BN0EiR0Y4yBACKLXNKgP0CqXrmhOkJp9blS_I2XU2032W7LWs7pqWJei5lzb-dBoLDvu_tlO5lM-OlvWWCw5iu0-Zyfe-puHoB-AEpCILDzCQ2m7brHmIMWSrC6VQnVfpPAAAA__-BVFaq) known as the “Trans Pacific Partnership.”
DeSantis also [voted against the TAA](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8jzFv-yAUxD8N3mI9HoYXDwz__N0MTdWhHdotwgHHtNggoIry7StXVde70-_uzJKCn-6a0YEhzt4WhsjEP4Z46g7vz-r0dhp2j08PeTco2d02F_8zxHpP7i_6S2ndYnzYVBoaqyVOHBqnueo59AREzaxRUU-4NwoMTMKg60bb0ygnCRdBo2q8RkABexDIOQdshSPJ7cgV9cJJ07MOrCufcbJxNcF-1Py1pPYSlyboudZUfjYdGR5HE0KsyVlv2pivDI8vcT0P7tWs1ReGEul8ies1u1L8BjvPvtSY703WNt18CL4oYh1ct19bxXcAAAD__5fLW3c) (trade adjustment assistance) that would have provided American workers displaced by foreign trade agreements with job training and services.
When President Trump stood up to China in order to protect American farmers from Chinese retaliation, Ron DeSantis opposed.
“I’m not somebody that advocates tariffs. I want to have lower barriers and I want to have free trade,” [DeSantis said in a 2018 Fox Business interview](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8jz1vszAURn-N2YLuhz_iwcObl2Zoqq7tarAJbkxAQIvy7ytXVdfnHB3d68c5p_7hhDkJoiGFVRAJ_ieILvL0_qovb5fm8PzytBwareReKP0XRNtjjn_qb6WOo0-5rKapglPUI1TRobYI1oAx1eAIPLa2Y0DNkTvb9YaCBdtKfZTsbZUcATEcgQkRgWqORmFoURvLUXkrJIS43qY-THefw8e2fI5z3U1jld2wbfP6c9NZ0Hnf97r3XWyn6VaEMvmtGwrl85fgBgGVVoq0VKCA-ChIL7EX3KyDX9L9Wi0uzHvKOa3aCAnX8mFpfQcAAP__H8tZwg).
In a separate interview, DeSantis said, “I think that’s part of it, and I think China – and [President Trump] has been tough on China, and I think it’s been well documented, some of their practices. And I think those need to be addressed - whether tariffs are the best way or not, I mean we can debate that.”
DeSantis recently flip-flopped on the issue, now saying that he supports President Trump’s tough-on-China tariffs, which ensured fair and reciprocal trade for American workers.

I wanted to send you a thank you for being on our team, it means a lot. The last few days of July went by so fast — trying to wrap up important work in Washington before Congress goes on recess through Labor Day. And for the next few weeks I’ll be back home in the 2nd District.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67549385/420052166/-1565799793?refcode=EM_FL_VAS_20230803_na_ty_cand_nc_od30sub_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGU3Y2MxMy00MzMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9yqQ0nmto7UBh9UCd75Yz5_YDBd6nAZSV0f2h5DuKDk=)

_(A photo I took of New Mexico welcoming Suki and I home)_
While I’m in the district, there’s plenty of work to be done. Because when we get back to DC? It’ll be full steam ahead to get the Farm Bill done and deliver for New Mexico families.
My team and I will be meeting with local farmers to talk about the Farm Bill, hearing from oil and gas workers about their working conditions, and much, much more.
I look forward to sharing updates from the district over the next few weeks!
Thanks, as always,
Gabe
** **
| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

And for the next few weeks I’ll be back home in the 2nd District. | = (A photo I took of New Mexico welcoming Suki and I home) While I’m in the district, there’s plenty of work to be done. Because when we get back to DC? It’ll be full steam ahead to get the Farm Bill done and deliver for New Mexico families. My team and I will be meeting with local farmers to talk about the Farm Bill, hearing from oil and gas workers about their working conditions, and much, much more. I look forward to sharing updates from the district over the next few weeks! Thanks, as always, Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
Here’s how the OLIGARCH Act works: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTviAfDV2ky2wGkQhITKtRtvZUOmnNyFc4-JZkEAhNbiaa5YBQyDQteZ77MKbC3IQmjn0H1fLRDvQUx5Ts3GFnnilP1pIZqAQ-QWYtKBmVspghDDUsydTJqDx7WetRs55VRc6DCdCb9BKIA19k93urMPkrqx3G8l-bkGwwhVzP6moyyn7SF4f5LhG_3hDwVRvxt1CL1Ny5QAgIsRupC3GOy05btV2cWs-5bMaDTvduelX7Umn7P26aekgNTcgf7VHCe/3yf/bMVV1Ai2TJ6eANtre9KplQ/h0/XTaq2JKam9j67OPemSRh1xd8Mxhka_Dmik05r-eIASs)
---
Friend, Our residents are struggling. The richest 0.1% now have more than five times the combined wealth of 50% of Americans. This extreme concentration of wealth not only threatens our ability to build a thriving middle class, but it also threatens our democracy. During the 2022 midterm election, billionaires spent more than $1 billion in an attempt to elect right-wing candidates who seek to take away our rights while further padding the pockets of the ultra-wealthy.1 And now, thanks to recent bombshell reports, we’ve learned that billionaires are also buying Supreme Court justices through lavish vacations, gifts, and even paying for their family’s private school education.2 **In order to close the wealth gap and rein in power and influence by the ultra-wealthy, we need a wealth tax.** That’s why, along with Reps. Barbara Lee, Summer Lee, and Jamaal Bowman, I’ve introduced the **_OLIGARCH Act_** , which taxes extreme wealth that’s 1,000 or more than the average U.S. household. As inequality grows, millionaires and billionaires would pay more in taxes, but as it lessens, they’d pay less, bringing us closer to equality. [**Click here to add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _OLIGARCH Act_****to place a wealth tax on the richest 0.1% and address runaway wealth inequality.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuNKoA4jTAWLATN68fZgYC_iSeh9O0zJeF1E2AErRpxHtVH90IqdesLuLFUun14msgD7_GaqG2ejjoLOB1-EmZ-Y32kUz320KQiR91R0rcDsnRRs7gt77c6t-QSbMsp52yAm6T9yQKCfICvYnlfnHtZAysTwMQRTcmzlZ0u_0o11HeTtMeArJ8WgqKvzxMBNTXJVnIGYxb5G0CxBSe926mX2F9lvhfTtdgUMJv1F5lVsp0J4GKo8snD6zGBZyvlrY3xCvkLqyj4NdcJ-DyvfdADbg2iHprXsne3JhkEVtJlsea-bVSJkoEzCFgfc7E5tWomSHc2JvZKm65Xyg7hzJ7W3oKcD8D4tYXMzLLKM4s4yiSy3KlhPs76xVws2y8i8g8ad5qWlSwNZMCmXwAq7aaIw/3yf/bMVV1Ai2TJ6eANtre9KplQ/h1/wB10i9YgB3cuxEbNGPy5UoYEHb2dQJVNfeFYuHR72iU) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuNKoA4jTAWLATN68fZgYC_iSeh9O0zJeF1E2AErRpxHtVH90IqdesLuLFUun14msgD7_GaqG2ejjoLOB1-EmZ-fXFbdlBVOQPUp1SZ_8UMk6I36i7wxjECI-NitQ9taV1nYs3KSB6U7WYD1dj2Z7LhmRbnQOiJms0qDzCVEAdtr1RhYmKCsRICVwPdTN3XpRYUKCWXv4p3lojGG-04B2T7AORppLcEms2BSFMbVNWp_SjG4Dl4qNV5pXSFIGPG7cBxxjiaZGvXXruT6_F77nNiOK2-EHL6cBauz8mOJGwB3mxpf2r766PIV_CMouz3KY8KrCBJcsGIpVFvl3go_f4qffITTiWKlKK42jGnYSdOKFXYpMQ783VwvPKUOFMsVOFIob_-O6cSa_KJqFCt6sR6A/3yf/bMVV1Ai2TJ6eANtre9KplQ/h2/uLFrv4l5Y-TVRs52I0CQ0IFvGbq_5YMGD226IEPn_tU)
---
There are four tax tiers in the _OLIGARCH Act_ with the lowest applying to households with between $121 million and $1.21 billion in wealth. **Here’s how it would work:**

* 2% tax for all wealth between 1,000 and 10,000 times median household wealth **(currently $121 million to $1.21 billion)** ;
* 4% tax for all wealth between 10,000 and 100,000 times median household wealth;
* 6% tax for all wealth between 100,000 and 1,000,000 times median household wealth;
* 8% tax for all wealth over 1,000,000 times median household wealth **(currently $121 billion)**

The _OLIGARCH Act_ also ensures that the richest 0.1% are audited by the IRS at at least a 30% rate and it establishes penalties on tax cheats who underreport their assets.
[**Add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _OLIGARCH Act_****today!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuNKoA4jTAWLATN68fZgYC_iSeh9O0zJeF1E2AErRpxHtVH90IqdesLuLFUun14msgD7_GaqG2ejjoLOB1-EmZ-X--SYM1GYDqAoHyLOLaB5d8zPcy2MsCmSonzPrE5Ys5NYTDIN-NbqwaTk7eSdL4FJS8E96a2nQYuqphcbVRL4uS-qyZnW81tP6afaCBRip6TqLHpQygMXz1cjs1txZNVvYyrqX5BAR2EfsaWCzaNa8QV4evNy-QSsMpbGsxaJronO8P_cXZ3wnojrwj6WrLhXMNOuAsBXivLdsK0VewUWQQJLrDmeaVKJs1HeF3M-ctLfGI7pAWyTXU0j9iGAFVTDXMGg6Yz3etM582jsYUl65o9x1dR1oNrxy0DnKvpkaakJgrw0Xn6G7HHiy-BjqNjw/3yf/bMVV1Ai2TJ6eANtre9KplQ/h3/PhzBif_P3Wq-PYZ3rPtZgBRHL27VK_F2b5Hfh6LN99s)
Economic inequality is a policy choice, put in place by millionaires and billionaires, and the politicians they buy. Together, we’re fighting back, demanding an economy that works for everyone, not just the wealthy few.
Always serving you,
Rashida

Fellow American,

I’m Kevin Lincoln, the conservative Republican who is running to defeat leftist Josh Harder in California’s highly-targeted 9th Congressional District – _one of the most competitive House races in the country._

**I’m a Marine Corps veteran, mayor of my hometown of Stockton, a proud father & husband, and I’m running to rescue American families and workers from Washington D.C.’s broken politics.**

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2141fc4fd5eb42fe960843edf33f9240&_e=2ZSTYPPWTJyB1kBwY2tuKSFXLtfDM3q75RKons1nMB-pYrNCWfspmhCWeBhByCdqdmrzW7q7OUxXaPQNyzVjVBGSwmF0Jdkg2M6EXVwfgs380qx0tXcWzVgUxueFj3IcQA_hkh2XzXFzQSH1cQsWxiOsMalvcpQElHh0k6EA83Cgy9BsLPzexextwTOPH5QJyTRIpOcJ8ol4ZR9S3K6UIjrDSw3nP1DhweJhzcncuRImtJRttM_yasjv4i8xA5yfLOsIlQpGL9QrK1sOwf9E7gBvrqNjZ5VLaujxmRprIXIEjBgmukLasme0r2XvxQ3zGrDFwOXlX-oCKFMhZTRGrs-1A2zPzVRXYskCKtLzK4wX48hKbqhfcORbbbgsu49rig8efRjxX-QWmFXD5asPUQ%3D%3D)
Service has always defined my life. I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001 and became a military police officer.

After 9/11, I was assigned to Marine One to serve and protect the President of the United States.

When I completed my military service, I graduated from college while working full time and raising a family. But my urge to serve hadn’t gone. I continued to serve my community as a pastor and as a non-profit leader.

**Now, one of the greatest honors of my life is being able to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton, California.**

As Mayor, my team and I have revitalized our local economy, attracted businesses that have created jobs, balanced our budget, tackled homelessness, and reduced violent crime.

America as a whole is suffering these same problems, but the politicians in the White House and Congress don’t have what it takes to fix them.

**I do, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. My country needs me again, and I’m ready to serve.**

[**Will you send in a Marine and mayor to fix Washington’s broken politics and get our country back on track by supporting my campaign with a $5, $10 or $15 contribution today?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2141fc4fd5eb42fe960843edf33f9240&_e=2ZSTYPPWTJyB1kBwY2tuKSFXLtfDM3q75RKons1nMB-pYrNCWfspmhCWeBhByCdqdmrzW7q7OUxXaPQNyzVjVBGSwmF0Jdkg2M6EXVwfgs380qx0tXcWzVgUxueFj3IcQA_hkh2XzXFzQSH1cQsWxiOsMalvcpQElHh0k6EA83Cgy9BsLPzexextwTOPH5QJyTRIpOcJ8ol4ZR9S3K6UIjrDSw3nP1DhweJhzcncuRIctWzOtOTpNsXyfGTRX7UtcO5UWBQlPhDTytUUY-QOAOckDLVtm-6KbE78RMJ2ONmbivQ1QqLSPNWdevVFyokE-UuyFYl57ygc9PAW5sSZ_D_Stk_kyeQDmftL-40J1pQMbwEt2Jz86RFEK97kxzysO-3ev-a1P5DslOBTPNGVng%3D%3D)

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2141fc4fd5eb42fe960843edf33f9240&_e=2ZSTYPPWTJyB1kBwY2tuKSFXLtfDM3q75RKons1nMB-pYrNCWfspmhCWeBhByCdqdmrzW7q7OUxXaPQNyzVjVBGSwmF0Jdkg2M6EXVwfgs380qx0tXcWzVgUxueFj3IcQA_hkh2XzXFzQSH1cQsWxiOsMalvcpQElHh0k6EA83Cgy9BsLPzexextwTOPH5QJyTRIpOcJ8ol4ZR9S3K6UIjrDSw3nP1DhweJhzcncuRLbnouR6Ehn752CA5xbWtYnD0kC7J9GFmu6jDKPW_0SrCLYbctH1UdEKN5dRnxJRg9rK7IpgyqAJMeSv0M1CX7RWpsys-ZURFDekrCyMn29Z8--VmYL_rOwyoU8alwyf36YatFKufWFPaYRHYFH9SlWJHq-NIWKQT1opjuPBCEYWw%3D%3D)
Career politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Josh Harder have created the mess we’re in, so why would we think they could get us out of it?

We need to get inflation under control, revive our economy, reprioritize public safety, support our veterans, and make the politicians in Washington D.C. work for and serve the American people once again.

**California’s 9th Congressional District is a toss-up, top-target House seat and one of our best chances to defeat a career Democrat politician and restore conservative representation.**

[**But I need your help to win the fight so I can make it to Congress and get to work. Will you send in a Marine and mayor? Please join me today with a contribution of just $5, $10, $15 or more.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2141fc4fd5eb42fe960843edf33f9240&_e=2ZSTYPPWTJyB1kBwY2tuKSFXLtfDM3q75RKons1nMB-pYrNCWfspmhCWeBhByCdqdmrzW7q7OUxXaPQNyzVjVBGSwmF0Jdkg2M6EXVwfgs380qx0tXcWzVgUxueFj3IcQA_hkh2XzXFzQSH1cQsWxiOsMalvcpQElHh0k6EA83Cgy9BsLPzexextwTOPH5QJyTRIpOcJ8ol4ZR9S3K6UIjrDSw3nP1DhweJhzcncuRJ64I5g1ZhyPAPS3YZhG3D2hLkVAeb8K-WTo4wUT0ntH5yp99UlNY5rAwXXxEsDFOpl1FWBIqVMGkPky30LycCbYtUcotAxstZsRLVt0EJkqPI_oU1p4X-r6T5wc78K6tCMSHhCrRQLi0xdV_F_DntlOCPh3XNs9ahXPOr1yI44lw%3D%3D)

For America,

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2141fc4fd5eb42fe960843edf33f9240&_e=2ZSTYPPWTJyB1kBwY2tuKSFXLtfDM3q75RKons1nMB-pYrNCWfspmhCWeBhByCdqdmrzW7q7OUxXaPQNyzVjVBGSwmF0Jdkg2M6EXVwfgs380qx0tXcWzVgUxueFj3IcQA_hkh2XzXFzQSH1cQsWxiOsMalvcpQElHh0k6EA83Cgy9BsLPzexextwTOPH5QJyTRIpOcJ8ol4ZR9S3K6UIjrDSw3nP1DhweJhzcncuRJ9OAbsArOpFq2I3Wez9_hseGBSiCWKgT74h024aq9ptM7mIBgdhT9McOibmm6nk7RxUbps0oO74Kkzu8ka2fBGgErf_5FMWkWm58yY5pUOat3a7W6YKTcc-64V0PPcigSQSDLBXRq_tOX8aXAMZASYDrlz87VZvSb0liISay14Sg%3D%3D)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

clean_body: Will you send in a Marine and mayor to fix Washington’s broken politics and get our country back on track? | | Fellow American, I’m Kevin Lincoln, the conservative Republican who is running to defeat leftist Josh Harder in California’s highly-targeted 9th Congressional District – one of the most competitive House races in the country. I’m a Marine Corps veteran, mayor of my hometown of Stockton, a proud father & husband, and I’m running to rescue American families and workers from Washington D.C.’s broken politics. Service has always defined my life. I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001 and became a military police officer. After 9/11, I was assigned to Marine One to serve and protect the President of the United States. When I completed my military service, I graduated from college while working full time and raising a family. But my urge to serve hadn’t gone. I continued to serve my community as a pastor and as a non-profit leader. Now, one of the greatest honors of my life is being able to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton, California. As Mayor, my team and I have revitalized our local economy, attracted businesses that have created jobs, balanced our budget, tackled homelessness, and reduced violent crime. America as a whole is suffering these same problems, but the politicians in the White House and Congress don’t have what it takes to fix them. I do, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. My country needs me again, and I’m ready to serve. Career politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Josh Harder have created the mess we’re in, so why would we think they could get us out of it? We need to get inflation under control, revive our economy, reprioritize public safety, support our veterans, and make the politicians in Washington D.C. work for and serve the American people once again. California’s 9th Congressional District is a toss-up, top-target House seat and one of our best chances to defeat a career Democrat politician and restore conservative representation. For America, Kevin Lincoln Veteran, USMC Republican for Congress | Meet Kevin Lincoln My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran. Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader. I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton. Like , Follow , and Subscribe! | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I wanted to reach out to say thank you for your generous support of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC.

**We surpassed our July fundraising goal thanks to your overwhelming support.** ❤️ Our team effort shows the grassroots strength of the climate movement at this crucial time.

There is so much more work to be done as we continue to support pivotal elections for our climate champions across the country in 2023 and beyond. We cannot do this work without your ongoing support, and I’m so grateful for every dollar you invest in our program.

We’re lucky to have you on our side as we fight back against the fossil fuel industry’s greed and hold their political allies accountable.

Let’s fight like hell together,

Jane Fonda [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67549858/420054127/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230803-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhOTYwMGNmLTQ2MzItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QKhksDcvUym-TtsbOK0qs6mhr61kCb9vqrN7EkXOeMM=)

I couldn’t be here without you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67549977/420054592/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230803PrimaryAnni_SB_30DO_4_NG_TESTA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjRiMzMyNy00NzMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wc6P_40YXU9MkM4OpNiP9SCU4s3oXYeDfwidSmzoM1c=) Peter,

Two years ago today, your support helped me win the 2021 special primary election, setting me on the path to be the next congresswoman for Ohio's 11th Congressional District. Since then, we've accomplished so much together. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67549978/420054593/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230803PrimaryAnni_SB_30DO_4_NG_TESTA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjRiMzMyNy00NzMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wc6P_40YXU9MkM4OpNiP9SCU4s3oXYeDfwidSmzoM1c=) **_We started our fight in Congress off with groundbreaking success._** With the help of Democrats in Congress, we passed **the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law,** the largest long-term investment in infrastructure and economy in our history, and **the Inflation Reduction Act,** the largest investment in climate and clean energy solutions in our history. But, Peter, that's just the start of all we've accomplished.

I am continuing the fight for progress with Democrats in Congress by creating good-paying jobs and investing directly in our communities but to keep up the work, I need you with us.

body:
Hi Peter.
---
I’m reviewing our community survey responses, and I noticed yours hasn't come in yet. I want to make sure you have the chance to send us your input before tonight's deadline.
Our team really counts on your responses to fuel our programs and empower Democratic women to run and win in every state.
**Will you take just two minutes to complete your survey response now? Here’s the link:**[http://surveys.signforgood.com/emerge-2023-future](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67550665/420056960/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1275-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyOTg4ZGNhLTQ5MzItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2HfqIB5IUiEkK7fupiSGueVoacwUQiYXJoWxvM-GrgY=&emci=7bde0cfb-4831-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f2988dca-4932-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=920818)****
Thank you so much for sharing your thoughts,
Sandra Bishop
Chief Development Officer, Emerge
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Emerge**
Date: Wed, Aug 2, 2023
Subject: We need your input, {[FirstName or 'friend'}}
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67550666/420056961/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1275-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyOTg4ZGNhLTQ5MzItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2HfqIB5IUiEkK7fupiSGueVoacwUQiYXJoWxvM-GrgY=&emci=7bde0cfb-4831-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f2988dca-4932-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=920818)

We need your input, Peter.
Now that we're more than halfway through 2023, we're also more than halfway into this year's fight to transform politics – and we need your help.

Here at Emerge, 2022 was _huge_ : Our alums had a 71 percent win rate in elections nationwide, and 97 percent of incumbents who ran for reelection won. In the spring 2023 primaries, Emerge women achieved a stunning 91 percent win rate. Our winning strategy is working!

But the work continues in 2023: We're taking every opportunity to empower Democratic women who will fight for our communities at every level.
**That’s why we’re asking our top supporters to take the Emerge Community Survey today. ****Right now, we’re still 51 responses short of our goal, and we’re counting on your feedback before our survey closes at midnight. [So please: Will you take just two minutes to share your input now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67550667/420056962/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1275-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyOTg4ZGNhLTQ5MzItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2HfqIB5IUiEkK7fupiSGueVoacwUQiYXJoWxvM-GrgY=&emci=7bde0cfb-4831-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f2988dca-4932-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=920818)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67550668/420056963/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1275-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyOTg4ZGNhLTQ5MzItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2HfqIB5IUiEkK7fupiSGueVoacwUQiYXJoWxvM-GrgY=&emci=7bde0cfb-4831-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f2988dca-4932-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=920818)
---
Listening to real people and real communities – not out-of-touch “experts” – is how Emerge forms our strategies, designs our trainings, and recruits the right candidates for the right races year after year.
**With your insights, we can keep building on our incredible win rate for community-driven candidates and empower more Democratic women who will put real people first.[So please, will you take our Emerge Community Survey now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67550669/420056964/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1275-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyOTg4ZGNhLTQ5MzItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2HfqIB5IUiEkK7fupiSGueVoacwUQiYXJoWxvM-GrgY=&emci=7bde0cfb-4831-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=f2988dca-4932-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=920818)**
Thank you, Peter. We look forward to reading your responses.
– Team Emerge
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67550670/420056965/-1986725773?refcode=jtk1275-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1275-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyOTg4ZGNhLTQ5MzItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2HfqIB5IUiEkK7fupiSGueVoacwUQiYXJoWxvM-GrgY=)
---
Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. **[If you’d like to donate, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67550671/420056966/-1657939538?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1275-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyOTg4ZGNhLTQ5MzItZWUxMS1iOGYwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2HfqIB5IUiEkK7fupiSGueVoacwUQiYXJoWxvM-GrgY=)**
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Sun Reader,
---
| | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

clean_body: In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Sun Reader, | | In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist, The New York Sun | | | | | | | | | |

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Trump is fundraising off this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Yesterday, just two hours after being federally charged for trying to overturn the results of the 2020 election, Trump’s campaign started selling t-shirts to commemorate his latest indictment.
Less than an hour after being indicted on 7 federal charges in June for keeping and hiding classified documents, Trump sent out a fundraising email that raised $5.8 million.
He did the same thing in March after being indicted for sexual abuse. **Trump’s base donated $4 million in less than 24 hours.** That is a lot of money to spread hate.
[We need to be ready to fight back. Will you chip in $5 today to keep our movement going strong? Every contribution helps to power our grassroots campaign for progress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230803.Z1iwlQ&refcode=em20230803-4746-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4746%2E2526796%2ENVJPkI)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230803.Z1iwlQ&refcode=em20230803-4746-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4746%2E2526796%2ENVJPkI)**
House Speaker Kevin McCarthy released a statement defending Trump and promising that ‘House Republicans will hold this brazen weaponization of power accountable.’ Republican leaders have made it clear — **they are going to do whatever is necessary to protect Donald Trump.**
On the Oversight Committee, where Alexandria holds the #2 spot for Democrats, Republicans are starting completely baseless investigations into President Biden. Their goal is to dirty the waters and create a false sense of equivalency between him and President Trump. We can’t let that happen.
[Democrats on every level, from Congress to the statehouse, are going to have to fight back against Trump’s efforts to get back into the White House. Will you make a contribution of $5 today to power our movement against Trump's extremism?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230803.Z1iwlQ&refcode=em20230803-4746-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4746%2E2526796%2ENVJPkI)
From all of us here on the campaign, we thank you for your support.
Team AOC

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: stand with me against antisemitic extremism
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Representative Paul Gosar has shown a clear pattern of engaging in antisemitic extremism – from sharing links to antisemitic sites to supporting individuals like Nick Fuentes and Kanye West.

I have been at the forefront of combating antisemitism for years now, both in and out of Congress, which is why I’m now standing with others to censure Gosar’s extremist actions. If we want to fight for a future without hate, we need to stand up and speak up.

Antisemitic incidents are at an all-time high across the country. This national crisis calls for action across the aisle to actively combat antisemitism whenever and wherever we see it – but all Gosar’s actions do is amplify hate. There is zero place for this kind of harmful, extremist rhetoric anywhere in our government or nation.

Will you stand with me and add your name to denounce Gosar, and other extremist individuals like him, to fight for a future without hate? [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-antisemitism-2308]
STAND WITH ME [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/jg-antisemitism-2308]

Thank you,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Nick Melvoin
subject: 📽️ What are you streaming tonight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
Not surprising: WGA members have written some of the best protest signs ever.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67551204/420058773/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE1ZmE0NzgtNGQzMi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TZpEa4GU-tE2gPU85dSrx5xWmESSlHBeUumbTBM7Yx8=&emci=e8344d3f-4832-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=1a5fa478-4d32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=10481059)
---

| | Our neighborhood is robust with picket lines, Peter. In May, The Writers Guild of America's (WGA) 11,500 screenwriters went on strike due to an ongoing labor dispute with the Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers (AMPTP), which has created the most significant interruption to American television and film production since the COVID-19 pandemic. In July, SAG-AFTRA, the union representing virtually every actor in the country in film and television work, went on strike as well as part of a broader Hollywood labor dispute. Why? Neither group's needs are being met by their employers. **I joined the striking workers of WGA, to hear their concerns.** Chief among them include AI and streaming residuals. _I was proud to join the picket line with my dad Jeff, a former member of the WGA Board of Directors, to stand in solidarity with workers demanding fair pay for their work._ It's never been easier to stream our favorite shows and movies from the comfort of our couch. **So why aren't the artists and creators getting their fair share of streaming's success?** With current contracts, production companies can pay writers less for streaming content than they would for traditional film and TV projects. With streaming becoming a larger and larger portion of the industry, that means producers are still able to pay writers at those lower rates while their own profits soar. **The good news: there's progress on the horizon.** The WGA and the major studios, represented by AMPTP, have agreed to hold talks on Friday — the first meeting since the strike began. This could be a step towards finding a resolution that benefits both parties and brings an end to the disruption for workers in Hollywood. **It's evident that solidarity is a powerful tool, Peter.** Each of us is stronger when we stand together to push for better communities – and that includes a living wage for all. I'll be back out with striking workers soon, and I hope I can count on you to join me. See you on the picket line, _Nick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: Not surprising: WGA members have written some of the best protest signs ever. | | | | Our neighborhood is robust with picket lines, Peter. In May, The Writers Guild of America's (WGA) 11,500 screenwriters went on strike due to an ongoing labor dispute with the Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers (AMPTP), which has created the most significant interruption to American television and film production since the COVID-19 pandemic. In July, SAG-AFTRA, the union representing virtually every actor in the country in film and television work, went on strike as well as part of a broader Hollywood labor dispute. Why? Neither group's needs are being met by their employers. I joined the striking workers of WGA, to hear their concerns. Chief among them include AI and streaming residuals. I was proud to join the picket line with my dad Jeff, a former member of the WGA Board of Directors, to stand in solidarity with workers demanding fair pay for their work. It's never been easier to stream our favorite shows and movies from the comfort of our couch. So why aren't the artists and creators getting their fair share of streaming's success? With current contracts, production companies can pay writers less for streaming content than they would for traditional film and TV projects. With streaming becoming a larger and larger portion of the industry, that means producers are still able to pay writers at those lower rates while their own profits soar. The good news: there's progress on the horizon. The WGA and the major studios, represented by AMPTP, have agreed to hold talks on Friday — the first meeting since the strike began. This could be a step towards finding a resolution that benefits both parties and brings an end to the disruption for workers in Hollywood. It's evident that solidarity is a powerful tool, Peter. Each of us is stronger when we stand together to push for better communities – and that includes a living wage for all. I'll be back out with striking workers soon, and I hope I can count on you to join me. See you on the picket line, Nick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

Friend, activists have spent 100 years fighting to add the Equal Rights Amendment to our Constitution. This long-overdue amendment would establish that our civil rights cannot be infringed upon or taken away on the basis of gender.
Now that the Supreme Court has overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , far-right legislators have unleashed a slew of attacks against our reproductive rights and our right to privacy. **Passing the ERA is our best bet to restore those crucial rights — and we can't wait a moment longer.**
Polling shows 85% of voters support the ERA — and 38 states have ratified it, clearing the way to add it to the Constitution. But an arbitrary deadline is stopping us from finally certifying this amendment!
**Thankfully, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced a resolution that would allow us to ignore this deadline and make the ERA the law of the land.** With bipartisan support, filibuster reform and strong grassroots backing, Kirsten can get the job done.
But right-wing extremists and anti-choice radicals are attacking the ERA and undermining Kirsten's work. **She's counting on reliable Democrats like you to raise your voices in support of gender equity.[_Please, will you add your name before midnight tonight to show Kirsten that you back the ERA?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67551251/420058990/-1182051851?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&ask=10&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4335-su-nd&refcode=jtk4335-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzRhYjhmOC00ZDMyLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TbbcacGF3fcS34U_PzOJDSE0eheZTieqPlcKmAAy_j4=&emci=dbeaac45-4031-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=dc4ab8f8-4d32-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=7659029)**

Peter, did you know that **Louisiana’s teacher salaries still lag behind the regional average here in the South?**
Think about the impact that has on our schools’ ability to retain talented teachers and better educate future generations of Louisianans. Our kids — who will one day start their own business, become teachers themselves, or maybe even run for governor — are counting on us to provide them with the best possible education.
**That’s why one of Shawn Wilson’s top priorities is to increase teacher pay beyond the regional average and reward improved school performance!**
But Shawn wants your input too, so take our poll and let us know: **_[Should Louisiana increase pay for our public school teachers?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67551725/420060875/-50264045?refcode=ea.66065675-5132-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.66065675-5132-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjYwNjU2NzUtNTEzMi1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jGQaOiRQUPpU193d82qF5fgEky8xRtEnIFW2xnFf5t0=&emci=e49b36a1-4832-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=66065675-5132-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&ceid=13775345)_**

clean_body: Take Shawn’s poll and let us know, Peter. | Louisiana’s school year starts next week! As teachers prepare to welcome students back, we want to know: Should Louisiana’s public school teachers be paid more? | | ---|--- Peter, did you know that Louisiana’s teacher salaries still lag behind the regional average here in the South? Think about the impact that has on our schools’ ability to retain talented teachers and better educate future generations of Louisianans. Our kids — who will one day start their own business, become teachers themselves, or maybe even run for governor — are counting on us to provide them with the best possible education. That’s why one of Shawn Wilson’s top priorities is to increase teacher pay beyond the regional average and reward improved school performance! body:
Adding insult to injury. . .

Adding insult to injury. . . | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=829e49eee7df4c1589abe3f4cd50cea5&_e=vSkm8DqL1exsIBTsyMr2Cuxeb34kKMtYfNGNxCudNUuJB_9f_hfHZ9lnAo8hdC4T-dF9znxFE-oo8vHbq614JXF44E6CUJdLlf6NpVbFmkgoWBa_jgHXNwpPFmZtXy-wfAW67DqvaplEixr9XedM0wF8mlPW0oOqoBDEw0ymBD5iu7A9Fwm1lKg1Gzb4wfjECbWqu9NzsZUQ8hHqczZEFz2O5sauRdkvzSjb1g4MvxtoPsQFWGxEXGz6GcU4FWC24v73G_SwWnoUCqRmoQ4kJvI0vcO8P1BZgr1clOOzkAw6HBccCfcDgioBDRIdIRiCfd--uLnSDa-L5TWey8cQpMcPA5sz7CuxmpnyYmlHUnC2jdRlnoT_A2FICG54-Szg0Om_Xxwt0WBQb04xA9CBqx4xLqwtvaIILN0WziTTLMI%3D)
---
| | Patriot,

---
The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed...
---
...But perhaps _most fraudulent_ of all is the disgraceful name that Biden's Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... _
_
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=829e49eee7df4c1589abe3f4cd50cea5&_e=vSkm8DqL1exsIBTsyMr2Cuxeb34kKMtYfNGNxCudNUuJB_9f_hfHZ9lnAo8hdC4T-dF9znxFE-oo8vHbq614JXF44E6CUJdLlf6NpVbFmkgoWBa_jgHXNwpPFmZtXy-wfAW67DqvaplEixr9XedM0wF8mlPW0oOqoBDEw0ymBD5iu7A9Fwm1lKg1Gzb4wfjECbWqu9NzsZUQ8hHqczZEFz2O5sauRdkvzSjb1g4MvxtoPsQFWGxEXGz6GcU4FWC24v73G_SwWnoUCqRmoQ4kJgCIiok4Si4DLYT3y0QICTWxJozZjshQvpDDZKm0caJgs0gWHucxl_XXUj_USNXmtM6ZAs9rpOnnNP7Vp8R9CYrX1w7Q3Iz_Nq6Qzs8hgx4rfIORnoR4LczDcyVWU3QoTwwOwT1RC0e1DdeXvBFk4zk%3D)
---
It should read _Biden v. the American People_ , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for.

---
We all know that the __REAL__ United States of America - the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running - proudly stand by my side.

---
Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: _**to put the United States of America FIRST.**_

---
After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for __America__.

---
As President, it was my honor to rescue America's economy, to secure America's borders, to renegotiate America's trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America's forgotten citizens.

---
Now, the Swamp that I'm on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: _" United States of America v. Donald J. Trump."_

---
**But I know that this is _NOT_ the _United States of America_.**

---
What we're living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic.

---
_The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice._

---
And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it.

---
With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the __**United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump**__.

---
**[If you're not doing poorly right now, please make a contribution of even just $1 to prove that the _REAL_ America knows that we will weather this storm and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=829e49eee7df4c1589abe3f4cd50cea5&_e=vSkm8DqL1exsIBTsyMr2Cuxeb34kKMtYfNGNxCudNUuJB_9f_hfHZ9lnAo8hdC4T-dF9znxFE-oo8vHbq614JXF44E6CUJdLlf6NpVbFmkgoWBa_jgHXNwpPFmZtXy-wfAW67DqvaplEixr9XedM0wF8mlPW0oOqoBDEw0ymBD5iu7A9Fwm1lKg1Gzb4wfjECbWqu9NzsZUQ8hHqczZEFz2O5sauRdkvzSjb1g4MvxtoPsQFWGxEXGz6GcU4FWC24v73G_SwWnoUCqRmoQ4kJg_g4DtKhZdyRuoPO2GeNQj5Ng24mVQRvFMgbkYZ9I9-Hrb8VOTY_AgsV_56dioRWpVpHxWlVlh6xSP15pg3X84SMOB0jFiUX11zOagoDXcwHTDH7QZwWVwi6v5qNfw-5tKtl1-wbx586lr2j5Yag4I%3D)**

clean_body: Adding insult to injury. . . Adding insult to injury. . . | | | | | Patriot, The fraudulent charges against me have officially been filed... ...But perhaps most fraudulent of all is the disgraceful name that Biden's Department of Justice filed this witch hunt under... It should read Biden v. the American People , because this is nothing but an assault on everything that the United States stands for. We all know that the REAL United States of America - the citizens who power our nation, who provide our food, who keep us safe, who teach our children, who keep our cities running - proudly stand by my side. Eight years ago, I made the decision to sacrifice EVERYTHING to do one thing and one thing alone: to put the United States of America FIRST. After decades of watching the United States get ripped off and abused by power-hungry globalists who see our country as nothing more than their personal wallet, I decided to challenge the corrupt ruling class of both parties and do what was right for America. As President, it was my honor to rescue America's economy, to secure America's borders, to renegotiate America's trade deals, to defend America from threats abroad, and to protect the rights and freedoms of America's forgotten citizens. Now, the Swamp that I'm on a mission to drain is forcing me to look at the words: " United States of America v. Donald J. Trump." But I know that this is NOT the United States of America. What we're living in right now is a dystopian Third World dictatorship that has only temporarily taken control of our once great and free Republic. The REAL AMERICA proudly and peacefully stands by my side in my battle for justice. And today, on the day of my unjust arraignment, I am asking YOU to prove it. With the full weight of the Department of Justice bearing down on me, I ask that you show the world that the United States of America stands with Donald J. Trump. | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America. Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 TEXT TRUMP to 88022 to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

Fellow Conservative,

clean_body: | | Derek- This week, we have seen Michigan Republicans get indicted for tampering with voting machines. We have seen a former President get indicted on 6 counts to overturn a free and fair election. And in less than a week, we have the next of many battles for the soul of democracy. Next Tuesday, Ohioans will be heading to the ballot box for a special election to decide whether or not it should be harder for voters to amend their own state constituent. And that’s gonna be a hard no from us. | Our Ohio Young Dems are hard at work by making phone calls, knocking on doors, and telling their friends and family to vote No on Issue 1. body:

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: I am writing today to explain why I am debating Ron DeSantis and to ask you to rush a $3 contribution directly to Joe Biden's campaign for president today.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Several months ago, back when people thought Ron DeSantis had a chance to win the Republican nomination for president, I challenged him to a debate.

Alright friends —
Several months ago, back when people thought Ron DeSantis had a chance to win the Republican nomination for president, I challenged him to a debate.
I said we could even do it on Fox News, and with Sean Hannity as a host.
Earlier this week, he accepted. We'll see if he follows through...
Now, before I talk about WHY this is happening, let me say this: I am going to defend the Biden agenda and accomplishments from DeSantis' attacks as forcefully as I did the last time I was on with Hannity.
But President Biden is going to be taking on a tougher opponent than DeSantis — that's Donald Trump — and Joe needs our help, cause Trump is out to a HUGE fundraising lead and is on the brink of wrapping on the Republican nomination.
So please:
[**Use this link to contribute $3 DIRECTLY to Joe Biden's campaign for president. Help him close the gap on his fundraising shortfall as the attack ads ramp up against him.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/newsom-biden-aug23?refcode=em230803-1-f&refcode2=1529_4767699_OMVGOk&akid=1529%2E4767699%2EOMVGOk)
[CONTRIBUTE TO JOE BIDEN FOR PRESIDENT TODAY](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/newsom-biden-aug23?refcode=em230803-1-f&refcode2=1529_4767699_OMVGOk&akid=1529%2E4767699%2EOMVGOk)
Now, I challenged Ron DeSantis to a debate because he is a total fraud and the world needs to see it.
He talks about freedom A LOT, but he is one of the most anti-freedom governors in the most anti-freedom political party in the country.
Freedom is under attack in Florida.
They ban books in Florida.
They restrict speech in Florida.
They make it harder to vote in Florida.
They criminalize women and doctors in Florida.
As Democrats, we cannot allow Republicans to own that word in the political debate. We have to take it back.
That's what I will do on Fox News against DeSantis.
Because true freedom means you can afford to get the health care you need without going bankrupt.
True freedom means being able to love the person you love without fear or discrimination.
True freedom means you can go to a movie, a parade, a church or an elementary school without fear of getting shot.
True freedom is a woman and her doctor making the health care decisions she needs.
True freedom means you don’t have to choose between covering the cost of your utilities or the medicine you need to live.
True freedom means living life without the fear that large portions of the planet will be uninhabitable for future generations.
That is what the Biden agenda is all about — and why he needs our help. Especially now — especially as Trump's fundraising is picking up and the attack ads against Biden are, as well.
[**Please use this link to contribute $3 or whatever you can afford today directly to Joe Biden's campaign for president. He needs us now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/newsom-biden-aug23?refcode=em230803-1-f&refcode2=1529_4767699_OMVGOk&akid=1529%2E4767699%2EOMVGOk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

But President Biden is going to be taking on a tougher opponent than DeSantis — that's Donald Trump — and Joe needs our help, cause Trump is out to a HUGE fundraising lead and is on the brink of wrapping on the Republican nomination. So please: Now, I challenged Ron DeSantis to a debate because he is a total fraud and the world needs to see it. He talks about freedom A LOT, but he is one of the most anti-freedom governors in the most anti-freedom political party in the country. Freedom is under attack in Florida. They ban books in Florida. They restrict speech in Florida. They make it harder to vote in Florida. They criminalize women and doctors in Florida. As Democrats, we cannot allow Republicans to own that word in the political debate. We have to take it back. That's what I will do on Fox News against DeSantis. Because true freedom means you can afford to get the health care you need without going bankrupt. True freedom means being able to love the person you love without fear or discrimination. True freedom means you can go to a movie, a parade, a church or an elementary school without fear of getting shot. True freedom is a woman and her doctor making the health care decisions she needs. True freedom means you don’t have to choose between covering the cost of your utilities or the medicine you need to live. True freedom means living life without the fear that large portions of the planet will be uninhabitable for future generations. That is what the Biden agenda is all about — and why he needs our help. Especially now — especially as Trump's fundraising is picking up and the attack ads against Biden are, as well.
